name: Wisconsin Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Republicans want to overturn Wisconsin’s last election:
body:
Extreme Republicans want to impeach state Supreme Court Justice Janet Protasiewicz – despite her landslide victory in April. We need to lay the groundwork to defeat them. | | |
---
| | | **In Wisconsin,**
Extreme Republicans want to impeach state Supreme Court Justice Janet Protasiewicz – despite her landslide victory in April.

We need to lay the groundwork to defeat them. **
Can we count on you?**

**[Donate $7 now](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xJdM4UPBsteMLVkfmLiDV3AYV6Ajmkcu1v1riNeitrErRWjicIceA3oPxvaLluh1jM-V8JaT5-QC3S0-QLPzXFh7xwQ6SPtppv8Sr7Ta-2PYDU2yLfryQccB-a1DrZn8OEVHUvnR0UubDxqITrahQLb13ampEyARGNJ3TAsRnpBuQCNnNRjoink3WUH3O0F8XTakuwDA1tOPxCASzq3BNbg4F3aWnTmpQVpe413Ie3y-UZtcV-SeR4xj577qsGBlNLb9HK9watdcqfxc3kzEL0Lj-JSZ7jznObWcF2yAKCddfCmw7R1itRW0VkC8_qQ8YeTWFfwYPLFjNuqxhtYP1JuqHklTl7wBu4IZjRZ7Vkp00R1UJC73N8DUh3jdhN7xpo-9ty6RTLs9Sz_l1Ped7_3QLYHO-o4Obtp6nrCXRmHBuSF9q_TVEv0jbYDYO2PiE/40a/My2FyruTRTydrnNQpvbomw/h0/-0ni2W5Cre3dP8gAiUTE1FoSy-G08-Xbl1X3EzrcC28)**
---
Here are three more things you need to know about Wisconsin Republicans:
**FIRST: Two lawsuits have been filed to redraw the legislative maps in Wisconsin for 2024.** Republicans are terrified of losing power, so they’re resorting to anti-democratic schemes to protect their majority.
**SECOND: Republicans are _seriously considering_ impeaching newly-elected Justice Protasiewicz.** The court’s liberal majority could put every seat in the legislature on the ballot _next year_ , so Republicans are fighting tooth-and-nail to cling to power.
**THIRD: Redistricting is at the center of this fight. **For years, Republicans have ruled the state of Wisconsin through rigged, gerrymandered maps, giving Democrats little to no opportunity to gain power – but with new maps, we could finally build momentum in Wisconsin.
The hard-won liberal majority on the WI Supreme Court is one of the only things standing in Republicans' way of ruling Wisconsin _forever_.
**There’s no better time to own a piece of this fight.**
[Rush $7 or $25 to fuel our fight and protect Democratic progress in states like Wisconsin. body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=494f04e1030a47c6a1cea24ae7d53e11&_e=c2tjedjwbB6u5xM43AkjAlveiuQSefS5wwK-Xc49BBGqDqrz3CPMZ1Eeltrs1NfIMoR0SBI-BGHGaUWsro7jBnF-QB-YvwZ56Qg8VycmJ3QEKceS-0BZC9EUVTIbw6UCgYKmoV5A-AbEpvieMGiusniMeepbdwpfamg75AIQvcdX0PM9uz4TkcQVhAq9SoIbSxrPwiE-J42Tdw2BwkdbMSYCGiG0MYl9y-4qJegZFFvq33_LllJLggvBtNA589Gu5g_Yiv4Zk0toabPFs48IJiu6ZXzvJxRcswwggtmym0j3mbdzsUpV2QV0oLOcJPuivz8a0Yt3xO0rTHoKFJSkoO5R807A8oZfo5XdrU7RY9hPEUVmHnsRD7tT9jBr_dskTPP7JkzlvzZSEMjP3c0-XZedjKmInHsKvTtfZ0x1iCktRTIAkfzNdcp5cO8yN6p3miqw9Pdu81OxhaaYy-k0Yw0og-9MGpS3ru3FMgQkoGsNWhkLKSgjeL5GNp91Jsoo)
---
| | Patriot,

---
I think we can all agree: this is really getting out of hand... The Deep State is now _declaring war_ on our America First movement.
---
**Crooked Joe has summoned a****“war crimes prosecutor”****to join the special counsel to try and imprison me for life as an innocent man.**
---
By adding a “war crimes” prosecutor to the Biden special counsel team, the Left is trying to send a message and make an example out of me...

---
...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House.

---
This is ultimately about instilling **_FEAR_** in the public.
---
**The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs.**
---
**The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1. **
---
**In the eyes of the Deep State, challenging the ruling class and vowing to put the American people first is akin to committing war crimes.**
---
But together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people.
---
No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
---
_If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it._
---

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | | | Patriot, I think we can all agree: this is really getting out of hand... The Deep State is now declaring war on our America First movement. Crooked Joe has summoned a“war crimes prosecutor”to join the special counsel to try and imprison me for life as an innocent man. By adding a “war crimes” prosecutor to the Biden special counsel team, the Left is trying to send a message and make an example out of me... ...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House. This is ultimately about instilling FEAR in the public. The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1. In the eyes of the Deep State, challenging the ruling class and vowing to put the American people first is akin to committing war crimes. But together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people. No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it. Otherwise, I don’t have to tell you how critical these times are for our country. America needs you now more than ever before. | | Thank you, Donald J. | | Patriot,

---
A couple weeks ago, the Washington Post and ABC released a poll showing that we’re beating Crooked Joe by 10 POINTS.
---
As you can imagine, they weren’t too happy!

---
They even went so far as to write an article on why no one should believe their OWN poll. But now, we have proof that our 10-point lead over Crooked Joe is not a fluke!

---
**_ANOTHER_ POLL NOW SHOWS US BEATING CROOKED JOE BY 10 POINTS.**
---
Look, everybody knows that we’re beating Biden — and beating him by A LOT! Even Joe Biden – for all of the many, many things he doesn’t know – can still comprehend that he’s losing badly to us.
---
That’s why Crooked Joe is unleashing the full power of the legal system — at both the state and federal level — to try and stop our movement.
---
But what Biden doesn’t understand is that he’s not just up against me... He’s up against the single biggest political movement in history.
---
Our grassroots donors like _YOU_ are the true reason we now hold a 10-POINT LEAD over Biden in the general election.
---
Your support has ensured that we can withstand any attack that comes our way.
---
_And now that another poll shows us leading by 10, God only knows what heinous attack or outrageous witch hunt the Deep State is plotting against us next..._
---
But with your sustained support, we will be able to prevail just as we always have all the way until Election Day 2024 when we take back our country and SAVE AMERICA!
---

clean_body: This seals it.| | | | | Patriot, A couple weeks ago, the Washington Post and ABC released a poll showing that we’re beating Crooked Joe by 10 POINTS. As you can imagine, they weren’t too happy! They even went so far as to write an article on why no one should believe their OWN poll. But now, we have proof that our 10-point lead over Crooked Joe is not a fluke! ANOTHER POLL NOW SHOWS US BEATING CROOKED JOE BY 10 POINTS. Look, everybody knows that we’re beating Biden — and beating him by A LOT! Even Joe Biden – for all of the many, many things he doesn’t know – can still comprehend that he’s losing badly to us. That’s why Crooked Joe is unleashing the full power of the legal system — at both the state and federal level — to try and stop our movement. But what Biden doesn’t understand is that he’s not just up against me... He’s up against the single biggest political movement in history. Our grassroots donors like YOU are the true reason we now hold a 10-POINT LEAD over Biden in the general election. Your support has ensured that we can withstand any attack that comes our way. And now that another poll shows us leading by 10, God only knows what heinous attack or outrageous witch hunt the Deep State is plotting against us next... But with your sustained support, we will be able to prevail just as we always have all the way until Election Day 2024 when we take back our country and SAVE AMERICA! | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: My mission: stop the invasion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
It's happening right here, right now, and it’s time for us to stop the invasion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2jkqkt36roq34kgc5e0sfaj91hg3hc5h590leh8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gm4o36cth2bs)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1978k9fure03k0q7nglqt6vmeo2fjkk0a0v9a2o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gm4o36cth2bs)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztgejm3j96dnopngsgu6d6ts11s73fep9jd4guog_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gm4o36cth2bs)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc6n1nghh719fp0emimgujujv4ouq7m6rqh2d3cg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gm4o36cth2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu707o6e1fjnbbo5hdhb2vecfso42ca8v1sfls8o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gm4o36cth2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg4hmp2asoqu1nn2diceqqht1oktg13ojg3mkb6g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gm4o36cth2bs)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: these babies need you now
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Pro-abortion Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer is scheming to make her state every bit as radical as pro-abortion states like California and New York.

In fact, she’s backing the so-called “Reproductive Health Act” – which is a combination of 12 pro-abortion bills – that are set to be voted on in a matter of days.

Because babies’ lives are at stake – and because Michigan is going to be one of the most critical Battleground States in 2024 – we have no choice but to act!

This is exactly why **_this WEDNESDAY, October 11th_** , _Students for Life Action_ is hosting a Lobby Day in Lansing, Michigan!

Conveniently enough, we'll be right on the Abortion Lobby’s favorite Governors’ turf . . . Michigan’s Gretchen Whitmer.

Of course, I know showing up in Lansing, Michigan isn’t possible for all of our supporters, so I’m not even going to ask . . .

**[But if you can’t be there in person, would you please agree to your most generous contribution to help me pay for gas and food for our student leaders](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sedkjy-duchtdja-y/)?**

The fact is, our students are planning on spending an entire day at the Michigan State Capital, so any help you could give would be much appreciated!

This could not be more important.

If passed, the bills Governor Whitmer is backing would:

*** **_Legalize barbaric Partial-Birth Abortion_.**

Michigan currently has a statewide ban on partial-birth abortions, meaning any physician who commits one is subject to a felony. Without this ban, women could obtain a late-term abortion anywhere across the state.

This would not only allow late-term abortions, but it would glorify them! Talk about crossing a line. This is infanticide, and we can’t just sit idly by and watch. This would allow medical “professionals” to remove a fully intact pre-born baby with no repercussions.
*** **_Eliminate health and safety standards designed to protect women_.**

This would allow abortionists to commit abortions without providing mothers with knowledge of the procedure or risks. The fact is, abortions aren’t safe for the mother or the child. With the rising number of chemical abortions happening daily, this cannot be allowed.
*** **_Allow College Health Centers to refer students for abortions, making every college campus an abortion facility_.**

Michigan would have its campus health centers equipping its students with harmful abortion materials for pregnant mothers. Instead of providing their students with resources, they will provide their preborn baby with a death sentence.

This would give universities the authority to refer their students to the nearest abortion facility for an abortion to be committed. The Abortion Lobby knows preying on young people is their quickest path to committing more abortions and making more money.
*** **_Expand taxpayer funding of abortion through Medicaid_.**

Now, the expansion of taxpayer money in MI would be paying for even more abortions across the state. This would ensure that abortion is widely covered for Michiganders enrolled in Medicaid!

American citizens' taxes should not be going towards the intentional dismemberment of another human being's life. Expanding pregnant mothers' access is not only harmful to the mother but also her preborn baby. It still baffles me that the Abortion Lobby thinks this is okay.
**[>> Chip In To _Students For Life Action’s_ **Michigan Lobby Day** Fund <<](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sedkjy-duchtdja-j/)**
Pro-Life Friend, all of this is insane, but not a surprise for Governor Whitmer. You and I both know she has her sights set on supporting the Abortion Lobby and their violent efforts.

Just last spring she signed legislation that _repealed_ the state’s 1931 law banning abortion without exceptions and criminalizing nurses and doctors.

Well folks, _it looks like that was only the tip of the iceberg._

Pro-Life Friend, our **Michigan Lobby Day** Fund will make sure that our staff and student volunteers are as effective as possible at their mission.

Whether it’s paying for pro-life signs to drive home our message to Michigan legislators or simply making sure we have the funds to continue student door knocking, **[every dollar you can give will be a huge help to make our**Michigan Lobby Day** a success](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sedkjy-duchtdja-i/).**

Our **Michigan Lobby Day** will be crucial to the future of pro-life legislation, because it doesn’t just put the pro-life movement on our elected officials’ radar, __it puts us right in their faces_!_

**[So, would you prayerfully consider a gift of $250, $100, $75, or $50 to _Student for Life Action_ to help us cover the costs of this lobby day](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sedkjy-duchtdja-d/)?**

**[Even a gift of $25 or $10 will help us with transportation costs, action materials, and meals for our volunteers](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sedkjy-duchtdja-h/).**

With the generous support of good folks like you, I know this **Michigan Lobby Day** is sure to have a big impact.

Thank you for everything you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sedkjy-026154D2-duchtdja-k) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-sedkjy-duchtdja-u/)
**

**

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: Joe Biden has failed to meet his mere basic responsibility.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
It's happening right here, right now, and it’s time for us to stop the invasion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1v40i7atdtp0gjtkce3m6hm2ie4rapk54b1vveo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gmaor2chh2bs)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6octdl7srt362vimfr8l7vd8utv3fmlt529jipg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gmaor2chh2bs)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvtlefrh7p9jg0kf7ojudbgqu80mgmn7ae03j2lo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gmaor2chh2bs)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhf3u2h9s06j3jdjr2gi3fptodrpo50jug7ofjfo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gmaor2chh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbt92amaleunu6hotn80v3bk0smrts035k2o30e8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gmaor2chh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf9k0ra2rnib61548up5iv7e4vtrdi5qq1ipr1t0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3gmaor2chh2bs)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Wisconsin voters may be able to ban “Zuckerbucks” — the injection of private money into public election administration — from their elections next year, before the 2024 general election. name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Replace Dina Titus and End Her Open Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Let's Put An End to Open Borders, Fentanyl, and Human Trafficking!
| | | |
---
# Dina Titus: Champion of Open Borders, Fentanyl, and Human Trafficking
---
The fentanyl crisis and human trafficking are two devastating issues that require strong leadership and decisive action. However, Titus's unwavering support for open borders makes these problems much worse, leaving our community vulnerable to devastating consequences. Titus continues to prioritize Biden's failed policies over the safety and well-being of Nevadans.
Fentanyl Crisis: The fentanyl crisis has reached epidemic proportions, claiming thousands of lives yearly. With synthetic opioids flooding our streets, it is evident that the uncontrolled flow of people across our borders has provided a gateway for drug traffickers. Titus's negligent and irresponsible refusal to acknowledge the link between porous borders and the ease of fentanyl smuggling is a dereliction of duty. It is time for her to retire!
Human Trafficking: Human trafficking is an appalling crime that preys on the vulnerable and marginalized. However, instead of addressing this grave issue head-on, Titus's support for open borders has facilitated human traffickers' operations. Nevada's First Congressional District, which she is supposed to represent, is one of the top locations in the world for human trafficking. Titus has brought shame and embarrassment to the people of her district. She has got to go!
Ignoring the Consequences: What is most concerning about Dina Titus's stance on open borders is her refusal to acknowledge the consequences of her policies. Instead of taking responsibility for the negative impact of uncontrolled immigration, she clings to idealistic visions of inclusivity and equity without considering the real-world implications. It is time to replace Titus!
Conclusion: Dina Titus's unwavering support for open borders has proven to be a grave disservice to the people of Nevada. Her refusal to acknowledge the link between porous borders and these issues demonstrates a failure of leadership and an alarming lack of concern for the safety and well-being of her constituents. We need new representation!
As your representative in Congress, I will make national security one of my top priorities. I will demand more robust border security and will provide law enforcement with the resources they need to keep us safe. I will put the welfare of Americans ahead of all other considerations. It is time for a change!
---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: What will you do to support Veterans? -R.W. A. I understand the needs of our veterans. Both my parents were veterans. My son and I are veterans. (We deployed together to Iraq.) Each American owes an enormous debt of gratitude to the men and women who have served in uniform. I will work hard to make sure that we take care of those who took care of us!
Q. Mark, what is your position on abortion? -S.S. A. I'm pro-life; however, in Nevada, the abortion issue is settled by law. The people of Nevada voted to have limits, allowing abortion up to 24 weeks, and then for the life and health of the mother. This is not a federal issue. It is left to the States and the "people" to decide. I will not support any federal legislation that overturns the will of the people in Nevada. I support exceptions for rape, incest, and the life and health of the mother. On the other hand, Dina Titus completely ignored the will of Nevadans when she voted to remove all limits and then to have hard-working Nevadans pay for other people's abortions.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

# MONDAY, OCTOBER 9, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1888, the [Washington Monument](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71yhCAUQOGngW4d_hQoKNLYmXZLh_Ve9CYIjpLdydtnkjrlac7Md5_mKVKmsr7HHUNLdY5LoyfOUtz8TelZcQgJUaHmGOTgB9cbYR3fAtpkH9oqYb0DZXzfxzREqYVzCSQkTkEJpaUQXvjeaNM50A_AwYAGuSSUzAgEavXsPiqVtmHK3_WJZ7fUneewtXZcTL8xNTI1Yule9EkHAsWunitT428zNd7jtVFZWy3zVMvXjqXxM8DxopzpGiwzYt0j5b9t-xf5EwAA___09lQG) was opened to the public. Construction began way back in 1848, but funding challenges and the Civil War took a 40-year toll on the process. Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, [you can do that here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAQQH8NbLEODvMxMFSqvKVrR8uYI74Kh8ihqfrvq3Zt1qenJ73383xeuPL18rbsFHtp87J2ftCs4BROGmctcyxEmlBSVDZYPxpwXm7RIqZknXIQivbJZ12MczCOBVVKtkiOGjQqgABhNGgGnzFlsiZjVmshJQxQ5t6O4aPxtW9U6nd70DGsbZc1br3f7gJfhJ6Env4rvxynz74LfDUgj5hvX1wr360TBi77wvWv1J9-_QQAAP__YbRN0w)

If you'd like to discuss today's stories with your fellow Flyover readers, head over to our [Facebook page](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FurDAQAL_G7g4t68XgwsVr6O6qJ6VExrscTsz5BNah_H2UpE0_M9K8XadrSDk97rewia9LmUKs6SVTCxd3QTOhZr-IoBgtvrXODh1BP-jVCwABd47nYegloHRoIzsXhcgGcjp5BDQtgAPXkaFmYDOzWGLDbVykVQTCqZa9eS_pUVdZ8md5yd7Esuns11qfhzL_FI4Kx_M8myVEmUv5-AYUjv9XGX-Nm5yHwlHvnp9nyjkdtlcE9y2k_FOrf759BQAA__8Op1Bb). ## Hamas Strikes Israel
In its deadliest surprise attack in decades, the Islamic militant group _Hamas_ rampaged through multiple Israeli towns on Saturday, killing and capturing civilians and soldiers. The group then distributed multiple videos showing the bodies of Israeli soldiers being brought into Gaza. In response, Israel launched [airstrikes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1yqzAQxfGnEd0y-gKLguI2dL5tSkZmV9YmAnkk2UzePuPUac9pfvP_uK5Xz4mP-3-_09xCXv3W-EWrkjCBNqvucA5EmkxHsxqn0Q1WXlwXZ9wG5Tw6a0himJwc7RCUI0t2vMlh6njWUhsl5SSnwRrbOzQ3pNGiQbUFUsJKQm659J-ZjxYppO_8otJvee_SHFt7VGH-Cb0IvZzn2Rd6Nir1_b-XXBIKveyMmAjI1yb0wrV4Sgwhl40qbMnXCCe3CNHvvsL9eex0gA-NCsTngYWwwhenRAhvMCgJ0gm9dGXGx8kpcR0vwsr77jn92tqfpX4CAAD__wzFayo) inside the coastal enclave, which caused the destruction of multiple buildings. Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu vowed unprecedented retaliation as he outlined objectives to exact an immense price from the terrorist group within the Gaza Strip. As of yesterday, the [death toll](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu7CAQAL8Gd1iwYGwXFK9xd69NaYFZznvC5gTkrPv7KEmbekYaaT5u681RovP-3x1oW8yr2xq9cJWCzxzUCl2wERFQdWilmc00aDFO3W6Nl7OLox826bVAIc2E2kcDfh4HUNCRBQFKCjGLedBK91NQPqDRQQW5RZRMCwzUcukfmc62Y0zv_MLSb_nokt1be1am_jFYGCzXdfWNDqw5Ui0O07fFYEn0Qp_yfcWzlTeD5ZcSD-jazltOiT9drVi5FoK7M7cdCwehJ07n47NgYLB0xYbnRSlRNSPT4n44-il07c8rXwEAAP__-ypk6g) exceeded 700--including four Americans. Hamas' leader Ismail Haniyeh claims that these attacks have only just begun and will spread to the [West Bank and Jerusalem](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1u7CAQxfGnwR0WX7aXguI27va2Ka0BxutJMKwArZW3jzZ1uiP9mqP_x327AyXKj_9wout72SB0euEmBbdc6U0N0e2ICvWATs52vk1GLLfhcF6DikYqLewye7_L2U8BrAecpLALDuSUUFoKYYWdjDbjLWofcTZRRxl2lMwIjNRLHT8L5X7gnr7LC-sYyjkkd_T-bEz_Y2plar2ua8w-ZLza25la3_MNpabI1HrACY1Tq4CJPyFh65QJMj9K6_DAxj1iJQ69Q_jiNWSQ0mq9DNXF50UpUZsXZsTjBEq_H_qfRX4CAAD__4qhY-w).
## Deadly Earthquake Hits Afghanistan
A [6.3 magnitude earthquake](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1ygzAQBOCngU7M6QcBhYo0dE6bkjlLJ6NERo44m8nbZ0idcnebb_bjslww5bTd3vFOjmNZ0HN60SJBTELpRbXBRSJFuiUn7WTH3sAwtquLth_G6zCpKCeIFKwCBSh1JIPejn2bnAKlJcAEU2-06cagr4GsCTpIH0k2BigkLrX7LGnjlWL-KS-qnS_3NruV-bE3-q1Rc6Pm4zi6Sk-mup_72ZSaQ6Nm3BOKB_oUkz9jvK24pZ1xE4SV1-8nfpEIhLwKLjmLHkBUCsJX2j1tLE6nkCBgbNTcVhceR8o57XZoDNzumPIfif896DcAAP__6t9nBw) has struck a mountainous region of Afghanistan. The devastating quake is said to have killed more than 2,000 people, many of them women and children. This makes 2023 an exceptionally deadly year for earthquakes; a [7.8 magnitude earthquake](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71SxCAUQOGngS4Z_sImBYVNurW1zGC4LNclIcLddfL2jlYW1qf45rxdl6vHjPvt1W_gKJbFr4RPWKTopk7pRfHgIoACzcFJO9lxMOIy8uTCJOXqwwDxMnoLRutBSRBSy8EYZSNHp4TSUohJTIPRph-Dfg9gTdBBrhEkMwICUqn9R8GdEsR8lifUfi0bzy4RHY3pF6ZmpuaAzTeCeiTMfqdUy3H2pd7-pMbU_EN29Kh3OLt2VvQd-Erp8-HvwNTMqwvHF-aMzV6YEbfNY_716N_77wAAAP__qetcsQ) struck Turkey and Syria and killed nearly 60,000 people in February.

Afghanistan's healthcare system is heavily reliant on foreign aid--something it's been in short supply of since the Taliban takeover. It's unclear whether the Biden administration will offer any kind of direct assistance.
## Poll: Majority Approve of McCarthy's Fate
CBS News [conducted a poll](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO6yAUAL8Gd1iHhzEuKG5Dl9tuaRE4xKywQZjEyt-vsvX2I81ovm7rzaWcjsd_t6PpsazO9_TClQFdKBcrH4KJiBzFgIapRelJwqyHzQSIQk1-YtL5IAOo2c9z1GqWiwYR4pAMBy4YwALLJIUcdRD3gEoGEZiPyIgEDKmXNn6XdPQNY36XF7bRl33IZuu9nkT8I9wSbq_rGmvJqSdfPgDh9sDrJNx-LIRbBoRb0ITbWnKmDevznpN3x0nPZ62ldbp771rf3rQ8z46NAjAOE9NDM6FeKed0qplIeOwu5d-K_ueTnwAAAP__B_hhrw) that found a majority of Americans were in favor of Kevin McCarthy's recent ouster. A resounding 60% of adults in America responded that they support removing the California Republican as Speaker of the House. 75% of respondents agreed that McCarthy wasn't effective. 54% of those identifying as conservatives approved of his ousting, and 70% of self-proclaimed liberals backed his removal. This week, House Republicans will hold a candidate forum to discuss their next move in replacing McCarthy as the party looks to new candidates like Steve Scalise and Jim Jordan--both are [gaining momentum](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngS0WHGcCA0MXb-na0cK-I6bCJrKR3b591c6df-mXvo_H-Ii55O35HlcOLdUxzi2fPGp18zcwI0gKiRnYSA7aeut6VHcnlxA1xYmM7XEiZO-8TTSB0aR6VAxJ5gAKjFbKK9-jwc6RmYgtkiE9J9YCFVNude8-a97awql815P3bq6rLGFp7XUI8yZgEDBc19Wl-rXxdfx2AcOZiauAwRrj0NleodYg90CvK5eSD3sXqJ5rzOVv2P7l_QQAAP__yTBPiw) in bids for candidacy.

clean_body: In its deadliest surprise attack in decades, the Islamic militant group Hamas rampaged through multiple Israeli towns on Saturday, killing and capturing civilians and soldiers. The group then distributed multiple videos showing the bodies of Israeli soldiers being brought into Gaza. | | | | | | MONDAY, OCTOBER 9, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1888, the was opened to the public. Construction began way back in 1848, but funding challenges and the Civil War took a 40-year toll on the process. Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, If you'd like to discuss today's stories with your fellow Flyover readers, head over to our . Do you remember getting the newspaper every morning? Maybe you still get it! It was a dependable, satisfying start to the day--a feeling that we hope The Flyover gives you now. If it does, then consider throwing a into the Tip Jar today. | Hamas Strikes Israel In its deadliest surprise attack in decades, the Islamic militant group Hamas rampaged through multiple Israeli towns on Saturday, killing and capturing civilians and soldiers. The group then distributed multiple videos showing the bodies of Israeli soldiers being brought into Gaza. In response, Israel launched inside the coastal enclave, which caused the destruction of multiple buildings. Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu vowed unprecedented retaliation as he outlined objectives to exact an immense price from the terrorist group within the Gaza Strip. As of yesterday, the exceeded 700--including four Americans. Hamas' leader Ismail Haniyeh claims that these attacks have only just begun and will spread to the . Deadly Earthquake Hits Afghanistan A has struck a mountainous region of Afghanistan. The devastating quake is said to have killed more than 2,000 people, many of them women and children. This makes 2023 an exceptionally deadly year for earthquakes; a struck Turkey and Syria and killed nearly 60,000 people in February. Afghanistan's healthcare system is heavily reliant on foreign aid--something it's been in short supply of since the Taliban takeover. It's unclear whether the Biden administration will offer any kind of direct assistance. Poll: Majority Approve of McCarthy's Fate CBS News that found a majority of Americans were in favor of Kevin McCarthy's recent ouster. A resounding 60% of adults in America responded that they support removing the California Republican as Speaker of the House. 75% of respondents agreed that McCarthy wasn't effective. 54% of those identifying as conservatives approved of his ousting, and 70% of self-proclaimed liberals backed his removal. This week, House Republicans will hold a candidate forum to discuss their next move in replacing McCarthy as the party looks to new candidates like Steve Scalise and Jim Jordan--both are in bids for candidacy. Enjoy reading The Flyover? mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A to share with your friends and family. | ➤ Republican Matt Gaetz said yesterday that he continues to stand behind his spearheading of McCarthy's ouster. The Florida Republican noted that if he loses his seat in the process, it would be worth it. () ➤ Committee leaders in the House and Senate sent a joint memo to President Biden urging him to outline a specific strategy for U.S. involvement in the Ukrainian/Russian war. () ➤Senator Cory Booker (D-NJ) was in Jerusalem as the Hamas attack began. He and his staff were unharmed and departed Israel yesterday. () ➤Former President Trump said that the attack on Israel--and Ukraine--would not have occurred if he was still in the Oval Office. () | Hello Flyover Reader! This is your Editor speaking. I've commandeered our advertisement section to share a few interesting numbers with you. Ready? 27,500. Okay, I'll admit this one is an estimate. But...according to my calculations, The Flyover delivers just about 27,500 words to our readers each month. At that pace, we're pumping out a novel worth of news every quarter! 786,873. That is the exact amount of clicks we received in the month of September. That's a lot of clicks! $1,200. Any guesses? Here's the answer: this is the cost of producing each edition of The Flyover. If you look forward to finding us in your inbox every morning, would you consider ? The Flyover is free (and always will be) thanks to our sponsors. If you'd like a chance to say thank you to our team, though, this is your opportunity! Kershaw felt that he let his teammates down with his poor pitching performance. body:
It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0ad40958d1944e3be5e57523e510684&_e=gJB_1Uv5ibPM3RBNGExbNSLtnbJg4J3xoVnQyQBMMknB3JYbGajW57ZFtvXug2jOtY6AwN-e3_Euf1AId1v9pV8V_aQgXUAzgt9ku9vsqiAA00Ej5jFIVf9JigN2oXv_qcCQ2FWilW6XcPjYXIsONrp9UNOLgyQFQwVBJ-SBDQX5Vg2FvRGm81qh5lf9QzsBLzyAsVNjIdN26ENzo4aP4nDJkPBFz8TluVv-lIPejWpDRiIukMS6Ea9vqcmpzKZftylNi_yElv4blzF6Wzr7gH056CAKDHxPhsuxfy0zuvX8Mf2avEuiUKBbjQx015gunFD_Bk3AaN0Q1P3FC8ZeQ_4aXYEwxTH4XRixQq7U81HezDdG8AgOQXC48Y6-LYkr1qq8NkC5Un7IG5cMGpF57-WjwCno-iD9t-S_IcoKj_E%3D)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0ad40958d1944e3be5e57523e510684&_e=gJB_1Uv5ibPM3RBNGExbNSLtnbJg4J3xoVnQyQBMMknB3JYbGajW57ZFtvXug2jOtY6AwN-e3_Euf1AId1v9pV8V_aQgXUAzgt9ku9vsqiAA00Ej5jFIVf9JigN2oXv_qcCQ2FWilW6XcPjYXIsONrp9UNOLgyQFQwVBJ-SBDQX5Vg2FvRGm81qh5lf9QzsBLzyAsVNjIdN26ENzo4aP4nDJkPBFz8TluVv-lIPejWpDRiIukMS6Ea9vqcmpzKZfgqkcLV7z_URoNClcVobLdRUOq15nZbGc1FQkbaM-lQRd17jmMKqmfy9WUjh5kA8MZ3IDnoyK0tX5wq7aVA8I7w2NflokA73xkLxmR2KpGaQrDhFUvmeP2cZTPy6WGTDvJdnkKYOu7kPjY0Mua51A1vs_MlOMp3Lr_mwYieHaGpc%3D)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0ad40958d1944e3be5e57523e510684&_e=gJB_1Uv5ibPM3RBNGExbNSLtnbJg4J3xoVnQyQBMMknB3JYbGajW57ZFtvXug2jOtY6AwN-e3_Euf1AId1v9pV8V_aQgXUAzgt9ku9vsqiAA00Ej5jFIVf9JigN2oXv_qcCQ2FWilW6XcPjYXIsONrp9UNOLgyQFQwVBJ-SBDQX5Vg2FvRGm81qh5lf9QzsBLzyAsVNjIdN26ENzo4aP4nDJkPBFz8TluVv-lIPejWpDRiIukMS6Ea9vqcmpzKZfQDqEsE-DpgT_tQCDpD8-lJl1oLrXLS3vv9J7ToHm74OjXNHpVszzwhEWVz73pZH5ajqfvZaca6DpavyZrQ00KSxOHz25XTjUh80N4oFW3b6N9V476te51wnWzy4X0hTrWKD8it1CK8t43nZ0Qx3h4DZYg6v_L8IRxSB7qPU3NC8%3D)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---

Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0ad40958d1944e3be5e57523e510684&_e=gJB_1Uv5ibPM3RBNGExbNSLtnbJg4J3xoVnQyQBMMknB3JYbGajW57ZFtvXug2jOtY6AwN-e3_Euf1AId1v9pV8V_aQgXUAzgt9ku9vsqiAA00Ej5jFIVf9JigN2oXv_qcCQ2FWilW6XcPjYXIsONrp9UNOLgyQFQwVBJ-SBDQX5Vg2FvRGm81qh5lf9QzsBLzyAsVNjIdN26ENzo4aP4nDJkPBFz8TluVv-lIPejWpDRiIukMS6Ea9vqcmpzKZf1XnEuGv6IKEXvaWwSx7iI1JvPv0EduINzhztPDLcy98oTIH2FxgZmud0Ds6fMLYTZMoZ6Pp7o5uUWS1jT3bUd2m21h9hVDbvreY9S0cvWHFZjmB7tBodtN8BbzL3gGFM5a8tpoTi_GfUerOOXQPyhnovOTzpUx0gkCMNQTyCN3c%3D)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0ad40958d1944e3be5e57523e510684&_e=gJB_1Uv5ibPM3RBNGExbNSLtnbJg4J3xoVnQyQBMMknB3JYbGajW57ZFtvXug2jOtY6AwN-e3_Euf1AId1v9pV8V_aQgXUAzgt9ku9vsqiAA00Ej5jFIVf9JigN2oXv_qcCQ2FWilW6XcPjYXIsONrp9UNOLgyQFQwVBJ-SBDQX5Vg2FvRGm81qh5lf9QzsBLzyAsVNjIdN26ENzo4aP4nDJkPBFz8TluVv-lIPejWpDRiIukMS6Ea9vqcmpzKZf9h5XulzLGEB-a43rfhE9lpj420FnxifLGCMnckZU1-s5zT4R2n9ktBIYDYZq7hRQaRsW3AinVSX1xU-URsO9_KLOaK3NMwvrsbzkLAFdoOT8W9FAlOkDziU4zyyhm961ffifPlTsgerHe9JBAc1azUUqPLyuUm4tXXN3L1RNIU4%3D)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Friends of Charity Barry
subject: Reminder: It's Official! #RetirePocan
body:
| | | |
---
|
# Ready to Retire Pocan?
---
---
| Good Afternoon, Fellow Patriots!
If you are reading this email, it is because I just made my official announcement! I am running for Congress in 2024!
Since you last heard from me, I have not stopped fighting for you! It's been a busy year, and I have been carefully considering many opportunities and how I can best serve the good people of the Second Congressional District and fight for a Conservative government of, by, and for the people.
I am confident that I can do the most good for our district as a strong candidate against Mark Pocan in the 2024 election cycle - ensuring that he is not handed this seat on a silver platter!
I am so thankful for each of you who have supported me in the past, and I look forward to working with you over the next year!
We can take on the progressive socialists in CD2, but only if we are working as a team!
Let me know how you are excited to get involved, and please consider making a contribution today so we can get right to work!
Ever Grateful,
Charity Barry

clean_body: | | | | | Ready to Retire Pocan? | Good Afternoon, Fellow Patriots! If you are reading this email, it is because I just made my official announcement! I am running for Congress in 2024! Since you last heard from me, I have not stopped fighting for you! It's been a busy year, and I have been carefully considering many opportunities and how I can best serve the good people of the Second Congressional District and fight for a Conservative government of, by, and for the people. I am confident that I can do the most good for our district as a strong candidate against Mark Pocan in the 2024 election cycle - ensuring that he is not handed this seat on a silver platter! I am so thankful for each of you who have supported me in the past, and I look forward to working with you over the next year! We can take on the progressive socialists in CD2, but only if we are working as a team! Let me know how you are excited to get involved, and please consider making a contribution today so we can get right to work! Ever Grateful, Charity Barry | | == | | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Friends of Charity Barry | PO Box 267, Mineral Point, WI 53565 | | Sent by mailto:charity@charitybarryforcongress.com powered by

name: Maria Montero
subject: Reminder: Campaign Updates!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
ICYMI
| | | |
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
| |
---|---
Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District.

This week, we are pleased to share the support of long-time Monroe County Constable, process server, and Republican Party leader, Rick Porvaznik. Rick, originally from Lansford in Carbon County, is a dynamic and trusted leader in Monroe. Growing up in the family business, Porvaznik's Flowers, Rick learned the value of hard work and empowering small businesses. He's supporting Maria because she has the right qualifications for Congress. "Maria is the only candidate who really understands and reflects the values of the people of the 7th District. She grew up here, works here, volunteers here, and is a Conservative who will win back the 7th. She's a natural and dynamic leader whose clear ability to communicate will help us grow our party."
---
| Around the District
---
|
---
|
---
| Easton's Porch Fest in College Hill drew the community together for wonderful music, food, and camaraderie.
---
|
---
|
---
Enjoying this amazing journey and collaborating with supporters at the PA GOP State Committee Meeting.
---
|
---
---
Beautiful evening at the Stroudsmoor with a dynamic slate of candidates for Monroe County with special guest PA Senate Candidate Dave McCormick. Plus, I was able to meet a future candidate for President of the United States :)
---
---
| |
---
| Happy Columbus Day!
As a nation of immigrants, I am so blessed to be American and to celebrate Columbus Day with immense pride for my Italian heritage! Here's to my favorite Italian American, my grandfather Arthur Cardamone.
---
---
| As always, your support is crucial to winning this race. To make contributions online, please click below...thank you!
Sincerely,
Maria Montero Republican Congressional Candidate PA-7
---

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Standing with Israel is a Moral Imperative
body:
Peter, Nassau County's South Shore, like so many parts of New York, has vibrant Jewish communities that just celebrated a season of holiday worship. I stand in solidarity with my constituents, and all compassionate Americans...
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xltnyk-dytjdljkkt-r/) Peter, Nassau County's South Shore, like so many parts of New York, has vibrant Jewish communities that just celebrated a season of holiday worship.I stand in solidarity with my constituents, and all compassionate Americans, horrified by the attacks on Israel and resolute in our support of immediate and comprehensive defense and military response. **There can be no mistake - these coordinated attacks were long planned and well funded. Israel's enemies are everywhere and must be met, always, with unwavering support from her allies. Similarly, we must stay vigilant for those here at home who seek to undermine our commitment to Israel.** To New Yorkers with family or loved ones in Israel who need help, or for New Yorkers now in Israel, we are here to help. Please never hesitate to reach out to me.**Israeli security is American security. It is a moral imperative to stand with Israel. These unprovoked attacks provide a stark moral choice that I know you and I agree on.** My family's prayers are with you and yours.Sincerely,
Congressman Anthony D'Esposito | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xltnyk-dytjdljkkt-j/)
---

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The end to Biden’s border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f5ad21eb70540358279613b3841e8a4&_e=AbPlI0D2GDjfsBVCulyBO953sp2Nh88O3s6JFR5UJADw6c4OqlUkPLBaP3uALBeKw9zq7dETpOskhVfp76igbw5W7IbLbmmstFhIQbgdX094SNAvACeQM2-rpjky_w3A_nRyfBbbi8LJk0VirY-_EI7IdnX5RAO3On-DSU06kuYedp4NAGjMBL1LjkvScqHPZWC2GAtd8MQB0yGTC67tI4FA2VdsnWbEGQdpghrbZhwFA727780syQm6_l3-Zo9JPl4Ue1O3vYtKN8mBifbfQSfp3Jw7W0QF9FuqVbZPU9NM3kkVL3AthhtwrhqcU27JkQN-1_igQzYhRT7hspS2Qc1vjzzya1c8i_divJKbkeKkCuULBJlqBS8SWI32NNUF6Ul1l5ijAQRuHxps4g_8MZWbqZK1EuEJ1Kk5nLgk-jE%3D)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f5ad21eb70540358279613b3841e8a4&_e=AbPlI0D2GDjfsBVCulyBO953sp2Nh88O3s6JFR5UJADw6c4OqlUkPLBaP3uALBeKw9zq7dETpOskhVfp76igbw5W7IbLbmmstFhIQbgdX094SNAvACeQM2-rpjky_w3A_nRyfBbbi8LJk0VirY-_EI7IdnX5RAO3On-DSU06kuYedp4NAGjMBL1LjkvScqHPZWC2GAtd8MQB0yGTC67tI4FA2VdsnWbEGQdpghrbZhwFA727780syQm6_l3-Zo9JyXBnBGSb8uOakBEXWFuPI_p6f66PHxg_xPX6V3NseZ9bxYgiE6lyYdIp2ALVd8JonMA7OwwNgLfWZM47Wuj-Y5WZl7Y3iKBmw5lucwBWqenAhkHTbuuONpcm1ENg9H30b0xQcXXV5HF0V8ZSYKLtorJbTquTO9OMvWkoeNNfsp0%3D)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f5ad21eb70540358279613b3841e8a4&_e=AbPlI0D2GDjfsBVCulyBO953sp2Nh88O3s6JFR5UJADw6c4OqlUkPLBaP3uALBeKw9zq7dETpOskhVfp76igbw5W7IbLbmmstFhIQbgdX094SNAvACeQM2-rpjky_w3A_nRyfBbbi8LJk0VirY-_EI7IdnX5RAO3On-DSU06kuYedp4NAGjMBL1LjkvScqHPZWC2GAtd8MQB0yGTC67tI4FA2VdsnWbEGQdpghrbZhwFA727780syQm6_l3-Zo9JgXE_ajxuSTYCyBskrIX-91Pe4MesXwrBD349m0pERiJHuUsdGq5MZEGRDHh-WZc-ErFiINGVgiDc4BZIfydKKumkRS0m97u6c9bla6VhW5TKMla5HHKkI0E0VKLs6aJnYzFT7C_uUffKTXGM__l65BP2oj12w65wCIhnsHQoWS4%3D)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f5ad21eb70540358279613b3841e8a4&_e=AbPlI0D2GDjfsBVCulyBO953sp2Nh88O3s6JFR5UJADw6c4OqlUkPLBaP3uALBeKw9zq7dETpOskhVfp76igbw5W7IbLbmmstFhIQbgdX094SNAvACeQM2-rpjky_w3A_nRyfBbbi8LJk0VirY-_EI7IdnX5RAO3On-DSU06kuYedp4NAGjMBL1LjkvScqHPZWC2GAtd8MQB0yGTC67tI4FA2VdsnWbEGQdpghrbZhwFA727780syQm6_l3-Zo9J5vC_JJdNqEFioDYSJ5pSG55pNokSvZnQ7OIanqTd0uK77eFQXt7rR1V_aZVBD4GN4n4DTC3lN6ZrnUfUK-mBXh0PYTpGObWa9zYcgqmzqngAlrkZj10QEX3fmESEEOtucS_kVBsoEyrR1DNKcjBAUnAg-DhN9BYe3ct4OGkEUfo%3D)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f5ad21eb70540358279613b3841e8a4&_e=AbPlI0D2GDjfsBVCulyBO953sp2Nh88O3s6JFR5UJADw6c4OqlUkPLBaP3uALBeKw9zq7dETpOskhVfp76igbw5W7IbLbmmstFhIQbgdX094SNAvACeQM2-rpjky_w3A_nRyfBbbi8LJk0VirY-_EI7IdnX5RAO3On-DSU06kuYedp4NAGjMBL1LjkvScqHPZWC2GAtd8MQB0yGTC67tI4FA2VdsnWbEGQdpghrbZhwFA727780syQm6_l3-Zo9JxcSQATxxnp4FHlo_A_8tew-iVf_5OJCaR8xtXsXbXHTQTiYZLjGMZGo94PrTLoNgKb562eTsal2qLvr1IdpsDK-81sH1_UU9I9ooxq8B_10YO52-hpXyA1R-ty5boQCqb946mI7erulzCu0WxJatdJXmRvk6GdOL7a5kTiD4HSw%3D)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f5ad21eb70540358279613b3841e8a4&_e=AbPlI0D2GDjfsBVCulyBO953sp2Nh88O3s6JFR5UJADw6c4OqlUkPLBaP3uALBeKw9zq7dETpOskhVfp76igbw5W7IbLbmmstFhIQbgdX094SNAvACeQM2-rpjky_w3A_nRyfBbbi8LJk0VirY-_EI7IdnX5RAO3On-DSU06kuYedp4NAGjMBL1LjkvScqHPZWC2GAtd8MQB0yGTC67tI4FA2VdsnWbEGQdpghrbZhwFA727780syQm6_l3-Zo9Ju4KthNxT5yp0-UbUwecT_DxgSzFNk_RikrLwyhZsRf4qx7j6VVTPjUyXVzwxbcSIF08fbGgcIQ6j2MyNqL9mfxKlstg8DZ94-_ktpZM54109nkd0pRqPHLYt1htFe7Yru3eUue0xnFf6GxuHuXETSRsSZyGsaSgsRG7063e2VMI%3D)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop Formosa Plastics plant
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039048?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop Formosa Plastics from building a TOXIC PLANT in Cancer Alley! ** We are in a plastics crisis, Friend. Our oceans are becoming overrun with plastic debris and it’s **killing over a million sea animals each year.** Meanwhile, the plastics factories producing the products that are invading our oceans spew toxic pollution into our communities. In Louisiana, there’s a stretch of **more than 200 petrochemical plants** and refineries. The communities here face so much pollution and negative health effects that the region is nicknamed Cancer Alley. Now, Formosa Plastics is trying to build another petrochemical plant here. The people in Cancer Alley cannot afford more pollution. Our oceans cannot afford more plastic debris. [**Please, Friend, send a message to President Biden telling him to REVOKE Formosa’s permit to build their mega-polluting plant in Cancer Alley!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039049?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039050?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Formosa Plastics is responsible for several past environmental disasters. In 2016, one of its plants in Vietnam released toxic chemicals into the sea and devastated the lives of **more than 4 MILLION Vietnamese residents.** In Texas, it **illegally released BILLIONS of plastic pellets** into local waterways for years.
Despite these past failures, Formosa still has permission to build this new plant in Louisiana. **They are taking advantage of the fossil fuel infrastructure in Cancer Alley to make more single-use plastics here since they are banned in Taiwan, where Formosa itself is headquartered.** President Biden should not allow a company with such a horrible track record to operate in our country, let alone Cancer Alley! [**Will you tell President Biden to fight the plastics pollution crisis by 11:59pm TONIGHT**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039051?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)[**?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039051?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039052?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paloma Henriques
Senior petrochemical campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12873ddc53724def9c3c0c210a3e9de8&_e=gXqnQV1hbn9Dyrw3h2iPLTHYu4hPiDe3bRTS-mjkPIU9F1PpCTavfm303hl09XwIqojj-5_PFGi6IwXUU07eW8GvdzPDfTSGc_bV4FWqPNyLPLJ9oLgfgkryBBNd3CaPu_sMjKEwbAMU36NJPLr3yyAtofwO7mAVGW4MRfz9Wegm2_i_Ry0E-AzgfJy0Ighm235CsH3zfbJzsqjbvdR5iJ_GulNQSGzmqW5W-i2ejkHLV4kjR-OpP_KjbYsx5fU8ntJerzlLslRbhifuh6167lILI_9VH_Ojbz9BV6UMbrSuG8-rclw66mXLJfgjRQRPAAqGbjex66w4wAlL_robYnds67aivwbcNeRlP_9O17aYgWxMqmlpH3Pb2fSCn-n8MozMyVhrV6fM_9TYp1Le2odA_8Y83ZRxqjVy0Egh-gI%3D)

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12873ddc53724def9c3c0c210a3e9de8&_e=gXqnQV1hbn9Dyrw3h2iPLTHYu4hPiDe3bRTS-mjkPIU9F1PpCTavfm303hl09XwIqojj-5_PFGi6IwXUU07eW8GvdzPDfTSGc_bV4FWqPNyLPLJ9oLgfgkryBBNd3CaPu_sMjKEwbAMU36NJPLr3yyAtofwO7mAVGW4MRfz9Wegm2_i_Ry0E-AzgfJy0Ighm235CsH3zfbJzsqjbvdR5iJ_GulNQSGzmqW5W-i2ejkHLV4kjR-OpP_KjbYsx5fU8T2sfPbW5_RE7MHrkUNgzrS2hCkH6gRg1AIlb3sEWTVpxLRaFrdzMjovis2-FRtgfb0n-vmcMc6meDwb6bHtOzGVTpTkgZ4MhG4c-b28_y64BBmHbrKdxHfRkwLYRejX08t6fQ-2QH_U6DeEDcizDlX4DVxMvRV0mJT6CozysSH8%3D)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Colin Allred
subject: I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol:
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d5a75a4-ecf9-48b7-9257-9dad80058167/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d171d7f-b80e-4159-b887-49e6afa5a6ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I thought my days of putting people on the ground were over when I left the NFL. Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Will you donate now to me and Blue Amp Actin to help build our grassroots movement and defeat Ted Cruz once and for all? Any amount you can spare is truly appreciated. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a2dc003-925b-4e97-9ab2-1d907f32b330/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T598b2269-9e90-4f31-bce7-64209f67b70e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: Fellow Democrat Shreds Squad's Response To Shocking Terror Attack
body:
[](http://as.adsoniris.com/click/2/8123/188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb/55707?segment=55707)[ ](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**[Fellow Democrat Shreds Squad's Response To Shocking Terror Attack](http://trk.secureandprosper.)** Israel is at war.
