name: Ron DeSantis
subject: My mission: stop the invasion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
It's happening right here, right now, and it’s time for us to stop the invasion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zisucddbo969hljkauet6dfdl1ri5qs6ekvglva0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm2pb4cth2bs)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zal0j5q4v53lgt2j1ces7airs255tok7cke4u2e8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm2pb4cth2bs)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgfho7r06s96absajt3tcqq492mfnr9oquebcrk0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm2pb4cth2bs)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z60pndnvmvo5m4oi9debu3nl7459mt4jbaqp7dso_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm2pb4cth2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj951obanbo30fqhptpd6lv3as7fvnr9gdp09to8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm2pb4cth2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdt3nbntdvuc0qijmentf79ejkmgn3h6n64dddio_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm2pb4cth2bs)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: Joe Biden has failed to meet his mere basic responsibility.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Joe Biden’s administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqqqlb3ng1ou8o122muq8jtjts2j5176avh3hc48_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmaob2c3h2bs)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zksbudtgfakgqkpr138cdlh4v47aev7rg0i5v1c0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmaob2c3h2bs)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z65iknq0cv6lckb6690mkc032frkdihesbsnp5co_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmaob2c3h2bs)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4gclcdtpouke9u1nfups01dojkohueplt6d1hj8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmaob2c3h2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zspe0ulbmercsbcq78q3kfa848ft7ns4nsa52t0g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmaob2c3h2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfso7rhda2l4o375568e156422cnqq8cf7es7jho_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmaob2c3h2bs)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The end to Biden’s border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
It's happening right here, right now, and it’s time for us to stop the invasion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvvsqbnl1ptjibl42fiuqcjhpvup97g5qv640amo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm6pj4clh2bs)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0o4dc1v804ouhhgv9kujd63o7vac08bc038jhcg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm6pj4clh2bs)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhmu6g2k0n0ovcv8334ma3uvuit1pm02snj3rnv8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm6pj4clh2bs)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zma786inl4g7o4tr4ac11ef5f6p61v768bmpmfkg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm6pj4clh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk4id1sa6c93l24005v70hjhbkdhp98foh7pprhg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm6pj4clh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqc6goog243c4a63ld8dl1bbndc60vf8br61k91o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm6pj4clh2bs)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

body:

Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.

Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bfce4c61b83f485aa9799f213f1915d8&_e=48DWnCt49rGboqymPTuCxUia4aFHlTJoyb6dotaHNiVSqfYFodXgMEoUI2xutjak1s1XyX6dV-5PYCQrEZfbqxGZYzVSsjqMMXpbCYjVmaCxes1leIShJQOinrmIJw_njypyTMHXHdKmBmXn71jeX1IBy5D_-4T9htEJgE0EJfU0HklnAxKMiyt-IAb2_mzfnREni6sWiK-Cg85k1tWVbUyOJFpLUHwk5v4nzdvBy3rT75V2cV74ft4zTG8ZBddeNrI1uhTAoxNUpwBknetki0uvc6Uh7FmIKr2sNrD-hzi1txd5VBO5ueycJZ3gToGw3ZzII3B0LdLFreK5phFvyQ5S11-w4Jbcdh3H50uK8hEucqO78fc_zsvoJM7e9vWgLg84zQGryMYLCWp2yzfcbqwnzNCxTBoQOLOJbyUGlN4%3D)

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bfce4c61b83f485aa9799f213f1915d8&_e=48DWnCt49rGboqymPTuCxUia4aFHlTJoyb6dotaHNiVSqfYFodXgMEoUI2xutjak1s1XyX6dV-5PYCQrEZfbqxGZYzVSsjqMMXpbCYjVmaCxes1leIShJQOinrmIJw_njypyTMHXHdKmBmXn71jeX1IBy5D_-4T9htEJgE0EJfU0HklnAxKMiyt-IAb2_mzfnREni6sWiK-Cg85k1tWVbUyOJFpLUHwk5v4nzdvBy3rT75V2cV74ft4zTG8ZBdde5Cpa77EW3levCe6-nZJ3sOKSdAv4pPNQPjfR0KZn1BmeHyBhC0g9Mfc7Etcn_t1ZYeh8nMlfOOQd9UQ_G6JpG5IVtHhHoliBkJUAIGEExSk-6c5FYibNjNhYPbHfxEsiEhgWUxrh10Hj_XysIp3RVYsYsmtkkchhPnH03qMn0sA%3D)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: My how-to on fixing the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Joe Biden’s administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zagf8ph6tp0cav1basv7a0oh0fkek143ip0i5kjo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmeoj6cjh2bs)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z13sg25dqs3cu8nmbl7jt5el2ksj2qtjkihsv70g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmeoj6cjh2bs)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqkabo8eg5kibggb8ptjricm1k09qgj528khb3f8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmeoj6cjh2bs)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9k9damott4rv6179r3is22mo3d5j2v6uftcs0p0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmeoj6cjh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp455mpkve1g8l2s0qa608f2l6tpmfolqg2topt8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmeoj6cjh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt1b9e7vjtficfeb4u6h4hubl12ntpij02mt067o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hmeoj6cjh2bs)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: My how-to on fixing the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7031d18e6a3e4d44b8ec40f526bc98c5&_e=hzqrlD23h3gJIkdgqhI-kZIKrsjFGbxmPCVcJWwez8_R4QxJwjkVcmgvB_vQS4-lmtN_zLJBDG_PDEneiqQbRJ5fZ6CMzHdfqRJTto6Ltfy4HIqtl5TW5LqS7Nz2RXz0IvyL_nFiTyH63NQ2nv_gjsGd-EKfZKd3EJ1HcqEKgdzD1Ekri6mSoZw1Jauz8sjq-CcZhahniM6P7T6VJ8HyjO-IcgYHq5-cO18b-y1Fu9RUvBe79G9MdU0q_r_8G17GEqmC0hjFVoHPH0Oj8yoOX2emI6ywS1UUDKuAJG2QjJMoNpc1ryf8wA1ns6Xetiv97_tOgLErB5llM3-3ZRFtGAl1hzMA6Sj4aCwn8icHcLKmT_gRDNb0nGZcpYrWWUtICHAUAasUXbSZX7xQf2nzrpxFqmtoMyOFqkjjxafPBTI%3D)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7031d18e6a3e4d44b8ec40f526bc98c5&_e=hzqrlD23h3gJIkdgqhI-kZIKrsjFGbxmPCVcJWwez8_R4QxJwjkVcmgvB_vQS4-lmtN_zLJBDG_PDEneiqQbRJ5fZ6CMzHdfqRJTto6Ltfy4HIqtl5TW5LqS7Nz2RXz0IvyL_nFiTyH63NQ2nv_gjsGd-EKfZKd3EJ1HcqEKgdzD1Ekri6mSoZw1Jauz8sjq-CcZhahniM6P7T6VJ8HyjO-IcgYHq5-cO18b-y1Fu9RUvBe79G9MdU0q_r_8G17Go8w8iUh8NN_T7QEBPnyTYV6ZSTZZjgO5AEWmTSxGk0mstKWdFAfhCl1Phtva1GjjQFHdCamJyzu82yguq-633AQ3h_omppl27zdmOw06ayDarLPlA5CNmFARmvswVncCb4t09KfF5nVzs2TLkigDExSRSKSVPnEbJiOdn4eq5iY%3D)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7031d18e6a3e4d44b8ec40f526bc98c5&_e=hzqrlD23h3gJIkdgqhI-kZIKrsjFGbxmPCVcJWwez8_R4QxJwjkVcmgvB_vQS4-lmtN_zLJBDG_PDEneiqQbRJ5fZ6CMzHdfqRJTto6Ltfy4HIqtl5TW5LqS7Nz2RXz0IvyL_nFiTyH63NQ2nv_gjsGd-EKfZKd3EJ1HcqEKgdzD1Ekri6mSoZw1Jauz8sjq-CcZhahniM6P7T6VJ8HyjO-IcgYHq5-cO18b-y1Fu9RUvBe79G9MdU0q_r_8G17GcT1H_EhfPw8vTxfm5oqH5CqI89ntWqRwimwEtBrdiYJ4I0LQn36TV2ootYyMedYZYhtQG7DrmDpVVHNxYBCpMSJOZsJJXwuWYIxjpCISWuZ2khDZZhRt-6qgRRT2oBgCVfusoqnw_3EJzYe154h1wE_olV6WkPZA6-l7SQUh4bE%3D)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7031d18e6a3e4d44b8ec40f526bc98c5&_e=hzqrlD23h3gJIkdgqhI-kZIKrsjFGbxmPCVcJWwez8_R4QxJwjkVcmgvB_vQS4-lmtN_zLJBDG_PDEneiqQbRJ5fZ6CMzHdfqRJTto6Ltfy4HIqtl5TW5LqS7Nz2RXz0IvyL_nFiTyH63NQ2nv_gjsGd-EKfZKd3EJ1HcqEKgdzD1Ekri6mSoZw1Jauz8sjq-CcZhahniM6P7T6VJ8HyjO-IcgYHq5-cO18b-y1Fu9RUvBe79G9MdU0q_r_8G17GjERovVv16_-CCW9CwYnu869XjcG-POLmOu63zbMci7dRKousCgzsjYOdJMtoZXexeGJKqU-5WKg8jocbkzDspCZOL4y_mu6QtloTxNKBvRzmd53Uht-HqhtbGHe_9boX8CuWJ-TaHi-1mp6161juMHAAjhyYNBU3iQGbt2uytfU%3D)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7031d18e6a3e4d44b8ec40f526bc98c5&_e=hzqrlD23h3gJIkdgqhI-kZIKrsjFGbxmPCVcJWwez8_R4QxJwjkVcmgvB_vQS4-lmtN_zLJBDG_PDEneiqQbRJ5fZ6CMzHdfqRJTto6Ltfy4HIqtl5TW5LqS7Nz2RXz0IvyL_nFiTyH63NQ2nv_gjsGd-EKfZKd3EJ1HcqEKgdzD1Ekri6mSoZw1Jauz8sjq-CcZhahniM6P7T6VJ8HyjO-IcgYHq5-cO18b-y1Fu9RUvBe79G9MdU0q_r_8G17GMZGFXAiIpfOORCh5aepbjs4B2QzUR2YpitTHE79MHbadM-l09KiWlCej1RIN9yLqkoaX1seKDqGiZXKkPyGCg0Txq4F3qpI9WhyZkwqqYmrC0B2r_XtUzKukZEafDyF5QDbDwy_MadFgt_25IW1qKM_wxU_hS7hvmZj8ytRr4uY%3D)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7031d18e6a3e4d44b8ec40f526bc98c5&_e=hzqrlD23h3gJIkdgqhI-kZIKrsjFGbxmPCVcJWwez8_R4QxJwjkVcmgvB_vQS4-lmtN_zLJBDG_PDEneiqQbRJ5fZ6CMzHdfqRJTto6Ltfy4HIqtl5TW5LqS7Nz2RXz0IvyL_nFiTyH63NQ2nv_gjsGd-EKfZKd3EJ1HcqEKgdzD1Ekri6mSoZw1Jauz8sjq-CcZhahniM6P7T6VJ8HyjO-IcgYHq5-cO18b-y1Fu9RUvBe79G9MdU0q_r_8G17G9JCxwEY-LqRU8yvfTKuVi6tHwWHHKZ3uVav9PkOla3Ugdh5IYaBSqFOpScrm-3cMHtX1HdYNTVYMZTq7BI6rVu1zjwtcCbpRqI-7ytYfYmevvJUH9npHZ7GAGBYw1RWAeSrlnVWxwT5rNN9VP9rjXMTAgin2jtUq7_T88fZzwwY%3D)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: SECURE THE BORDER
subject: We can’t trust Joe Biden to do it...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, When Joe Biden and Kamala Harris took their oaths of office, they promised to protect and defend our great nation.

_But right now, they’re doing NOTHING to keep Americans safe from one of the biggest dangers our country is facing..._

**...ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION.**

Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the rest of the Democrats are letting drugs, weapons, and criminals _pour_ into our country through the Southern border.

They won’t take a stand to keep our country safe - **but I know patriots like YOU will.**

**We need every patriot to take a stand to BUILD THE WALL now before our border is gone for good.**

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: My how-to on fixing the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Joe Biden’s administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24888%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ji7igROfEFAhVARtCvSnUA&sysid=1)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you’re with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24889%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LWqtwAKRXqUx9RxZ8iRY%2fg&sysid=1)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden’s administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it’s not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it’s time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I’m asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24880%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HsWrQp89RQcGY75lRKxCmg&sysid=1)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24888%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ji7igROfEFAhVARtCvSnUA&sysid=1)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24888%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ji7igROfEFAhVARtCvSnUA&sysid=1)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24888%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ji7igROfEFAhVARtCvSnUA&sysid=1)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: My mission: stop the invasion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
It's happening right here, right now, and it’s time for us to stop the invasion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn94f3ai5fam8940i0av5ak6hj37r850672ttk9g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm9p74c5h2bs)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znl2adumeb8jo0csbgkv29dcal8d6k9jngahm39g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm9p74c5h2bs)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5d1skp5cns1aung895kft1e4hvqp2urbb926flg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm9p74c5h2bs)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4bev8ujaa7npg31erglq20j0k3lp65r8qilu70g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm9p74c5h2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmkrmj9rcrun3e060qhkocssrurc2q3dfdfp6tog_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm9p74c5h2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za18586c8i2bum9sk0pqtkja0fntgcgnobbo2t4g_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3hm9p74c5h2bs)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

body:
The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

|
---
# **Financial Freedom in America**
# **will soon be gone!**

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.** On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the **'digital dollar'.** They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo. **And you should be scared!** The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. They'll be able to....
* **Know what's in your accounts and what you buy**
* **Limit what you purchase and the causes you support**
* **Take everything away with the click of a button**

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Indigenous People’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71225726/431553939/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDEwNTdjNC1hMzY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Z5XN7fUZO6RnafbT-FuVmIg3s15C07brT9plEU4AfI=&emci=baed93fe-c962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d01057c4-a366-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) Happy Indigenous People’s Day! In 2021, President Joe Biden issued the first-ever presidential proclamation of Indigenous Peoples’ Day to celebrate the culture and history of Indigenous communities — and recognize the suffering endured by our country's first inhabitants. The original inhabitants of what is now Pennsylvania included the Lenape, or Delaware, tribe and the Susquehannock tribe – two names you may know from two beautiful counties in our commonwealth! Most Native Americans were forced to leave Pennsylvania during the 1700s, when eastern tribes were being displaced by colonial expansion. Our country was conceived on a promise of equality and opportunity for all people — a promise that we have never fully lived up to. That is especially true when it comes to upholding the rights and dignity of Indigenous peoples. Today is a reminder that we can do better. We can be better. We must reflect on what can often be a dark past, and then continue to work towards a brighter future for our country. Thank you, Eugene
---

Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7dfdf4aca6c64993ba9a6f342943f838&_e=t8Ucomtu_JkQI5zMMYtP63kKJDU0JI6EE7TpxwqWj07ymVfGS8hTjqnPZvLwI3Q_DZ129j7j-ShDW8uH7fCLlkIB362QMN5rylQDcsgFM1baBJBsvP3d2IS3tBljcHMhwklKl8LG8qxc6Hsk6y1zjfrl425F20jTtIbytHz3WKyEXuTv0QDRmB2UgOrcWVHQ0HX31hV9Oz0haNvWMAuPMiODUTxPJHaUzfI-tcoW7g3qXjfowfzy2tqgm3tp8GB2P37vQqc7jUu6-OkgyPhLlbbUIlTbPKCqVTLyzr9giKhRxN9TR426ZNCUHKoL3ppSImxO_c35R9aMzz040v38_f3fi3zQcsIQhJlMg4KhpmfbalwRS_K49V0hUQaFr0EJ4vMC88F9whhuNcggYzi1Na60TeejuIs340Zg7OOQeNw%3D)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7dfdf4aca6c64993ba9a6f342943f838&_e=t8Ucomtu_JkQI5zMMYtP63kKJDU0JI6EE7TpxwqWj07ymVfGS8hTjqnPZvLwI3Q_DZ129j7j-ShDW8uH7fCLlkIB362QMN5rylQDcsgFM1baBJBsvP3d2IS3tBljcHMhwklKl8LG8qxc6Hsk6y1zjfrl425F20jTtIbytHz3WKyEXuTv0QDRmB2UgOrcWVHQ0HX31hV9Oz0haNvWMAuPMiODUTxPJHaUzfI-tcoW7g3qXjfowfzy2tqgm3tp8GB2sH9I-T5SpKFA0quh3GhtifG3_SLKZ4lv123KwUUikiVnKGJIZUN6eQhAi_q3YUHzVj6_A-RV1wN5opoF5rTbd1-8QAN6OTASXBZRVs8CoAhNRGcN433AZknaZwJiTNIItCTb6XqQ-hqvdw8W9YKUjHXd_8uLhYQvv5_GBmP4DRI%3D)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

name: Team Kaiman
subject: REMINDER: Women for Kaiman Luncheon this Wednesday
body:
Reminder: Women for Kaiman Fundraiser
Dear Peter,
This Wednesday, October 11th is ur Women for Kaiman luncheon with special guest former Nassau County Executive Laura Curran.
Please click here to register today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/womenforkaiman]
It's more important now than ever to gather, organize, and discuss how we can develop solutions from the local level. This event will be a celebration of Long Island's trailblazing women, as well as an enjoyable luncheon and lively political discussion.
We hope to see you there.
Regards,
Team Kaiman
Click here to join us [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/womenforkaiman]

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: Joe Biden has failed to meet his mere basic responsibility.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Joe Biden’s administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9nsi39k573c9dsmga1qj69bidf097t51h9gukr8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm0o76cjh2bs)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you're with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjn6onfs0kg33vt02l68k51k12i4gapq6orce4i8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm0o76cjh2bs)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden 's administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it 's not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it's time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I 'm asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb6pf1ju0g56nk8kmefp2krrf7ms3a0ab9h3k6ro_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm0o76cjh2bs)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoch2epquptfn5fd06780agj181ve81aer3veld0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm0o76cjh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6oetp3f1a6mio4kc0aae5jbt7bj5df39f8a0reg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm0o76cjh2bs)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztl2fq4v39norcsg0aqabf6rmfrl58aqt7humu2o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm0o76cjh2bs)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

I am so proud to join all Marylanders in honoring the culture, traditions, and history of Indigenous Peoples in our state and across the country. Their tribes and nations have contributed so much to our state’s multicultural identity. We recognize Native Americans as the first people of this nation and celebrate their invaluable contributions. Peter, today, and every day, we must acknowledge our history and work towards uplifting Native American voices and communities. I’m proud of our Native communities here in Maryland. [**_So please, sign our card celebrating the culture and contributions of Indigenous communities here in Maryland._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71226770/431555787/1989678544?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGIwZmI5YS1hNDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIzPRa2fNbXfYNjR9KusRvKhXgpBwKrzf_ajVakKl8k=&emci=7a659136-8064-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d4b0fb9a-a466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160) | [Sign the Card ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71226773/431555791/1989678544?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGIwZmI5YS1hNDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIzPRa2fNbXfYNjR9KusRvKhXgpBwKrzf_ajVakKl8k=&emci=7a659136-8064-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d4b0fb9a-a466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)

David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support. | David Trone for Maryland P.O. Box 83998 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998 United States | mailto:info@davidtrone.com Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.

body:

Friend, I need your immediate attention. **I was ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs** _****_**for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight** _**.**_ I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. **We’re finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and** [**I’m asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7snb2jpinaonutn2n4govjgs0qtpq1i0pv6jnig_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm8p36cth2bs)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The end to Biden’s border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
It's happening right here, right now, and it’s time for us to stop the invasion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679385%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=guLe8sIbgsj0rQiKX1p%2fXg&sysid=1)
---
Friend, Joe Biden has failed to meet the most basic responsibility of ensuring the territorial integrity of our country. His gross dereliction of duty has left the southern border in shambles. Consider this a 13-month warning. No excuses. If you’re with me, _**please support my campaign today with an immediate donation. Our official countdown to stopping the invasion starts NOW.**_
---
| | [STOP THE INVASION: TAP HERE TO SEND IN $25](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679386%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JIGIEVheL%2bGaa2Q4WbdLEg&sysid=1)
---
Make no mistake: **Joe Biden’s administration has made the most inhumane policy choice possible on the border.** Dangling jobs to migrants as a reward here in the United States, so long as they are willing to bring an unrelated minor child along with them, should be something out of a dystopian novel. _**But it’s not.**_ It's happening right here, right now, and it’s time for us to stop the invasion.

_**We WILL save our country, SECURE OUR BORDER, and STOP THE INVASION. If you can afford to make a financial contribution, I’m asking for your help to support our mission.**_ With the tap of a button, you could make an immediate difference in this race and this crisis.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679387%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rtd7Z6MTpUwvbnw%2bEqyLoQ&sysid=1)
---
If elected your President, I PROMISE you, we will build the wall, shut down our border, authorize deadly force, and stop the invasion for good. And you can tell by my record: you can take every one of my promises to the bank. In Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679385%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=guLe8sIbgsj0rQiKX1p%2fXg&sysid=1)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679385%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=guLe8sIbgsj0rQiKX1p%2fXg&sysid=1)
---
Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679385%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=guLe8sIbgsj0rQiKX1p%2fXg&sysid=1)
---
On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
| PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

---

American Update

name: Tim Sanchez for Congress
subject: Help me make history for CA-12
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Sanchez For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo]
Friend,
If I’m elected to represent California’s 12th district, I’ll be the first Latino elected to Congress from the entire Bay Area!
You read that right: despite the size of the Latino community here and the generations of Latinos who have called this community home, I would be the first to represent us in Congress.
That’s why this race means so much to me.
As the dad of three kids, I am constantly reminded why it’s so important to create a better future for our children. This district deserves high-quality education, economic opportunity, accessible health care, and affordable housing. And as a veteran, I am committed to protecting our democracy from any threats that come our way. Because this campaign is about making a difference for every one of our families, our neighbors, and our community.
I’m ready to win, but I need you with me.
Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can today and help us establish the infrastructure we need to win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_welcomewebsitesignups_c]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_welcomewebsitesignups_c [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_welcomewebsitesignups_c]
The most impactful thing you can do right now is chip in a few dollars to help us build the program we need to win.
So, folks, can I count on you to chip in today, so I can follow through on my mission to fight for you and your family? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_welcomewebsitesignups_c]
I can’t do this without you, team.
Thank you so much,
Tim
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footer-w [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footer-w] Tim Sanchez is running to represent California’s 12th Congressional District.
As a Proud son of East Oakland, a dedicated father, and a proud veteran, he knows firsthand the challenges that working families in the East Bay face. He is ready to deliver progress for all of us and continue the tradition of progressive leadership of doing what’s right – even if that means being the lone voice.
...And he’s ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footer-w]

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: I wanted to personally share this with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=%2BgFHaPEQM9PCwSLd0WDjO%2BEoZv%2BC69rG2bBrctrkn2iO54m91Kc0CEQcireD%2BAQ8PQToxuzoieF3fF5lXwb8JDG50B9L4SG7xqgtvFX0b%2F%2FVQQ5VovyaNQ89jPdKV%2BflryY%2BRPFJyCgehK8At5IfwFOpEUywLImLKtxJ%2Bfj8dda9HQNKEHuDDPooC2nW6bHi5dtBWIe1SeJHjhT%2FD%2B9CXtvturPqfBQrFmjyorOtBywQ6S04tEc0n2Mu4irYg5J1VCDXa6MLQoN5%2FttTowcqgdO0GZ%2FBnW6ic98A4lvmLzw6PS5yngN29gK7%2Fzh3GVxvhI%2BhK3RkYkXoMgZlh%2FymFk6I5l40mUMPbiUqi3dR5IUbpaYVfSOT5WthWKBOH0MP8Ct55dZ3XzdtVfj938Lx8KibJ0%2Fso%2FtcjjFZj7FWZPM%3D)
---
| | Saludos, it’s Gabe. In honor of Indigenous Peoples’ Day today, I wanted to reach out personally to share with you the important work my office is doing for our sovereign nations.

In Congress, I’m privileged to represent seven federally recognized tribes in NM-02, including the Acoma, Isleta, Laguna, and Zuni Pueblos, along with Mescalero, Ft. Sill Apache, and the Navajo Nation. I am committed to championing tribal sovereignty and upholding the government-to-government relationship between tribal leaders and the federal government.

Additionally, I am working to ensure the United States upholds its trust and responsibility to Indian Country by respecting its sovereignty, funding the Indian Health Service, and protecting Native lands, water, and sacred resources.

**Supporting Tribal Education** – I introduced the Parity for Tribal Educators Act which would provide federal retirement benefits to teachers at Tribally-controlled schools, putting them on equal footing as BIE teachers and helping solve the teacher shortage in Indian Country.

**Carcieri Fix** – I am a cosponsor of the bipartisan H.R. 1208, which ensures that existing tribal lands will continue to be held in trust by the federal government, reaffirms the authority of the Secretary of the Interior to take land into trust for Indian Tribes, and removes the uncertainty and ambiguities inherent within the _Carcieri v. Salazar_ opinion.

**Advanced Appropriations** – I am an original cosponsor of the bipartisan Indian Programs Advance Appropriations Act which would ensure sustained and secure funding for critical federal programs used by Indian Country.

**Health Care** – I am a cosponsor of the bipartisan Special Diabetes Program for Indians Reauthorization Act, which would support one of the most successful federal programs for improving health outcomes in Indian County.

**Native Veterans** – I am a cosponsor of the bipartisan Tribal HUD-VASH Act which would help reduce native veteran homelessness by codifying the vital program that helps connect tribal veterans with housing and casework support.

**Water Rights** – I am fighting for New Mexico’s Pueblos as an original cosponsor of the Rio San Jose and Rio Jemez Water Settlements Act, which would support these tribes’ water rights in New Mexico.

**Indian Child Welfare Act** – I am a cosponsor of the bipartisan Strengthen Tribal Families Act, which would help uphold the Indian Child Welfare Act and keep native children within their communities.

I will never stop striving to protect Tribes and Pueblos in Congress. I extend my sincerest thanks to you for allowing me the privilege of representing our first Americans, our sovereign nations.

Gracias, and I wish you a wonderful celebration of Indigenous Peoples’ Day today.

Gabe
---
* * *
| KEEP GABE IN CONGRESS

Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people.

Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.

clean_body: You spoke. I listened. Now let’s appoint a Speaker who listens to the people.| | | | | Patriot, I asked patriots like YOU to take my survey on who should be the next Speaker of the House. While I was certainly flattered that so many of you wanted me to serve as Speaker (wouldn’t that be interesting?), it was abundantly clear that the NUMBER ONE answer given was Jim Jordan. So, I did what I always do, and listened to the people, and endorsed Jim Jordan for Speaker of the House. And, of course, when I am officially inaugurated as your 47th President of the United States, I will need a great patriot Speaker of the House. We need a great patriot, Jim Jordan, as speaker who will defund the weaponization of our justice system, issue subpoenas, hold Joe Biden accountable for his crimes and corruption, stop the release and resettlement of illegal aliens into your communities, and stand up to the Radical Left Communists who are destroying this country. Beginning on January 20, 2025, our movement of patriots, working with loyal allies of our America First cause, will save our country and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.
