subject: The American Safety Fund
body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s time for America to WIN the war on the Mexican cartels once and for all.

Too many border towns have fallen. Too many drugs have flooded our country. Too many Americans have died.

**It’s time to use the intelligence resources of the greatest military on Earth to take down the cartels who are trying to take down us.**

**I’m starting the _American Safety Fund_ to fuel our mission, and I need EVERY patriot to do their part now.**

From American gangs with ties south of the border to drugs that make their way to our streets, these thugs are bringing their violence right to America.

**And if you mess with Americans, we’re going to come for you.**

It’s time to keep our streets safe, and that starts with attacking the problem at its source: the cartels who want to destroy us.

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s time for America to WIN the war on the Mexican cartels once and for all. Too many border towns have fallen. Too many drugs have flooded our country. Too many Americans have died. It’s time to use the intelligence resources of the greatest military on Earth to take down the cartels who are trying to take down us. I’m starting the American Safety Fund to fuel our mission, and I need EVERY patriot to do their part now. Peter, the terror of the cartels doesn’t stop at the border. From American gangs with ties south of the border to drugs that make their way to our streets, these thugs are bringing their violence right to America. And if you mess with Americans, we’re going to come for you. It’s time to keep our streets safe, and that starts with attacking the problem at its source: the cartels who want to destroy us. | | De Oppresso Liber, Col. name: Conor O'Callaghan
subject: Happy Indigenous People’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conor for AZ
body:
A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://action.conorforaz.com/p/pKfVwCqeNUy4NM7F4Jx-eQ2?unsubscribedata=2LjaZISOQmaF6YYPkfnDnUdcfMElwyOD70eJ9ioPKbhLv7RuTHbduQrbmpUDg7f%2By60SXVgaPBs9Hd8zRcJKPK%2BI3vcUK5%2B8X6T%2FSeH9BdHthrNI1MxY77JeDkxZ47fVqgHhBmUNKI4E8ukIZ3BEd72K5Rw1i3E7L5NuwQcvWJDnswCnuGtN8IGhJImE2TuHugHAvnwCCIW77tqYVdCeul3arVv%2B2FNVAsgLlbeDVrUR3Kgea%2BQ03cJdWL57X4qMf4%2FuLtdE41U%2FpMDuuAqmIGAEDFNYJYTO9%2B8d5RgSUysxEZ88W7L%2FDcbJV30la6UYy2RARCP7P07pO%2BmSY4CVElY6aBg3zMW%2F6caUXNW0MswgJexWemkt6Z6QQdHvy2Psjcid10rHbaeKkSamAr7hEXACJI0kHC8G2VID40GwhNRYH1197S9cUq3kKzMStPVF)
---
| |
---
Happy Monday, Peter —

Today is Indigenous Peoples’ Day and Arizona is home to 22 sovereign tribes.

Today and every day, we recognize that these lands belonged to those sovereign tribes and peoples long before many of us made Arizona our home.

I grew up in Arizona and my wife and I decided to raise our three boys here. I truly believe that part of what makes Arizona such a beautiful place to raise a family is the diversity of languages, cultures, and rich histories that the 22 tribes bring to our communities.

As an Arizonan and as a candidate for Congress, I promise to be a leader who stands against anti-indigenous hate, who respects tribal sovereignty, and who protects our state’s sacred natural resources.

I commit myself to championing the rich culture and diversity of our state while uplifting all Arizonans, regardless of tribe, race, religion, or socioeconomic status.

Join me in Celebrating Indigenous Peoples' Day,

Conor

P.S. If you want to learn more about Arizona’s sovereign tribes, you can [click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71235752/431571896/87508068?source=CO_EM_ENG_100823_IPD_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU3ZmY2OWItYWE2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_fI3fvjfwB1A_bwSvmhj0W9d2vEAJCanSl7Lv54_QIQ=&emci=4df48c7b-3c66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=257ff69b-aa66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7520491)

clean_body: A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Happy Monday, Peter — Today is Indigenous Peoples’ Day and Arizona is home to 22 sovereign tribes. Today and every day, we recognize that these lands belonged to those sovereign tribes and peoples long before many of us made Arizona our home. I grew up in Arizona and my wife and I decided to raise our three boys here. I truly believe that part of what makes Arizona such a beautiful place to raise a family is the diversity of languages, cultures, and rich histories that the 22 tribes bring to our communities. As an Arizonan and as a candidate for Congress, I promise to be a leader who stands against anti-indigenous hate, who respects tribal sovereignty, and who protects our state’s sacred natural resources. I commit myself to championing the rich culture and diversity of our state while uplifting all Arizonans, regardless of tribe, race, religion, or socioeconomic status. Join me in Celebrating Indigenous Peoples' Day, Conor P.S. If you want to learn more about Arizona’s sovereign tribes, you can | | | ---|---|--- = As a proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is wholeheartedly committed to enshrining Roe v. Wade into law, safeguarding our communities against gun violence, addressing the urgent challenges posed by climate change and our water crisis, and ensuring that everyone contributes their equitable share in taxes. It's time for a new, forward-thinking direction.** | = = Paid for by Conor for AZ Conor for AZ P.O. Box 13304 Scottsdale, AZ 85267-3304 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Freedom Virginia
subject: Celebrating Indigenous People's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
Today is Indigenous People’s Day, a holiday recognized each year on the second Monday of October to honor the Indigenous population of the United States. In Virginia, there are over nine recognized Indigenous tribes including the Pamunkey, Chickahominy, Rappahanock, and Nansemond tribes. Formally recognized for the first time in 2021, Indigenous People’s Day has been recognized in various states throughout the U.S. since 1989.
Indigenous People’s Day is a day of remembrance, and celebration of the history of Indigenous peoples. Access to healthcare has been a struggle faced by the Indigenous community for far too long. Around the world Indigenous populations face greater health disparities than White populations.
At Freedom Virginia we are committed to making sure all people have access to healthcare. We stand with the Indigenous community in our Commonwealth, and join them in their fight for recognition and equity in the U.S. healthcare system.
Make a pledge today to help us in our efforts to make healthcare more accessible for ALL. [https://secure.everyaction.com/jy4adpIbsU6fxmH_AMxA3g2?contactdata=yeliEqkz4qeDFm+JIH0NR05JAVNHFjqN+ChPU/vDL71rMOAidwBWZ7kBqqvexQwh1ReY1aNQ+imyx4G8GacsYqXeAiPRHpo6BvFngz3/Wd5Zdkiq5rF3rn8lwlILB6A56dSOGhW5ewQ/OfLJjdlKiNGQDOvpmHVPvOXi2kQNu2agUAOPx58x7mjPj+pyc7lA]

Thank you,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: Israel Under Fire: The Truth Behind Hamas' Attack 🔥
body:
NEW for dpwillis67@gmail.com - seeing the end times prophecy? | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4fc7876562&e=567664f14c)

We don’t want to sugarcoat [**Episode 42**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9703ab7d0c&e=567664f14c).

It will be difficult to listen to and watch but we ask that you walk with us down the the road of what **Israel is facing thanks to the unprovoked attack by Hamas**. It affects us all and the No Doubt About It Podcast covers the impacts that will last years to come.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=59449229d2&e=567664f14c)

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6e92a10bde&e=567664f14c)
* [Apple Podcasts](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ed81859b74&e=567664f14c)
* [Spotify](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=eb93af612a&e=567664f14c)
* [YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=85f983d27a&e=567664f14c)

In this episode, we confront the harrowing reality of recent events in Israel, where Hamas terrorists carried out a devastating attack, resulting in the loss of 700 lives, most of whom were women and children. There is no justification for such violence, and we explore Israel's rightful response to this unprovoked act of terror. We believe it is crucial to discuss these grave matters openly.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=75c2edc01b&e=567664f14c)
We also delve into the spiritual implications of these events here in the United States. How far should we go to protect Israel from the threats posed by surrounding terrorists? To shed light on this complex issue, we are joined by Pastor Nate Heitzig from Calvary Church, who offers his insights on the matter, including whether these events could be connected to end times prophecy.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=66425d6c62&e=567664f14c)

To listen to this eye-opening episode, please visit your favorite podcast platform and search for "No Doubt About It Podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti." Don't forget to hit the like button, subscribe, and share your thoughts with us. You can also watch the episode on our YouTube channel.
| [WATCH on YOUTUBE](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=dfbd9c094a&e=567664f14c)

|
---

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

name: John Eastman
subject: Prosecuted for giving President Trump Legal Advice....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC
body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

| | | |
---
|
| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr4j6dvj13rsj1brqiqf5hhus4eh0jbpgm2qh37o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**
| | **[DONATE $15](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z76spiu7em4puk53hik4rqcscv4ru82om9e62pjg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
---
**[DONATE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdng0bef42hihj3tj93164hvlegkucetro76hngg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[DONATE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9prf68b1fb3lg1qsom8v84ds0gsevkh3f9tkpv0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[DONATE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5e0aeljpo0c6s85riv5d4or07jkd0earjmjlncg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[DONATE $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlhi7oh9vbdgr71cg6b2ldlijrpit9gtke0hk1dg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[DONATE $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvuqqci3a1cll4e0s73fbeb5onlohre8cnk2k3mg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[DONATE $1,000 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7futovshbo2h18f8n0r6udbsc6ma19vbm77gr10_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
| | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z20r6015f6lrjtnr9t5rvlu9q870gn2u2tv9b638_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)
These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.
[Help Me Fight These False Charges](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztlns8bd0iiaibe2noiomomnt85dnenpvjp84gi8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)
So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3k4uknco00lvjcl3neorf44asu5307bpclfiorg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)
As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will **[have my back](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb8b6cqfm8ks9jphelcvnnafkta5id0cp8haqrng_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**. The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help.
| | **[I'll help by donating $15](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkusjq7ha5okgd8it31mu5k9f31ent96v2bblkj8_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
---
**[I'll help by donating $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8vtioqjibu69pt4hr5c9m4eb2v5m3or356fkfco_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z86nlcgclnuep2o57f8nmkbpfqabfp11u7kr4q0o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[l'll help by donating $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn7sgnsf1mu2n6m51ldp9569usb6641ik1s1g67o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0g4ob6rju27112khafv95uf57t7e6rep05i9988_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrg54m6uanpmjs39erpe5r97epo1do9tq0ftpln0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $1,000 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbu1c8r6kb2tqi0uscuan4sh1bgk7e54ajok34ao_rp22sh2s8i66p73c3jm2ob2c9h2bs)**
| | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers.
---
| | | Sincerely,
---
John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump
P.S. Contributions to my legal defense fund are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231009_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20272%2E4449941%2ELiy5ic)

Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231009_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20272%2E4449941%2ELiy5ic)**
[Sign my name now: Abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231009_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20272%2E4449941%2ELiy5ic)
---
Don’t forget to hit submit to record your signature. Thank you,

-Fight For Reform

Teammates — We’re officially just 29 days out until Election Day – not ours, but local ones right here in Bucks County. The Central Bucks School Board race in particular is critical. Right now, the current board has been overtaken by culture war extremists who waste our money. So far they have:
* Imposed book bans to silence educators and censor LGBTQ+ and Black stories
* Wasted taxpayer money – $15,000 a month!! – on a PR firm to spin their now unpopular image

**That’s why we’re teaming up with Neighbors United to mobilize PA voters and elect commonsense candidates who will focus on improving our schools, not culture wars.** [**We need to reach every voter in Bucks County in the next 29 days to finally end this madness. Will you help by splitting a donation between Ashley’s campaign and Neighbors United?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71238850/431583515/1455254928?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231009_ta_onemonth_team_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk4YjYzZS1hZTY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cqpGLicmdMjru0-bbbTEVAZ2Wv_btMrIzR95v1-JqiU=) | [Split $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71238851/431583521/1455254928?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231009_ta_onemonth_team_mf_30da_xx_sbt&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzk4YjYzZS1hZTY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cqpGLicmdMjru0-bbbTEVAZ2Wv_btMrIzR95v1-JqiU=)

name: David Hogg
subject: BINGO: Biden just delivered for young Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.

---
| I’m (almost) at a loss for words sharing this announcement with you, Peter:

**President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.**

This win couldn’t have happened without the non-stop work of young leaders and activists across the country, including everyone at March For Our Lives. After four long years of protests, registering thousands of young voters, meeting after meeting, and MANY Zoom calls...we did it!!!

I’ll share more about the work young leaders did to get us to this point, but first: [_**Please split a donation of $5 today between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress PAC to help carry this momentum forward and elect the leaders we deserve.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71239746/431586991/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231009-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMmY3Mzg4LWFmNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xja91ZnFvUHSz6kk4uRq-ExFoozTqdKhSeofQaWemDQ=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71239747/431586992/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231009-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMmY3Mzg4LWFmNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xja91ZnFvUHSz6kk4uRq-ExFoozTqdKhSeofQaWemDQ=)
---
**Here’s why we can draw a direct line from our work to the Biden administration’s new Office of Gun Violence Prevention, Peter.

When we talk about electing the “leaders we deserve,” we’re talking about folks like Maxwell Frost, one of our Advisory Board members and the first Gen-Z Member of Congress.**

Maxwell served as the first National Organizing Director for March For Our Lives and really helped us level-up our organizing work, especially on behalf of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. We did everything from asking presidential candidates about opening that department if they were elected at our 2020 Gun Safety Forum to sleeping on an office floor in the Virginia House of Delegates to ensure we were able to lobby on behalf of gun violence prevention, while armed white supremacists pointed guns at them through windows.

The very first bill he introduced on the House floor was to establish a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Republicans blocked it, but he didn’t give up, and neither did we. Even when it became clear that NRA-sponsored politicians weren’t going to let his bill pass, President Biden stepped in. In fact, Vice President Kamala Harris introduced Maxwell at the official announcement of the Office of GVP, and Maxwell got to introduce President Biden!!

**And when we talk about leveraging the power of the youth vote, we’re talking about years of record-breaking youth voting turnout that led us to this announcement.**

In the last five years, we went from having the most pro-NRA president in American history to the most pro-gun safety president in American history. Young people were critical in electing Biden.

Our voices and votes matter. But we need to elect more young people to make sure we build power on the inside and outside of politics.

[_**Help us carry this momentum and get more life-saving sh*t done by splitting a donation of $5 between Fight for Progress PAC and Leaders We Deserve.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71239748/431586993/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231009-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMmY3Mzg4LWFmNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xja91ZnFvUHSz6kk4uRq-ExFoozTqdKhSeofQaWemDQ=)

We should celebrate this momentous victory, Peter — but it doesn’t mean we can slow down or stop anytime soon.

There is still so much work to be done, from tackling the climate crisis to expanding abortion access to building a country that isn’t run by the rich and powerful few.

There is a long road ahead of us, and we need your help if we’re going to score more wins, elect more young people to office, and stop the fascist takeover of our country.

[_**If you’re celebrating this victory, but are ready for the important work ahead, please split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress PAC to help fund our work.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71239749/431586994/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231009-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMmY3Mzg4LWFmNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xja91ZnFvUHSz6kk4uRq-ExFoozTqdKhSeofQaWemDQ=)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71239750/431586995/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231009-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMmY3Mzg4LWFmNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xja91ZnFvUHSz6kk4uRq-ExFoozTqdKhSeofQaWemDQ=)

clean_body: President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. | I’m (almost) at a loss for words sharing this announcement with you, Peter: President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. This win couldn’t have happened without the non-stop work of young leaders and activists across the country, including everyone at March For Our Lives. After four long years of protests, registering thousands of young voters, meeting after meeting, and MANY Zoom calls...we did it!!! I’ll share more about the work young leaders did to get us to this point, but first: = | = Here’s why we can draw a direct line from our work to the Biden administration’s new Office of Gun Violence Prevention, Peter. When we talk about electing the “leaders we deserve,” we’re talking about folks like Maxwell Frost, one of our Advisory Board members and the first Gen-Z Member of Congress. Maxwell served as the first National Organizing Director for March For Our Lives and really helped us level-up our organizing work, especially on behalf of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. We did everything from asking presidential candidates about opening that department if they were elected at our 2020 Gun Safety Forum to sleeping on an office floor in the Virginia House of Delegates to ensure we were able to lobby on behalf of gun violence prevention, while armed white supremacists pointed guns at them through windows. The very first bill he introduced on the House floor was to establish a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Republicans blocked it, but he didn’t give up, and neither did we. Even when it became clear that NRA-sponsored politicians weren’t going to let his bill pass, President Biden stepped in. In fact, Vice President Kamala Harris introduced Maxwell at the official announcement of the Office of GVP, and Maxwell got to introduce President Biden!! And when we talk about leveraging the power of the youth vote, we’re talking about years of record-breaking youth voting turnout that led us to this announcement. In the last five years, we went from having the most pro-NRA president in American history to the most pro-gun safety president in American history. Young people were critical in electing Biden. Our voices and votes matter. But we need to elect more young people to make sure we build power on the inside and outside of politics. = We should celebrate this momentous victory, Peter — but it doesn’t mean we can slow down or stop anytime soon. There is still so much work to be done, from tackling the climate crisis to expanding abortion access to building a country that isn’t run by the rich and powerful few. There is a long road ahead of us, and we need your help if we’re going to score more wins, elect more young people to office, and stop the fascist takeover of our country. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Peter. Together, we will keep making the progress we deserve. David Hogg P.S. Me when we finally get the Office of Gun Violence Prevention 👇😊 = * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because polls show President Biden statistically tied with Donald Trump -- but we’re _still_ missing your response to our presidential approval poll!

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s _**critical**_ that we have accurate data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

Unfortunately, we’re still 43 answers short in Pennsylvania, and without your response, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll to take on the GOP!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

Today, we celebrate Christopher Columbus and his brave crew of explorers for their historic journey to the New World in 1492. Their expedition changed the course of human history, marking the beginning of 500 years of immigration to the New World and ultimately leading to the establishment of the United States of America.
Today is also a day to recognize the special impact Italian-Americans have had, and continue to have, on American history, society, and culture. From the signing of the Declaration of Independence to the present day, the Italian-American community has been woven into the very fabric of our country.
Sadly, in recent years, radical leftist elements of the Democratic Party have sought to destroy the legacy of Christopher Columbus and, by extension, attack the dignity and esteem of Italian-Americans across the United States. We have seen monuments defaced, statues decapitated and toppled, and outright lies introduced into school curriculums by far-left activists. Meanwhile, this violence and historical revisionism have been condoned or even outright encouraged by radicals like AOC and Mondaire Jones.
As your representative, Mike Lawler has led the fight against the far-left’s efforts to deny Italian-Americans their rightful place in history and to destroy our cherished memorials. However, he cannot do it alone.
Democrats have publicly declared that Mike Lawler is one of their top targets in 2024 and plan on spending millions of dollars to attack and unseat him. If they are successful, rest assured that they will continue their campaign of destruction, insults, and injury toward the Italian-American community. We cannot allow that to happen.

clean_body: | | | | Today we cherish our great history Happy Columbus Day, Peter! Today, we celebrate Christopher Columbus and his brave crew of explorers for their historic journey to the New World in 1492. Their expedition changed the course of human history, marking the beginning of 500 years of immigration to the New World and ultimately leading to the establishment of the United States of America. Today is also a day to recognize the special impact Italian-Americans have had, and continue to have, on American history, society, and culture. From the signing of the Declaration of Independence to the present day, the Italian-American community has been woven into the very fabric of our country. Sadly, in recent years, radical leftist elements of the Democratic Party have sought to destroy the legacy of Christopher Columbus and, by extension, attack the dignity and esteem of Italian-Americans across the United States. We have seen monuments defaced, statues decapitated and toppled, and outright lies introduced into school curriculums by far-left activists. Meanwhile, this violence and historical revisionism have been condoned or even outright encouraged by radicals like AOC and Mondaire Jones. As your representative, Mike Lawler has led the fight against the far-left’s efforts to deny Italian-Americans their rightful place in history and to destroy our cherished memorials. However, he cannot do it alone. Democrats have publicly declared that Mike Lawler is one of their top targets in 2024 and plan on spending millions of dollars to attack and unseat him. If they are successful, rest assured that they will continue their campaign of destruction, insults, and injury toward the Italian-American community. We cannot allow that to happen. | | | Thank you, Team Lawler | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==

clean_body: | | | Fellow conservative, the election for Governor is NEXT MONTH and we need YOUR help! There are two very clear pathways that we can take... The first pathway is a world where our taxes are lowered, our gas prices are cut, and a world where you can afford to put food on the table for your children who come home after learning what kids SHOULD be learning about at school! The second pathway is a world where our taxes are raised, our gas prices are doubled, our grocery bills become unaffordable, and our kids get indoctrinated by their teachers about gender-changing and affirming surgeries as early as preschool. The first pathway is achieved by reelecting Tate Reeves, a real Republican leader! The second pathway is the world we will live in if Democrat Brandon Presley is elected. Mississippi will become another project state for liberals to ruin just as they have with others across the country. Unfortunately, we are hearing the Democrats are raising RECORD AMOUNTS of money from socialist billionaires like George Soros! If we don’t seriously increase our fundraising numbers ASAP, that horrifying world led by the Democrats becomes very likely in Mississippi. Thank You, Mississippi Republicans | | Paid for by the Mississippi Republican Party | |

| Greetings!
I hope this message finds you well. With only 32 days left until Election Day, I wanted to share some exciting updates from our campaign. Firstly, my mission to protect Suffolk's quality of life and go after criminals has earned me the endorsement of law enforcement.

| And in light of my unwavering commitment to preserving our drinking water, Utility Workers Local 393 - representing the hard working men and women of the Suffolk County Water Authority - has also endorsed my campaign.

| There's less than 32 days until Election Day and we're at a pivotal moment.

body:
Native Americans deserve recognition, rights, and representation.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71242658/431597651/-849459103?refcode=ea.0d5f0088-b466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0d5f0088-b466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDVmMDA4OC1iNDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ws9ist6mxaE3ICzA5KOZvJ5ESkv_8PmiHhI5m-tl7rA=&emci=444e6771-5b64-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=0d5f0088-b466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
Today, on Indigenous Peoples’ Day, I want to take a moment to recognize Native peoples in Tennessee and across the country, including the Cherokee, Chickasaw, Shawnee, and Yuchi people whose traditional homelands include parts of Tennessee. The strength and resilience of America’s Native people are extraordinary. Even after so many broken promises, so many treaties ignored, and so much prejudice, Native communities continue to thrive. But it doesn’t make up for it. Native Americans in every state, including here in Tennessee, deserve to have recognition, rights, and representation. America must keep its promises. As Tennessee’s next Senator, I’ll collaborate with Native communities to better understand your needs and I’ll work to deliver the rights Native Americans in Tennessee deserve. Thank you, Gloria [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71242659/431597653/-849459103?refcode=ea.0d5f0088-b466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0d5f0088-b466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDVmMDA4OC1iNDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ws9ist6mxaE3ICzA5KOZvJ5ESkv_8PmiHhI5m-tl7rA=&emci=444e6771-5b64-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=0d5f0088-b466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)

name: Sharice Davids
subject: What today means to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Today is Indigenous Peoples' Day and I wanted to take some time to tell you what that means to me.

In Congress, we currently have representation from Alaska Natives and Native Americans for the first time. I am Ho-Chunk from Wisconsin and I am honored to be one of the first two Native American women ever to serve in Congress.

Being one of the first Native American women in Congress, I know the importance of representation in Congress. For most of my life I have seen Native people mostly depicted and discussed in a historical context. But we are still here and we are not just vague figures in history. Tribal communities and Native people exist with the same complexities, issues, and successes that so many others experience. It is profound to acknowledge and celebrate our achievements and lives in a modern context as well.

There is still more work to be done around issues like climate change impacting tribal communities, violence against Native women, and high tribal poverty rates. But with the 118th Congress being among the most diverse in our nation’s history, we will continue to bring these issues to light.

Today, we celebrate our Native communities and Indigenous peoples’ significant additions to our country, while continuing our commitment to ensuring equality and representation for all.

Thank you,

Sharice Davids
---

clean_body: To help us turn out as many voters as possible in the home stretch! Peter, As of today, we’re now 5 DAYS OUT from the Louisiana primary! My team is laser-focused on turning out voters across the state, but we’re still short of our voter outreach goal — = = = Look, I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: We’ve only gotten this far because of YOUR support, Peter. When I asked you to help us launch our campaign off the ground, you and thousands of others came together and helped us build a campaign of, by, and for working Louisianans. Now, with 5 days to go until the Louisiana primary, I’m asking you to chip in just $5 to help us turn out every possible voter in this critical election — and I hope I can still count on your support. = = = Thank you so much! \- Shawn Wilson = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Our email program is an important way to reach our valued supporters, and this email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please . If you would like to stop receiving emails from our campaign, please .

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Introducing the GIFFORDS Champion Award!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This new award will spotlight up-and-coming candidates for elected office across the country who have made preventing gun violence their top priority.
#

Hi there, we have some exciting news to share:
We just launched the GIFFORDS Champion Award! This new award will spotlight up-and-coming candidates for elected office across the country who have made preventing gun violence their top priority. Candidates who are selected for this distinction will receive substantial support for their campaigns.
The only way we were able to create this award is through the generosity of members of the GIFFORDS PAC community who donate to emails like these.
[**Will you please make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to keep fueling our work to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231009-1-15&t=1&akid=6696%2E3935704%2ECgzpz7)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-oct23.j_Pk1L&amount=3&t=20&akid=6696%2E3935704%2ECgzpz7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-oct23.5GTc41&refcode=em231009-1-15&t=21&akid=6696%2E3935704%2ECgzpz7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-oct23.J3PYP5&refcode=em231009-1-15&t=22&akid=6696%2E3935704%2ECgzpz7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-oct23.PzDy9Y&refcode=em231009-1-15&t=23&akid=6696%2E3935704%2ECgzpz7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-oct23.NeOOAa&refcode=em231009-1-15&t=24&akid=6696%2E3935704%2ECgzpz7)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-oct23.j_Pk1L&refcode=em231009-1-15&t=25&akid=6696%2E3935704%2ECgzpz7)**
---
****
Thank you. We’re thrilled to be launching this new award to provide extra support to candidates dedicated to protecting our communities safe from gun violence.
\- The team at GIFFORDS PAC
* * *
_If you have a candidate you’d like to nominate for the GIFFORDS Champion Award,[**please click here to fill out our nomination form!**](https://go.giffords.org/go/45765?t=26&akid=6696%2E3935704%2ECgzpz7) The deadline to submit your nomination is October 25, 2023._

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=6696%2E3935704%2ECgzpz7) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: LTC(R) Christian Castelli
subject: America is Vulnerable
body:
[](https://castellifornc.com)

Dear Peter,
Evil still exists. Freedom is still under attack. Our enemies still hate America and American values.
We cannot become passive; we must remain vigilant.
_I 'm Christian Castelli. My military service includes, 22 years as a soldier and Green Beret, decorated combat veteran, and senior advisor at The Pentagon._
Now more than ever, we need experienced, tested, and proven conservative leaders serving us in Congress representing our interests at home and abroad.
That's why I am running for Congress. I will bring unique, tested experience, and conservative leadership to meet our challenges.
[](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)
The cowardly attack masterminded by Iran and carried out by Hamas on Israel killed more than a thousand innocent lives and took both Israeli and American hostages. It is clear we are vulnerable abroad.
However, our exposed southern border has been an invitation for terrorist cells to cross and set up operation in our homeland. We must close our borders if we do not want our schools, shopping centers, churches, synagogues, and government institutions attacked. And, we must be vigilant here and now against just such a possibility.
I served five tours in Afghanistan, and one in Somalia. I've seen terrorists operate up close. I had the distinction and honor to study terrorism at the Harvard Kennedy School alongside Israeli military and intelligence officers. They are my friends. This is personal to me.
Make no mistake, Joe Biden's weak leadership on Iran and botched Afghanistan withdrawal spawned this aggression. Joe Biden's awful border security policy leaves America's borders wide open to terrorists to bring their carnage into our homeland.
**Join me. Keep an eye out for your neighbors, friends and family. And, let 's vote out Joe Biden and the Democrats who support his dangerous policies. **
**Please make a donation today of $250, $100, $50, $25, or whatever you can contribute today.**
[](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)
Pray for our ally, Israel, and for our Jewish brothers and sisters around the world and here at home.
R. Christian Castelli
Lieutenant Colonel (Retired)
U.S. Army Special Forces
Republican Candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives
(336) 810-8100
[castellifornc.com](http://castellifornc.com)
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **colonel@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=fa2ec61b-6ed9-4aae-b0de-117a851953f3).

I won’t give up fighting for YOU and the American Dream.
| [](https://links.ciscomaniforarizona.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=eafe68d896cf44079c3bd44783e2bba0&_e=8_lHvWNaRzBNRQVsxdLmhLyFKsOk5cJp16WBMk5KjWewics73Gxm_aaNcQUvwW3k3vcNZsf8kkjqiULw_jrInxezYxb5YigU0tWpUBiLVmjK2W30CMIJo_pf_7UYZqdBaM0euwN_fwbe9q1U3F2VuGHRSxuLXQPSqBxZ_Ee4XS1JfXtb6zW51AE4P9THmSSdW1WoIS3Mjh14SI_EbEI5XzBDbAHeKg0J4oliNwnyDgA_U2NbAWgCaDmEo7zKwVgCXDlf0W1oPNniH1m3gPMng5KEm0wGziyrVCSuQH-SBN9AT0UzhpINsfmoxHNFi1ECADWVnU9i06-7XaBQkLktlGLjeo8zcIS_y86qeldp3GDy_4b2GuGjX28HpoQhQFuZ11kSVBufcQxPPQuU0Pp8fy2eocKzegdTxqyTjZ2GIZ7_Yz17TIouAhhm5KFe5IPjxj-6aiAEbC812Ki-nwm-5A%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
You sent me to Congress to fight on your behalf, to defend the American Dream, and to ensure a brighter future ahead.
---
And after recent events in Washington that were meant to distract from the real problems facing this country, I can promise you I’m more dedicated to this fight than ever before.
---
**I’m not distracted and won’t get caught up in these political games but will continue working for YOU and this country in Congress.**
---
_**But Democrats are already exploiting what’s happening in Washington, thinking it gives them the opportunity to FLIP this all-important seat.**_
---
_They are trying to capitalize on these recent events by renewing their attacks against me._
---
_But grassroots like you won’t let them get away with this._
---
With your continued support, we will show the Left we are more determined than ever before to continue the fight for the American Dream and won’t back down no matter what they throw at us.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to stand with me against the radical Left’s attacks to defend this all-important seat and continue the fight for the American Dream.**](https://links.ciscomaniforarizona.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=eafe68d896cf44079c3bd44783e2bba0&_e=8_lHvWNaRzBNRQVsxdLmhLyFKsOk5cJp16WBMk5KjWewics73Gxm_aaNcQUvwW3k3vcNZsf8kkjqiULw_jrInxezYxb5YigU0tWpUBiLVmjK2W30CMIJo_pf_7UYZqdBaM0euwN_fwbe9q1U3F2VuGHRSxuLXQPSqBxZ_Ee4XS1JfXtb6zW51AE4P9THmSSdW1WoIS3Mjh14SI_EbEI5XzBDbAHeKg0J4oliNwnyDgA_U2NbAWgCaDmEo7zKwVgCXDlf0W1oPNniH1m3gPMng5KEm0wGziyrVCSuQH-SBN9AT0UzhpINsfmoxHNFi1ECdYAYOk0zh-BxUXmrBAt_KBIUz-4X2QMotCZcuXk865DteosfxtagekTdNRQSuMYUNnbde87Gpkt7NaIy_mmkS0Autd-llc5XJ3Gv5FEL_ojaZVAAxcNHme8nLwn0O-XwHGLZBzE2AlL_amyKFt0Tmg%3D%3D)

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Will you please endorse Ruben Gallego for Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
As you read this, we're asking hundreds of thousands of people a critically important question:
#

Peter -
As you read this, we're asking hundreds of thousands of people a critically important question:
Can Ruben Gallego count on your personal endorsement in his campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona?
Tomorrow night, Kari Lake is going to officially launch her campaign. She'll do it with the likely support of Trump and the MAGA-right.
So today, we want to ask you an important question: will you stand with Ruben Gallego and add your name as a personal endorser of his campaign?
It's a small and simple action, but it sends a very powerful message about the size and strength of our grassroots campaign. And that's critically important -- especially as we try to convince national Democrats to endorse Ruben as well.
What do you say?
[**Please use this link to add your name and say you endorse Ruben Gallego in his campaign for United States Senate in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_oct23/?source=em231009&refcode2=1317.734936.fCcH-K&akid=1317%2E734936%2EfCcH-K)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_oct23/?source=em231009&refcode2=1317.734936.fCcH-K&akid=1317%2E734936%2EfCcH-K)
It'll be great for Ruben to see your name on the list of endorsers. Thank you in advance for saying you're in.
Ruben Gallego for Senate

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/website-endorse_copy/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=1317%2E734936%2EfCcH-K). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1317%2E734936%2EfCcH-K). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1317_734936_fCcH-K&akid=1317%2E734936%2EfCcH-K)

**_There 's been a lot of turmoil in Washington D.C. lately, especially in the House Chamber. _**

So, I wanted to reach out and make sure we're on the same page.

I want you to know: **I 'm laser-focused on serving the people and getting the hard work done (saving America from the Left). With roughly 35 days left to fund the government, we have a LOT of work to do.**

My message here is short and sweet: Republicans must unite, quickly elect a speaker, and recognize that our fight for fiscal responsibility & border security are with Schumer's Senate and the White House, not each other!

**[If you agree with me, click here to support my commonsense, conservative campaign for Congress.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=5d0361ef2ee94ee88104fb4c9a204416&_e=z7va1JlSdXy-e29lSX83oHv980gsru9QEBWsgCrSpF0MEjqG7eViL9JW3hnoHoPTduZVOJICPMXUQJ6yKAqgPFzZoC2jDd5Iv4LL9Yafx0ob8DXC1AQ7kcMpZFCvzrhmSkfR5YINhkW3SrwOtxqcea3_W9cwHeqfUhOoESGQ3EtTzzuaF_o2cACECLXktnbyZh3M-tszwnf2USKV20vEO13zV70fhe7qQKdn5m7sTmduGAxyJ-ZaNo2JGtoh16tx8IrmdpwSl_haWY8UvPXvckqE--759eAZQpCXZ6ZCY99d6Kkzn-Jot1lvv0xG-jFS)** I'm fighting to save NY-11, protect the House Majority, and STOP lying liberals from ruining our country for good... but first, let's fund the freaking government.

It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.

Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. | | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d229134f4a0d4c49b58b62ddca4a8883&_e=NAqPHI9XsxQFezoSxLVLWiwhz-AiTuA90QP89r2v1VtbUXddoy1rNoIUkcDsBTw-5YtkzcvHFmuex4yydKcL9NuzGxB3VRKGE_q_JAZPJ50J6VIL0ioIhMeJOcdZBT9wOONHZiN0yayiqGkAomN13kjCBBc-qgn0gYfJ9l0Rw-U5AQa9HrWE9nXVbuJPjBqROQmJCwk4giGcuL1bFpoZifm5omCHc21tkxIX6foeitAlvgtiZ8iO-QT2HRCZy7RUoyiWLIZegmkBRztOYPQHG1Z8ZLsdyaNf63BcLvZFnqhHtAlY2_yFGMESMfey_uR4jXEbUOwdKyqZHGK_8zU80Q%3D%3D)
These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.
[Help Me Fight These False Charges](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d229134f4a0d4c49b58b62ddca4a8883&_e=NAqPHI9XsxQFezoSxLVLWiwhz-AiTuA90QP89r2v1VtbUXddoy1rNoIUkcDsBTw-5YtkzcvHFmuex4yydKcL9NuzGxB3VRKGE_q_JAZPJ50J6VIL0ioIhMeJOcdZBT9wOONHZiN0yayiqGkAomN13kjCBBc-qgn0gYfJ9l0Rw-U5AQa9HrWE9nXVbuJPjBqRAzMLy_KjT3MRl6JnddD2rPAQqfnUT8HQ03NcTZudreNQQGgTaaG91VJ_GU3kjmEZBE2mOMUifdJccwuN9UsFLQho-LmFeZxo-NFoOKU1lAspzek-hPXHV3o_69qGdW3ogRkktjroQvY2iAiwgOYAIg%3D%3D)
So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d229134f4a0d4c49b58b62ddca4a8883&_e=NAqPHI9XsxQFezoSxLVLWiwhz-AiTuA90QP89r2v1VtbUXddoy1rNoIUkcDsBTw-5YtkzcvHFmuex4yydKcL9NuzGxB3VRKGE_q_JAZPJ50J6VIL0ioIhMeJOcdZBT9wOONHZiN0yayiqGkAomN13kjCBBc-qgn0gYfJ9l0Rw-U5AQa9HrWE9nXVbuJPjBqRN12rafJetb4rXobRLAuH_Mqxsg4UhtDqXlhmjPwTgED86bgQcTMShnpDULYsH6FixuTbZx8buzyBP3pZ019kEiP2aI3VGO3zXk1URtdGsrvGX-H8GI1QpTbHQe-5SbQBLyS63YU2XqQ0u_T5sq4LrA%3D%3D)
As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will **[have my back](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d229134f4a0d4c49b58b62ddca4a8883&_e=NAqPHI9XsxQFezoSxLVLWiwhz-AiTuA90QP89r2v1VtbUXddoy1rNoIUkcDsBTw-5YtkzcvHFmuex4yydKcL9NuzGxB3VRKGE_q_JAZPJ50J6VIL0ioIhMeJOcdZBT9wOONHZiN0yayiqGkAomN13kjCBBc-qgn0gYfJ9l0Rw-U5AQa9HrWE9nXVbuJPjBqRP2HpoBj_Zo_PupdS7aS2SRZ165nBmwLE_5glpatr03dQ_BCveL8rxZuu3N11XjkLzy-O93tv-nIo7tFlfEW-wH4n-93RORO3c0frk_iPPv0Eh-FNTq0xWQ9PKN_K0souUSOxAxWQyvCgDsAeidLrPQ%3D%3D)**. clean_body: The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. | | | | *|ARCHIVE| | | |ARCHIVE| | |ARCHIVE| | | Dear Friend, | | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer. This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC. | | | | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020. These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia. So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family. As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will . The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help. | | | | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers. | | | Sincerely, John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump P.S. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: A Call to Speak Up for Biblical Truth
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._GYQ)
---
Fellow American We're living in a pivotal time. In many ways we are witnessing the dystopian nightmare of a culture moving further from Jesus -- not closer to Jesus. **_As believers in Biblical truth, we need to speak up to current Western civilization and all of humanity!_** To help equip Pastors and congregations to put our Christian faith into action, TPUSA Faith hosts **_Freedom Night in America_**. Through this monthly series, a guest speaker joins me to engage in discussions around topics such as sexuality, gender, and family life. **[Freedom Night in America is on a mission to strengthen the church and fight for liberty - which is God's idea, not man's idea. Will you support our Freedom Night series with your gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or $500 today?](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**
---
[Support Freedom Night in America ](http://trk.secureandprosper._iELw)
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
**_God's Word is the ultimate truth._** But radicals who bow at the altar of "wokeism" disagree. Gov. Gavin Newsome may soon sign legislation that would allow the government to take children away from parents who oppose their "gender transition." Congregants at the Cathedral of Hope Protestant Church in Dallas, TX were led in a prayer pledging allegiance to drag queens and the LGBTQ+ movement. This is blasphemy. **But there is hope!** Thousands of American churches are aligned with TPUSA Faith's mission to restore Biblical values, but they currently lack both engagement and opportunities to make a positive political and cultural change in our nation. **[Your gift of $35 or more will support TPUSA Faith in securing speakers for Freedom Night in America who stand for Biblical truth and will empower Pastors and churches to put their faith into action.](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.-zn4YDHaG7w)
---
Christians founded this country, Fellow American. Fifty-five of the 56 signers of the Declaration of Independence were Bible-believing, church-attending Christians. They applied biblical principles and wisdom in the founding of our great nation, and for nearly 250 years, our country has experienced the blessings of liberty in abundance. But today, those biblical principles are under constant attack by decadent, humanistic, and amoral movements -- and if we don't defend the foundational truths that have made our nation great, we're going to reap the consequences. As the inheritors of the Founding Fathers' vision, it's our turn to own our faith and stand up for Biblical truth. Resistance to tyranny is Biblical, and we must speak up! **[With your generous support today, TPUSA Faith will continue reaching, engaging, and equipping Christians to share their faith and to be bold in the public arena on behalf of Biblical principles.](http://trk.secureandprosper._p4JLA)** Thank you for your support! God bless you, Charlie KirkTurning Point USA Faith
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
[Support Turning Point USA Faith](http://trk.secureandprosper._wzqBLG66Yc4LDmGYjggFA)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjgyLWY3Y2NhNDQyZTk5OTRlOTFhZTU4ZTI0OTg3OTlhZGZmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/OT5qjYn_CqGZhEz08HHmdA) to unsubscribe.

**I was just _ATTACKED_ and _BOOED_ by RINOs for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight.**

name: From the Border
subject: BOMBSHELL from Fox News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
Biden’s crew just let it slip that they’ve had 1.5 MILLION “gotaways”.

| |
---
| | | | | |
Fellow Patriot --

Have you seen the latest Fox News updates at the border?

**Biden’s crew just let it slip that they’ve had 1.5 MILLION “gotaways”** - at the same time the border is being overrun and our communities are being flooded with deadly drugs.

_How much more shameful does it get? _

Our brave Border Patrol agents risk their lives every day to keep us safe.

All while _the liberal politicians, Democrat activists, and media elites shame them and call for them to be fired._

Joe Biden has proven will do anything to destroy the BORDER WALL and abandon any border security measure. Illegal border crossings are skyrocketing.

That’s why we are asking every grassroots conservative to sign our official pledge:
|
**dpwillis67@gmail.com

Do you support America’s brave Border Patrol Agents?** **[YES, I DO ⇨](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24896%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qJe9zx%2b3%2fsA2%2ff571NKnrQ&sysid=1)**

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: Hard no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
If you’re an elected official, you should have no problem letting your constituents know where your time and attention is going.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31167%2E3422442%2E8Ho8YP)
Did you know that Katie posts all her meetings _and_ who they are with on her official website?
This shouldn't be unique, Derek—if you're an elected official, you should have no problem letting your constituents know where your time and attention is going.
But we’ve seen time and time again, from Senator Bob Menendez’s audacious corruption to the billions of dollars spent on federal lobbying each year, most leaders aren’t willing to be as transparent as Katie.
**For Katie, federal lobbyist contributions are a hard no—that’s why Katie has no problem sharing all her meetings and their attendees publicly.** Instead, we rely on grassroots contributions to power our campaign.
But in what’s shaping up to be one of the most competitive and expensive primary races in 2024, we need to continue raising serious resources to run ads and reach voters.
Since she doesn’t take any money from federal lobbyists, Katie is only able to compete because of supporters like _you_ , Derek.
[**Can you make a donation to help send Katie to the U.S. Senate today—where she’ll be a voice for families, not federal lobbyists? Whether you can afford $5, $10, or $50 today, it all adds up in a powerful way and really does make a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231009-1?refcode=EMAM09_1_TSP_20231009_V1_F&refcode2=31167_3422442_8Ho8YP&akid=31167%2E3422442%2E8Ho8YP)

clean_body: If you’re an elected official, you should have no problem letting your constituents know where your time and attention is going. Did you know that Katie posts all her meetings and who they are with on her official website? This shouldn't be unique, Derek—if you're an elected official, you should have no problem letting your constituents know where your time and attention is going. But we’ve seen time and time again, from Senator Bob Menendez’s audacious corruption to the billions of dollars spent on federal lobbying each year, most leaders aren’t willing to be as transparent as Katie. For Katie, federal lobbyist contributions are a hard no—that’s why Katie has no problem sharing all her meetings and their attendees publicly. Instead, we rely on grassroots contributions to power our campaign. But in what’s shaping up to be one of the most competitive and expensive primary races in 2024, we need to continue raising serious resources to run ads and reach voters. Since she doesn’t take any money from federal lobbyists, Katie is only able to compete because of supporters like you , Derek. Thank you! Katie Porter for California Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.
