body:
As I continue my journey across our great state, I wanted to take a moment to share with you some of the highlights from the past week.

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

I hope this message finds you well. As I continue my journey across our great state, I wanted to take a moment to share with you some of the incredible experiences and events that have taken place over the past week. It's been a whirlwind, and I'm more energized than ever about the future of Indiana.

Read on for this week's highlights!

** In the News: Lawmakers may nix the state income tax. Here’s how that could impact other taxes. (https://stateaffairs.com/indiana/taxes/indiana-personal-income-tax/?sa_signed_up=true&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

Momentum is gathering to #AxeTheTax (https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/axethetax?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZXvBz8pLYdW-S-BOEVpH3-gC31H39lQQlVNGnRX7Rx6kcsgAJI9GfLRxt66kma0WDfp4ToPKp-6-A2A1qKxPay8YiNWXvmxmAklPHS6Jn-nGQU0FfGgBH6rNELxCc4X1xWOm8BCeakDZkrcIHE8XGpjHrUsDExlHLoTQOmKxZc_SvwItDCOCSMouOKMTPFJWMo&__tn__=*NK-R&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

We need a bold leader to fight Bidenflation. Let’s work together to eliminate the individual income tax. It’s your money and, as Governor, I'll make sure you keep more of it!
https://stateaffairs.com/indiana/taxes/indiana-personal-income-tax/?sa_signed_up=true&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Read The Article (https://stateaffairs.com/indiana/taxes/indiana-personal-income-tax/?sa_signed_up=true&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** On Social: Hear from me about why I️ am running for Governor ⬇️ (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid0RN5mHyo5w8QtsHBNAz8DgqS6s5Ep8rb4ixxX3tGduoBAN3mpsFheCKdnm2R2eQpCl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid0RN5mHyo5w8QtsHBNAz8DgqS6s5Ep8rb4ixxX3tGduoBAN3mpsFheCKdnm2R2eQpCl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Website (https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

** Exploring Kokomo: Engaging with Local Leaders and Party Members
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I️ made several energizing stops around Kokomo on Tuesday! I had the pleasure of sitting down with Kokomo Mayor Tyler Moore to discuss the positive developments happening in Kokomo and the challenges they face.
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Later, I️ met with local leaders, realtors, and business owners, reaffirming my commitment to empowering local governments and fostering a thriving business ecosystem across Indiana.

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

And in the evening, I had the privilege of addressing the Howard County Republican Women's Club. Their warm reception and unwavering support are truly heartening. Together, we are writing a new chapter in Indiana's history, and I am deeply honored to be part of this journey.

** Empowering Female Business Owners
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I had the incredible opportunity to speak before a group of female business owners at The National Association of Women Business Owners F.U.E.L. event. Our discussion focused on inspiring women to participate in the political process, ensuring that their voices are heard and their businesses thrive in Indiana.

** Saturday: Celebrating Indiana Traditions
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Over the weekend, I had the pleasure of walking in the Riley Festival Parade in Greenfield, Indiana. The Riley Festival, which celebrates the birthdate of the famed "Hoosier Poet" James Whitcomb Riley, is a cherished Indiana tradition. It was heartwarming to see the support of Team Crouch and engage with the community.

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Later on Saturday, I attended and walked in the West Side Nut Club Fall Festival Parade in Evansville. This week-long gala on Franklin Street is one of the largest street festivals in the United States, attracting over 200,000 people. It was a fantastic opportunity to celebrate Indiana's rich culture and diverse communities.

** Celebrating Our 100th Endorsement!
------------------------------------------------------------
I️ am thrilled to announce that last week, we achieved a significant milestone – our 100th endorsement! This incredible achievement is a testament to the broad and diverse support we've garnered from Hoosiers across Indiana.
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Our endorsements cover over 70 counties. They come from a wide spectrum of individuals and groups, including former Congressmen, state elected officials like former Lieutenant Governor Becky Skillman and former Secretary of State Connie Lawson and more than two dozen former and state lawmakers.

Also represented in the endorsements are passionate community activists, our respected veterans and more than a dozen dedicated law enforcement professionals.

I️ want to extend my heartfelt gratitude to each and every one of you for your unwavering support. Together, we we are building a stronger Indiana, one with lower taxes, safer citizens and an improved quality of life, and we couldn't do it without you. Thank you!

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I can’t say enough good things about Lt Governor, Crouch! As a former fellow county commissioner, she’s the only candidate that truly understands local issues. Lt Governor Crouch has personally helped Montgomery County receive Grant funds for infrastructure that was directly responsible for Tempur Sealy locating in Montgomery County! Lt Governor Crouch has always been very responsive to emails and calls asking for her guidance and wisdom navigating the bureaucracy of government. Suzanne understands that investing in infrastructure, residential and workforce development is what it takes for a community to grow and prosper."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"For years, I have observed the amazing works Suzanne Crouch has performed in building Indiana's economy through her role as Lieutenant Governor. I have long been impressed by her passion for helping people with disabilities and her leadership in improving mental health programs in our state. Her plans to continue the programs that are growing our main streets and caring for our citizens make me proud to endorse her in her run for Governor."
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“As a County Commissioner, I have had the opportunity to work firsthand with Suzanne Crouch as Lt. Governor of Indiana. She has shown true leadership in her role — stepping up to assist local leaders in dealing with the problems of today. She has shown an interest in helping our citizens in bettering their lives by working together. Suzanne Crouch is the right person for the job of Governor and I support her. I am all in for Suzanne!”

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"When I was Sheriff, I met with Suzanne Crouch on several occasions. Through our conversations, I felt that she had her finger on the pulse of Indiana. I was impressed with many of her ideas for the future of our state. That's why I am supporting Crouch for Governor."

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you for being a part of this journey. Your support keeps us going, and I'm excited for the road ahead.

We're building a campaign that's centered on the values of hard work, integrity, and unity. Together, we can overcome any challenge and create a brighter future for Indiana.

Onward and upward,

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers!
------------------------------------------------------------
Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events:
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

** Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise!
------------------------------------------------------------

As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)!
SHOP (https://shop.crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
DONATE (https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4c8397d987-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_05_02_24&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4c8397d987-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Back the Blue
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._ND_IBKD8slpgK3IbaDTlA)
---
Fellow American, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our 'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://trk.readactnews.)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.readactnews.-tdVMHQ)
---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "_defund the police_." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://trk.readactnews._-vkGW1lm0WtIBqA)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.readactnews.-S8DKR0z92g)
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force._
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
_The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation._
---
**[If you 'Back the Blue' - and believe that we must support local heroes - please sign the national petition right away.](http://trk.readactnews.)** While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://trk.readactnews.-koNeyBDvkU2g)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.readactnews._K9XRfSsDBw)
---
Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyODItNTFiMDQwM2Y4ZTAwNGIyNTk0OTNjZTcxNDk3ZTRhOTUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/QVxgIZWaP7uHxhwqJE5q5Q) to unsubscribe.

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, I am so grateful for our police officers. As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "defund the police." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force. The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation. While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

subject: Join me for lunch next Monday? Come listen to Mark Mills at River Hills
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571214?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Renewable energy, we are often told, is the future.** To combat climate change, they say, we must agree to net zero carbon dioxide emissions.

**But what would this actually mean for America? **What would be the implications of forcing everyone to only drive electric vehicles? How many solar farms and wind turbines would America need if we were to replace oil and gas? **Is green energy the future, or folly?**

**Mark Mills of the Manhattan Institute is in Jackson this time next week to talk about this over lunch. **Please come and listen to him over lunch.
---
|
---
_Join Mark Mills for lunch at River Hills_
| **Lunch tickets are only $30**. As well as a great lunch at River Hills, you get to listening to one of America’s leading energy experts, and meet fellow supporters of the Mississippi Center for Public Policy.

**Book one of the last remaining tickets by clicking[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d64af5e000&e=5703353baa) now! **

name: Zak Malamed
subject: I stand with Israel.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
The videos and images out of Israel are harrowing, the fear in the voices of my Israeli family and friends is heartbreaking, and the prospects for peace have become devastatingly grim.

**I stand with Israel in its right to defend itself today and always.** **Hamas' barbarism must be put to an end.**

At this very moment, sirens are blaring, rockets are soaring towards civilian neighborhoods, and the Israeli people are battling for their lives and the livelihood of the Jewish state.

Like many people in our district, I have strong ties to Israel. My grandmother served in the Israeli military when the young state was fighting for its very survival and she always reminded us that, as Jews, we always had a safe place to call home in Israel.

Now, after Hamas launched the deadliest terrorist attack in decades, we find ourselves battling for survival yet again.

The Israeli Defense Force’s motto is “Akharai”, meaning “Follow me.” Now more than ever, America must stand beside our Israeli brothers and sisters by loudly condemning Hamas and supporting them every way we can in their fight to defend their home.

**There is no justification for their heinous extremism and Israel needs to know that we are fully behind them.**

My heart breaks for those who have lost someone dear to them or who are worried about the safety of their friends and family abroad. Here in New York, I know many of you are on edge, sick with worry, and praying for peace. I pray with you and hope we see brighter days soon.

In prayer,
Zak Malamed
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=494%2E8507%2E04frv6)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=494%2E8507%2E04frv6)

Great Neck, NY 11022

PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

# [Georgia Republicans Betray Their Voters](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=137712584&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NzEyNTg0LCJpYXQiOjE2OTY4NzAwMjEsImV4cCI6MTY5OTQ2MjAyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WcBlNyvhZIKOhPyVojO6EL0ad_mXlOQ_cveJycTJUXQ)
### Freedom Caucus Vice Chair Sen. Colton Moore kicked out of the caucus
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/1f96988d-b6bd-415e-b15a-e4753e2186bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Oct 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1f96988d-b6bd-415e-b15a-e4753e2186bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=137712584&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3NzEyNTg0LCJpYXQiOjE2OTY4NzAwMjEsImV4cCI6MTY5OTQ2MjAyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WcBlNyvhZIKOhPyVojO6EL0ad_mXlOQ_cveJycTJUXQ)
---
| | [](https://substack..NZyAqu3SCfEPQrinpRRsYRpDydhXfLEBYWh5EK8FrQA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/georgia-republicans-betray-their?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Friends,
State Freedom Caucus members continue to get punished by their Establishment colleagues. Recall that the entire South Carolina Freedom Caucus was booted out of the party earlier this year because they had the nerve to fight big government Republicans in Columbia.
Now, Georgia State Sen. Colton Moore, the Vice Chair of the GAFC, was kicked out of the Senate GOP caucus last week. His crime? [Pushing](https://substack.com/redirect/43356214-bc6b-4e22-b7d3-8468a1b2c709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for a special session of the legislature to investigate corrupt Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis, who weaponized her office with a shame prosecution of President Trump.
The RINOs in the Georgia Senate released a statement saying that he caused "unnecessary tension and hostility" by simply calling for an investigation. They are perfectly fine with allowing Fani Willis to commit election interference against Joe Biden's leading political opponent in the 2024 election, but take exception when a member of their caucus wants to do something about it.
This situation perfectly exemplifies why State Freedom Caucuses are so crucial. In many Republican-dominated states like Georgia, your GOP representatives don't represent the conservative base in the way that they should. If you ask any citizen in Georgia if they want their tax dollars funding the office of a weaponized prosecutor, most would undoubtedly say no.
Sen. Moore isn't going away any time soon. In fact, he is now calling for primaries against all of his big government Republican colleagues so conservative Georgians can get representation that actually reflects their interests.
WATCH:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0cf71f41-a336-4569-b847-c303fb5a6d67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**IL Freedom Caucus Fights Back Against EV Cronyism**
You would think that it would be out of the question for states to allow Chinese companies to build multi-billion dollar manufacturing plants with massive taxpayer subsidies, right?
Well, Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker recently - and unilaterally - approved a $2 billion plant for Chinese electric vehicle battery maker Gotion. The left-wing rush to convert Americans to EVs has led them to be totally okay with CCP subsidiaries gaining a foothold in the United States.
Not only did Pritzker approve the project, but Gotion is going to get massive tax benefits from the state in order to do it. The company will receive hundreds of millions in Illinois subsidies and then BILLIONS in federal subsidies. It's fully unacceptable and the Illinois Freedom Caucus is fighting back.
On Monday, the ILFC held a massive rally outside the proposed site for the plant. You can watch the full rally [here](https://substack.com/redirect/976776cc-2c68-4434-8403-5fa50cfdd717?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The good news is that this is not a done deal. The local community in Manteno, IL, where the plant will be built, are furious. The whole scheme was done behind doors, away from the public eye. How are the permits going to be issued? How is Gotion going to dispose of the toxic water that results from cooling the plant's operations? The IL Freedom Caucus is working with these local taxpayers to get answers. They have FOIA'd all of the paperwork behind this shady deal. Optimism is high that, once this is exposed, the whole thing could fall apart. Stay tuned.
**Election integrity in Pennsylvania**
Without approval from the legislature, Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro recently announced that he would implement automatic voter registration. This means anybody who updates, renews, or applies for a driver's license in the state will automatically be registered to vote. Imagine a Canadian living in Philadelphia getting registered to vote in state elections. Even if the Canadian wisely chose not to vote, since that would be illegal, a ballot would still be available for fraudsters to submit.
It's a pure political attempt to taint the voting process in the Keystone State and it's unconstitutional since the PA General Assembly didn't approve it.
Pennsylvanians deserve to have elections that they can trust, so the PA Freedom Cacus will be launching a legal challenge against the initiative.
Read their full statement here:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65e109e6-8c94-460d-9586-1d8b8ac57376?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**MT Freedom Caucus Calls for Special Session to Cut Taxes**
Montana is awash in higher than expected tax revenue. Current estimates suggest that $800 million to $1 billion will be received above and beyond what the 2023 legislature committed to government spending. Naturally, this money should go back to taxpayers and not to big government politicians.
But here's the wrinkle - Montana's legislature only meets every other year. So if nothing is done now, then taxpayers have to wait until 2025, not next year.
So the MT Freedom Caucus has called for a special session to immediately return this money to taxpayers AND to institute massive reforms through a Taxpayer's Bill of Rights. If successful, future tax receipts will automatically go to the people rather than be used to grow government.
Lawmaker will vote on a "petition" to decide whether to have a special session. The Republican governor and liberal Republican leaders are either silent on the issue or quietly opposed. The Montana Freedom Caucus will correctly force their hand. Will they stand with taxpayers or stand for the bloated government they helped prop up?
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/376c0dd2-19e4-4b95-99ec-a97ded9416fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/939f0e4a-354e-40f7-9b89-ffe16ece25d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
#### Invite your friends and earn rewards
If you enjoy State Freedom Caucus Network, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe.
[Invite Friends](https://substack..b6_oVRTaL637kd5ufhWNFoF0Z_rBgqWlKgfP1OBnXww?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

Ken Calvert outed Mark Takano as gay against his will!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71249047/431620879/1013293294?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231009_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGZjZTBjMS1jMzY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BaybF27cXINXAwj2Z1s8ohm4ZIwXPAk475NrNvAA1-w=) Hey, Peter. I’m Will Rollins, a former federal prosecutor and gay Democrat running to flip California’s 41st Congressional District from red to blue.

**[**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a $3 contribution between Mark Takano and our campaign to help us win this race and expand LGBTQ+ representation in Congress, but first I’ll explain why this particular seat is so important. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71249048/431620880/1013293294?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231009_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGZjZTBjMS1jMzY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BaybF27cXINXAwj2Z1s8ohm4ZIwXPAk475NrNvAA1-w=)** California’s 41st District is home to Palm Springs, and last fall, we made national headlines for going head-to-head in this district against a staunch opponent of LGTBQ+ rights, Ken Calvert. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71249049/431620881/1013293294?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231009_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGZjZTBjMS1jMzY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BaybF27cXINXAwj2Z1s8ohm4ZIwXPAk475NrNvAA1-w=) When it comes to LGBTQ issues, Calvert’s as bad as it gets:
* He opposed gay marriage.
* He voted against allowing gay adoptions.
* He voted down the Equality Act.
* He voted to allow employers to fire employees for being LGBTQ+.
* He voted against the repeal of “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.”

And if all of that isn’t bad enough, his first electoral victory came in 1994 after **he sent out bright pink mailers outing Mark Takano, his then political opponent and accused him of harboring a “secret” homosexual agenda.**

Now Peter, the good news is Ken Calvert’s political career is _more vulnerable than ever before._

In 2022, I ran against him as a first-time candidate with 0% name ID, and we handed him the closest midterm election he’s ever faced (just 4 points!). National experts say that our campaign was the #3 over-performing Democratic challenger campaign in the nation.

Now, in 2024, national Democrats are already calling our district one of 33 initial “offensive targets” to take back the House Majority.

So let’s make a strong statement, Peter. Let’s send a staunch anti-LGBTQ+ Republican packing, flip this swing seat, and take back the House.

But especially here in Mississippi where our current Attorney General led the charge to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and is now trying to access your private medical records, **we have an opportunity to make meaningful change in every zip code.**

Peter — our campaign’s facing our first and biggest hurdle, and I need your help. I’ll explain more, but first, I have to ask you to make a grassroots donation before our critical deadline at midnight. [_**Just click here to give >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71249290/431621620/677555985?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231009_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTliZDVkNGYtYzQ2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T2syEE0TDS_zud6-wUlNMUd24yP3woz_yojeo1dIASs=) My team and I know we have to show our grassroots momentum after launching just one month ago. So we set a HUGE goal — we need to raise $450,000 online by 11:59 pm tonight. I’ll be honest with you, Peter, this target is a stretch for us. But defeating Marsha Blackburn won’t be cheap or easy. She’s got mega-money backers lining up to fund her campaign. We know they’ll pour endless resources into defeating us. So we have to be ready to take her on. Our movement has been growing by the day, and so many of you have already been so generous. I know we can meet this goal together. She’s got mega-money backers lining up to fund her campaign. We know they’ll pour endless resources into defeating us. So we have to be ready to take her on. Our movement has been growing by the day, and so many of you have already been so generous. I know we can meet this goal together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Gloria Johnson and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Let’s get this done! Gloria = HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Keep Gaetz Fighting
body:
Mike Lawler loves the Swamp

[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtO6zAQhp9msms0HidOsvDiHCojAWIBCIml6ws1spvUTknL06OWwnYu3__p12mKwZ8kdP-BaBtsASLg_4Bo_7akfPhI97crevha7cVjas9LugGi-TS5v8srpHZJh3ieduvKSu4tNpWTTAyi73BoWbWVZoMW28EwEuipMUywvrGWWy90b9quCpKQOEMcWIfEsR5cj-idNl4LR7qFBi85tU4uB6NZmRed8zim2oypinI7z1O5iCkgteSx3h1MdIfy82bGBKSuykDqE0hNqgz08uqOO-DqUgJfo717Pm7iU5WlnZYQYyiigwbffynfAQAA___nn2Az) | [Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1O6zAQhZ9msms0HuenWXhxL1WQALGAFUvHGVMju07tRKE8PWoJbM_MfPPp6DB5Zy8K2v9AdHRjBiKQ_4Do_LaGtHyEx_sdPX3tzs1zqK9DugOi-TLx3-YGKTlo569peyhGJe2IVcFKNF2zb7GrRXFUyFKIigwNVlcdoR5tLYzluqtt1TIXThGSFIidaJEklh3vES1rY3XDpGuo8Pan1IGTM1rkedUpxRhKE0Ph1XGep3wT64H6NcXytBjPS_45MzEA9ZsyUJ-XIZvkptnFUwbql9OWDAyyvzUiDzg-vH4O_qVIapxW573LTQsVvv8ivwMAAP__oMJm0g)

| | [ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkFvozAQhX-NuQWZcTBw4LC7UfbQqveerMGMiSsck7EJSn59lSjt9X1P730Yltm7Wy-avwLg5MckAIT6IwAun1vg9Su8_d_B-3130R-hfkD4JwDybaHf5mukpIB-fqTNoRh75Ua5L6ivdKfbRnZ1VZz6oR3QjWhr7ZRUFbWdbrCxigZdDwPKwvcgQVVSdlUjQcmyo1ZKR2gdagKsxV4-f0oMxN5ilfKGzDGG0sZQzP0p5yU9xY4CjhNSvrvINp4nppRKpuu1tPEHmTGeTQyG2Ey4Y284mZeBFuq45mAycRDqsHElQDPZldmfJ6EOmVcquB-Xzc-zT7oRezk93WwM3wEAAP__WJts4w)
---
Friend – Joe Biden’s favorite Republican is now demanding the House Republicans EXPEL me.
I need to tell you about a guy I work with in Congress named Mike Lawler, but first, you should know what Joe Biden had to say about him...
_**“Mike is the kind of guy that when I was in the Congress, the kind of Republican I used to deal with. But he’s not one of these MAGA Republicans.”**_ _**\- President Joe Biden**_
I can’t believe it, but Joe Biden is exactly right about Mike Lawler, he’s not MAGA and he’s exactly the kind of Republican who will cut deals with Democrats to sell out his voters and our country. His political experience comes entirely from the notoriously corrupt halls of the New York Assembly in Albany, and it really shows.
**Lawler is _very, very mad_ that I took a stand against the Lobbyists and Special Interests that fund his campaign,** and now he’s threatening to offer a motion to expel me from the House Republican Conference.
I’ve got some news for Mike Lawler, I’m not afraid of him or his Lobbyist pals.
| [ **DEFEND GAETZ** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkFvozAQhX-NuQWZcTBw4LC7UfbQqveerMGMiSsck7EJSn59lSjt9X1P730Yltm7Wy-avwLg5MckAIT6IwAun1vg9Su8_d_B-3130R-hfkD4JwDybaHf5mukpIB-fqTNoRh75Ua5L6ivdKfbRnZ1VZz6oR3QjWhr7ZRUFbWdbrCxigZdDwPKwvcgQVVSdlUjQcmyo1ZKR2gdagKsxV4-f0oMxN5ilfKGzDGG0sZQzP0p5yU9xY4CjhNSvrvINp4nppRKpuu1tPEHmTGeTQyG2Ey4Y284mZeBFuq45mAycRDqsHElQDPZldmfJ6EOmVcquB-Xzc-zT7oRezk93WwM3wEAAP__WJts4w)
---
Unlike Lawler, I don’t take a penny from PACs or Lobbyists and I never will, which is why it’s so important I have the resources to fight back against his plot to remove me from Committees and expel me from the Conference.
**What Mike doesn’t know is that there is an army of patriots that have stepped up to stand with me in this fight to change Washington, and we’re not backing down.**
**[I’m asking you to help me show Mike Lawler that we’re going to fight him and his Swamp buddies tooth and nail to save this country.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkFvozAQhX-NuQWZcTBw4LC7UfbQqveerMGMiSsck7EJSn59lSjt9X1P730Yltm7Wy-avwLg5MckAIT6IwAun1vg9Su8_d_B-3130R-hfkD4JwDybaHf5mukpIB-fqTNoRh75Ua5L6ivdKfbRnZ1VZz6oR3QjWhr7ZRUFbWdbrCxigZdDwPKwvcgQVVSdlUjQcmyo1ZKR2gdagKsxV4-f0oMxN5ilfKGzDGG0sZQzP0p5yU9xY4CjhNSvrvINp4nppRKpuu1tPEHmTGeTQyG2Ey4Y284mZeBFuq45mAycRDqsHElQDPZldmfJ6EOmVcquB-Xzc-zT7oRezk93WwM3wEAAP__WJts4w)**
I’m proud to have you on my team. Without the support of patriots like you, our mission to save this country would be over already. Thanks, Matt Gaetz
| [ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkFvozAQhX-NuQWZcTBw4LC7UfbQqveerMGMiSsck7EJSn59lSjt9X1P730Yltm7Wy-avwLg5MckAIT6IwAun1vg9Su8_d_B-3130R-hfkD4JwDybaHf5mukpIB-fqTNoRh75Ua5L6ivdKfbRnZ1VZz6oR3QjWhr7ZRUFbWdbrCxigZdDwPKwvcgQVVSdlUjQcmyo1ZKR2gdagKsxV4-f0oMxN5ilfKGzDGG0sZQzP0p5yU9xY4CjhNSvrvINp4nppRKpuu1tPEHmTGeTQyG2Ey4Y284mZeBFuq45mAycRDqsHElQDPZldmfJ6EOmVcquB-Xzc-zT7oRezk93WwM3wEAAP__WJts4w)
---
P.S. Lawler is going to be begging like a dog for money from Lobbyists and PACs leading up to his re-election campaign in 2024, and he’ll even have the audacity to try to trick YOU into giving him money. **I hope you’ll examine all your fundraising appeals with a discerning eye and make sure to never give this turncoat a DIME of your hard earned cash.** He knows he can’t raise it using his name, so make sure to look carefully to see where your money is going, guys like this lie for a living!
| | |
---
|
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Celebrating Indigenous Peoples' Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]Peter,
Today is Indigenous Peoples' Day, and I want to take a moment and reflect on the rich cultural heritage of our Indigenous communities here in North Carolina and acknowledge their contributions to our state.
In Congress, I’m committed to promoting policies that respect the sovereignty and rights of North Carolina's Indigenous People. I’ll work to address the disparities they face, and I’ll support efforts to protect the sacred lands and natural resources that are crucial to their way of life.
We all have a shared responsibility to create a more just and equal society for North Carolina families, and we must work together to make it happen.
I encourage you to take some time on Indigenous Peoples' Day to learn more about the history and culture of North Carolina's Indigenous communities. Engage in discussions with friends and family, and consider how we can collectively support policies that uplift and empower these vital communities.
Wishing you a meaningful and reflective Indigenous Peoples' Day.
Sincerely,
Wiley Nickel
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]

Raleigh, NC 27602

name: Callie Barr
subject: Detroit Lions + keeping the faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71250474/431625727/-569772565?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231009_fr_lions_cand_sm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdjOTNjMmItYzY2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2epb5BWYc7Ou-6wsJ-pp6Az2bArp708SCdk9QMK_kno=)
---
Peter, As you can tell from the pics below, watching the Lions has been a long-standing tradition in our family. And, yesterday, we kept it going while watching **Lions secure another BIG win in their historic season**. Woot woot! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71250481/431625739/-569772565?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231009_fr_lions_cand_sm_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdjOTNjMmItYzY2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2epb5BWYc7Ou-6wsJ-pp6Az2bArp708SCdk9QMK_kno=)
---
Pet photos aside, I think there's a lesson that matches our dedicated and long-suffering fandom: Despite the ups and downs, our best days are ahead.
I know that people are losing confidence in our institutions. Congress isn’t governing. Tribalism is threatening our Democracy. And, we have a shrinking middle class that threatens the American Dream.
**_Don’t lose faith._**
**Matt and Maloo have been wearing the Silver and Blue, and excitedly watching it all come together.**
And, today — despite all of the attacks on our democracy — we see young people across our state working to get out the vote. We have strikers across the nation fighting for the middle class. We have ordinary people in our communities standing up against misinformation, division, and hate.
Being a Lions' fan has often been more bittersweet than sweet — but we do it anyway because we love the people who come together for this team, and we're proud to be Michiganders. And, we know one day, they are going to win the Super Bowl.
**Likewise, I'm running for Congress because I love my community, and I know that we aren’t done yet. This American experiment — the Democracy that has inspired the whole world — is far from over. Our best days are yet to come. And, you are a part of that.**

clean_body: | = Peter, As you can tell from the pics below, watching the Lions has been a long-standing tradition in our family. And, yesterday, we kept it going while watching Lions secure another BIG win in their historic season. Woot woot! | = Pet photos aside, I think there's a lesson that matches our dedicated and long-suffering fandom: Despite the ups and downs, our best days are ahead. I know that people are losing confidence in our institutions. Congress isn’t governing. Tribalism is threatening our Democracy. And, we have a shrinking middle class that threatens the American Dream. Don’t lose faith. Matt and Maloo have been wearing the Silver and Blue, and excitedly watching it all come together. And, today — despite all of the attacks on our democracy — we see young people across our state working to get out the vote. We have strikers across the nation fighting for the middle class. We have ordinary people in our communities standing up against misinformation, division, and hate. Being a Lions' fan has often been more bittersweet than sweet — but we do it anyway because we love the people who come together for this team, and we're proud to be Michiganders. And, we know one day, they are going to win the Super Bowl. Likewise, I'm running for Congress because I love my community, and I know that we aren’t done yet. This American experiment — the Democracy that has inspired the whole world — is far from over. Our best days are yet to come. subject: Tuberville STILL won’t release his block - even after last weekend.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
With a world in crisis, from Ukraine to Israel, we need every one of our top officers confirmed and in their seats, to keep us safe.
#
With a world in crisis, from Ukraine to Israel, we need every one of our top officers confirmed and in their seats, to keep us safe.
Unfortunately, Tommy Tuberville continues to block that from happening — even after this weekend’s horrific and deadly attacks in Israel.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231009&t=1&akid=17406%2E3013755%2Eg6bhf8)
A blockade on Military promotions like Tuberville’s is unprecedented in American history.
It is an insult to the men and women serving our country.
And it is a gift to our adversaries.
We all expect authoritarian regimes around the world to do whatever they can to undermine our democracy and our National Security.
But we would never expect an elected member of the U.S. Senate to willingly do this much damage to our Military and our allies, with his entire party standing by — or even outright supporting it.
We've led the fight in holding Tuberville accountable, and he's feeling the heat. Now we are re-doubling our efforts. It's never been more important.

clean_body: With a world in crisis, from Ukraine to Israel, we need every one of our top officers confirmed and in their seats, to keep us safe. With a world in crisis, from Ukraine to Israel, we need every one of our top officers confirmed and in their seats, to keep us safe. Unfortunately, Tommy Tuberville continues to block that from happening — even after this weekend’s horrific and deadly attacks in Israel. A blockade on Military promotions like Tuberville’s is unprecedented in American history. It is an insult to the men and women serving our country. And it is a gift to our adversaries. We all expect authoritarian regimes around the world to do whatever they can to undermine our democracy and our National Security. But we would never expect an elected member of the U.S. Senate to willingly do this much damage to our Military and our allies, with his entire party standing by — or even outright supporting it. We've led the fight in holding Tuberville accountable, and he's feeling the heat. Now we are re-doubling our efforts. It's never been more important. name: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer (via DLCC.org)
subject: This needs your attention
body:
Gov. Whitmer here – Republicans are pouring money into Virginia in an effort to expand their power in the statehouse and ban abortion. With only 29 days until Election Day in Virginia, we need to step up and defeat them. | | |
---
| |
---|---

[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xJdM4UPBsteMLVkfmLiDV3AYV6Ajmkcu1v1riNeitrEu4y3Nh-fxgcu1EAWzHpTGVwnK_idQr_i_2i8BVDq70o2kyFiDY6Vug99iB5QPsuQmxUQloqYOIJm0E17yeZp08vYdj6hDHahsWbJdmX1qHXlvXzQ0Y-GwYv6edqcHe7qbiHcSUC8fRS-Zwyl_wkKfQCStbAdMDLTVjLisQ2FLHt3832lrwpw_g3KYCzNkR0SKETRxm_GA4l-aJssH1tUbtabC_UWynrhIW1JQRYK9eeoSNINzeqCsYamQvn-OCARvf-HeMdsmToge92tIXgeixkfj1vSDDQ7qBSTFRKlIW5IOGhhcbPbGXyo4LtvsY5IIzj2RNBY_gHONl3DQ5B1dEOMD43h5I_ccg9JmENk5lfIKf7hDSXMbyiE_mHxvD6hiCm_CGo1IQvptGRijZ7G13K62ZPXtBqFeBeMCJkCnqer2K-_q5djmVtUmdW_BeksaHwmGQgz_D-fTNBf-YgGJ_yYyJARU1ANxZ1QpGWrDfw/40a/b2he9SSMQ3epuJuvNYTQUQ/h0/J0uvKT9DGAU1Qtk99Zs2VeA7yaPuO_ztGIL95L2I0xs) Right now, thanks to the Democratic trifecta that you helped elect in Michigan last year, abortion is _**legal**_. But across the country, that isn’t the case. Virginia – where Democrats are facing key elections in just 29 days – is now the **only southern state without an abortion ban**. We have got to fight like hell to protect the Virginia Senate majority and flip the House, because the future of abortion in the Commonwealth depends on it. I’m all in on protecting abortion rights, in Michigan and across the country. I hope I won’t have to spend the rest of my life fighting to defend abortion rights,**but if I have to, I will.** **Virginia is the next battleground for abortion – and with voters already starting to cast their votes, we need to come together now.** [I’m counting on you. clean_body: Gov. Whitmer here – Republicans are pouring money into Virginia in an effort to expand their power in the statehouse and ban abortion. With only 29 days until Election Day in Virginia, we need to step up and defeat them. | | | | | ---|--- Right now, thanks to the Democratic trifecta that you helped elect in Michigan last year, abortion is legal. But across the country, that isn’t the case. Virginia – where Democrats are facing key elections in just 29 days – is now the only southern state without an abortion ban. We have got to fight like hell to protect the Virginia Senate majority and flip the House, because the future of abortion in the Commonwealth depends on it. I’m all in on protecting abortion rights, in Michigan and across the country. I hope I won’t have to spend the rest of my life fighting to defend abortion rights,but if I have to, I will. Virginia is the next battleground for abortion – and with voters already starting to cast their votes, we need to come together now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let's fight like hell, Gretchen Gretchen Whitmer 49th Governor of Michigan | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . * Virginia may be blue at the national level,**but is still highly competitive in state elections.**

* **Republicans are hiding their stances on abortion from voters** , because they know their extreme views are unpopular – even neglecting to include the issue on their campaign websites.

* If Republicans win the State Senate, Youngkin will have the mandate to ban abortion in Virginia, and **“publicly proclaimed that he would be willing to go much further than a 15-week ban.”**

* Perhaps unsurprisingly, **Youngkin has big plans to become a national right-wing star** with a strong showing in Virginia this year.

Simply put, there’s a huge amount at stake in this election. I’m asking for your help to make sure that Gov. Youngkin doesn’t get the chance to cement his right-wing majority in Virginia, destroy abortion rights, and become the GOP’s next darling. _**We don’t need an extremist in sheep’s clothing in the White House.**_ **[Please – can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even more if you can spare it, to take back the General Assembly next month and wave bye-bye to Youngkin’s presidential ambitions for good?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71251482/431629302/851989849?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_231009_FR_NewRepublic_A0_na_U2_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODJhNDY3OS1jOTY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Depv7t0Bgz--Mn1RtEVyijXAkH8MoYN9G-MFCr3SECk=)** | | | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71251483/431629303/851989849?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_231009_FR_NewRepublic_A0_na_U2_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODJhNDY3OS1jOTY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Depv7t0Bgz--Mn1RtEVyijXAkH8MoYN9G-MFCr3SECk=)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Can you answer this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, do you have a sec?
John doesn't take his cues from powerful special interests -- his work is powered by folks like you, so we're interested in hearing from... well... **_folks like you!_**
If you have a minute to spare, can you take our Q4 Priorities Survey? It's only four questions, we swear. The more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters, the better work our campaign can do to support John.
**[So can you take just one minute to share your input in our Q4 Priorities Survey?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/email-priorities-survey-20231009/?t=1&akid=8612%2E434096%2EyF4ul5)**
**[SHARE NOW »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/email-priorities-survey-20231009/?t=2&akid=8612%2E434096%2EyF4ul5)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot.
More soon,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231009-8612-footer&t=3&refcode2=8612_434096_yF4ul5&akid=8612%2E434096%2EyF4ul5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Friend, Jim Jordan isn’t _just_ a far-Right ideologue: he continues to spread mis/disinformation about the 2020 election, he didn't protect the Constitution, and he didn't protect the students at OSU. In fact, he's accused of covering up serial sexual abuse while he was a wrestling coach at OSU. Worse yet, he could be an unindicted co-conspirator in one or more of Donald Trump’s many criminal cases. At any moment, Jim Jordan could be indicted for his role in planning the treasonous attempt to overturn the 2020 election results. _And now his far-Right extremist cronies are trying to make him the next Speaker of the House._ This is a crisis of NATIONAL concern. But here’s the deal—**I can win. I will beat Jim Jordan and make sure he doesn’t return to Washington with your help.**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71251692/431629959/1649708063?refcode=eoq3-thanksNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYzZjM3MDUtY2E2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iYN-yxkyWnujAuCiGQIZvbH03VI--XJh3Ev00n_t2oo=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71251693/431629960/1649708063?refcode=10-5-23NGP_pic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYzZjM3MDUtY2E2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iYN-yxkyWnujAuCiGQIZvbH03VI--XJh3Ev00n_t2oo=)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS

[I’m about to ask for your help raising $3,498 before my midnight deadline.](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/HUqMa1E89kqha9zNlPobVA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnBsGrP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTAwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yV09ZbmtqenhFV29VdGpnUFkwem5nNEFTWjgmcmVmY29kZTI9MldPWW5ranp4RVdvVXRqZ1BZMHpuZzRBU1o4JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJXT1lua2p6eEVXb1V0amdQWTB6bmc0QVNaOFcDc3BjQgplIKs8JGUa3I6tUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) But first, it is important you understand why I ran to serve one of the most diverse districts in the country, where there’s been a serious lack of investment and most people can’t afford an unexpected $300 expense. I’m fighting for the people of this country who politicians have failed time and time again. People who deserve better. **People like my mom and abuela.** My mother and grandmother came here from Cuba during the freedom flights in the late 1960s. What my family had to go through just to eat and have a roof over their heads, is a testament to the resilience and drive of immigrants. But it is also an incredibly sad story. What would it have been like if our country was committed to equity when moving here? If money wasn’t an issue? If she had not been exploited by Miami factories that had her working 70+ hours a week for almost nothing. Where would our people be? **People like my biological mother.** A victim of the system and enmeshed in trying circumstances, she turned to drugs and crime while pregnant with me. She had no access to healthcare and wasn’t able to see a doctor once during her pregnancy. In the wealthiest country in the world, she was neglected by society and left without anyone to turn to. As the mother of seven, she made the difficult decision to put me up for adoption because she lacked the resources to care for and raise another child. **People like my barber.** He was deprived of his right to vote due to a 20 year old felony. He committed a crime of desperation, served his debt to society, and became a successful businessman. Yet he still couldn’t participate in our democracy. I’m so very proud that while working at the ACLU, I organized the movement that restored voting rights to 1.6 million Floridians with previous felonies. But there is so much work to be done. **People like Josh.** A houseless man I met when I was pumping gas last year. One of my campaign buttons rolled out the door when I was getting out of the car. He picked it up and asked “who is Maxwell Alejandro Frost?” I told him it was me and we got to talking about what I hoped to do if I was elected. He couldn’t conceive of the possibility of Medicare for All and healthcare as a human right, because he hadn’t been to the doctor in years. He asked me _“what do I have to do to deserve healthcare?”_ **This system that makes life more difficult for the most vulnerable among us is no accident, Peter. It is by design. And the people who want to keep it that way will spend countless sums of dark money to stop any chance of progress we have.** [I came to Congress so I could fight for my loved ones and yours, but I'll only stay here with the support of grassroots donors like you. Thank you for reading, now let’s keep fighting, together:](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/HUqMa1E89kqha9zNlPobVA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnBsGrP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTAwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yV09ZbmtqenhFV29VdGpnUFkwem5nNEFTWjgmcmVmY29kZTI9MldPWW5ranp4RVdvVXRqZ1BZMHpuZzRBU1o4JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJXT1lua2p6eEVXb1V0amdQWTB6bmc0QVNaOFcDc3BjQgplIKs8JGUa3I6tUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/gni8tLTG3zVCTK7JL_CBDA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnBsGrP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTAwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MTAmY2RtYz0yV09ZbmtqenhFV29VdGpnUFkwem5nNEFTWjgmcmVmY29kZTI9MldPWW5ranp4RVdvVXRqZ1BZMHpuZzRBU1o4JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJXT1lua2p6eEVXb1V0amdQWTB6bmc0QVNaOFcDc3BjQgplIKs8JGUa3I6tUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

clean_body: | ~~ ~~ But first, it is important you understand why I ran to serve one of the most diverse districts in the country, where there’s been a serious lack of investment and most people can’t afford an unexpected $300 expense. I’m fighting for the people of this country who politicians have failed time and time again. People who deserve better. People like my mom and abuela. My mother and grandmother came here from Cuba during the freedom flights in the late 1960s. What my family had to go through just to eat and have a roof over their heads, is a testament to the resilience and drive of immigrants. But it is also an incredibly sad story. What would it have been like if our country was committed to equity when moving here? If money wasn’t an issue? If she had not been exploited by Miami factories that had her working 70+ hours a week for almost nothing. Where would our people be? People like my biological mother. A victim of the system and enmeshed in trying circumstances, she turned to drugs and crime while pregnant with me. She had no access to healthcare and wasn’t able to see a doctor once during her pregnancy. In the wealthiest country in the world, she was neglected by society and left without anyone to turn to. As the mother of seven, she made the difficult decision to put me up for adoption because she lacked the resources to care for and raise another child. People like my barber. He was deprived of his right to vote due to a 20 year old felony. He committed a crime of desperation, served his debt to society, and became a successful businessman. Yet he still couldn’t participate in our democracy. I’m so very proud that while working at the ACLU, I organized the movement that restored voting rights to 1.6 million Floridians with previous felonies. But there is so much work to be done. People like Josh. A houseless man I met when I was pumping gas last year. One of my campaign buttons rolled out the door when I was getting out of the car. He picked it up and asked “who is Maxwell Alejandro Frost?” I told him it was me and we got to talking about what I hoped to do if I was elected. He couldn’t conceive of the possibility of Medicare for All and healthcare as a human right, because he hadn’t been to the doctor in years. He asked me “what do I have to do to deserve healthcare?” This system that makes life more difficult for the most vulnerable among us is no accident, Peter. It is by design. And the people who want to keep it that way will spend countless sums of dark money to stop any chance of progress we have. ~~ | | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ Thank you so much for your support, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. clean_body: The Deep State may very well strip me of my right to free speech.| | | | | Patriot, This past week, you saw Crooked Joe’s accomplices force yours truly to stand trial as an innocent man in New York to defend my livelihood, my family, and my properties from what many are calling the “corporate death penalty.” And now, exactly 1 WEEK from today at a federal court hearing in Washington, Biden may very well get away with GAGGING me for the rest of the 2024 election. The America we know and love is truly gone, Patriot... ...And in its place now stands a Marxist tin-pot dictatorship more like Stalinist Russia or Maoist China than our once free Republic. Biden’s corrupt DOJ is attempting to CENSOR and SILENCE the leading candidate for president (me – by a lot!) to the point where I wouldn’t even be allowed to criticizeCrooked Joe! But no matter the outcome of the October 16th Gag Order Hearing, the Deep State can NEVER GAG the American people! No matter how much we’re attacked, the Silent Majority will NEVER, EVER SURRENDER our noble mission to bring our country back from the brink. Together, we WILL Make America Great Again! (If you’re doing poorly right now due to the very sinister people running our country into the ground, then please do not contribute! Don’t even hesitate!) | | Thank you, Donald J. | **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

body:

name: Navigating Uncertainty (by Vikram Mansharamani)
subject: A Hot Front in the US-China War
body:
The horrific attacks this weekend in Israel have explosive escalation potential
| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..LO3Xnn6m-8-nB7T-UT166ObG7seGrrAEedFE21G1r0I?) for more

[](https://substack..qqeondSczkQlC46aLk_AEcdG7qmi4r9SERbSs-F4gm0?)
