# [A Hot Front in the US-China War](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=137786574&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3Nzg2NTc0LCJpYXQiOjE2OTY4NzYyNjQsImV4cCI6MTY5OTQ2ODI2NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WuWQTT0jTo03lllVrDtHpA5oKJO9PK1wQZUNpOb25Y8)
### The horrific attacks this weekend in Israel have explosive escalation potential
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/redirect/87048318-185b-48cc-b048-0f32a8973c6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Oct 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/87048318-185b-48cc-b048-0f32a8973c6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=137786574&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3Nzg2NTc0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5Njg3NjI2NCwiZXhwIjoxNjk5NDY4MjY0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5Yuk471rocP9NNLeXbBeArmbyNt2jmuVSzhoer59vVs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=137786574&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3Nzg2NTc0LCJpYXQiOjE2OTY4NzYyNjQsImV4cCI6MTY5OTQ2ODI2NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WuWQTT0jTo03lllVrDtHpA5oKJO9PK1wQZUNpOb25Y8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=137786574&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3Nzg2NTc0LCJpYXQiOjE2OTY4NzYyNjQsImV4cCI6MTY5OTQ2ODI2NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WuWQTT0jTo03lllVrDtHpA5oKJO9PK1wQZUNpOb25Y8)
---
| | [](https://substack..7zlBOW_tHJ0_J97SBxZ8Ln2RlzY0ApYLHz-TmKmovok?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/a-hot-front-in-the-us-china-war?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9a80c2a0-3175-4696-aad7-8f591f40f007?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The brazen terrorist attacks on Israel over the weekend by Iran-linked Hamas are another sign the world is splitting into two rival ecosystems, one led by the United States (and its Western allies) and the other led by an increasingly visible China-Russia-Iran-North Korea (CRINK) alliance.
Hamas soldiers entered Israel from Gaza via land, air, and sea as rockets flew overhead. The Israeli Defense Force (IDF) said more than 2,000 rockets were fired while Hamas claimed the number was 5,000. ([CNN noted that ~4,000 rockets were fired from Gaza into Israel during the 50 day war in 2014](https://substack.com/redirect/7509f845-f098-4a2e-a348-ddeba7cd469c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). Disturbing stories have emerged of Hamas taking hundreds of hostages and of [the slaughter of hundreds of innocent people at a music festival](https://substack.com/redirect/61b1f8dc-90ab-4fcb-ad40-2fc60074157c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). On Sunday evening, [it was reported that Iran had provided planning and other assistance to Hamas, providing final approval and support at a meeting in Beirut last week](https://substack.com/redirect/e970cd14-1e7b-46e9-adf1-d8ea1765be6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..58DiJY_afSyT3tobCr9GIfuiDZbhEo272av_3XPfHmg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137786574)
Many analysts believe a [contributing factor](https://substack.com/redirect/a0fdf298-0740-443a-9171-67e168c024cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) around the timing of the attack was the possibility of [normalized relations between Israel and Saudi Arabia](https://substack.com/redirect/bc190b9b-edc6-4baa-9c79-6a3e859fa70d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), something the United States has been seeking for months and had hoped to wrap up by year end, before the US Presidential election season confused negotiation dynamics. Israel's improving relationships with the UAE, Bahrain, and Morocco ([via the Abraham Accords](https://substack.com/redirect/13eb55e4-eb6e-4ccb-916a-e865ca1e65a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) was evidence of diplomatic momentum that Iran sought to disrupt. As noted by the _New York Times_ , "[Hamas, Hezbollah and Iran are all opposed to any normalization with Israel](https://substack.com/redirect/173861fa-b26a-4785-83c6-e6ad7fcc7725?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" and early reactions to the attack from Saudi Arabia were not reflective of warming relations between the Kingdom and Israel:
> _[On Saturday, after the Hamas assault, the Saudi Foreign Ministry released a statement that did not explicitly denounce the attack and instead laid the blame on Israel, saying that the Saudi government had repeatedly warned"of the dangers of the explosion of the situation as a result of the continued occupation, the deprivation of the Palestinian people and their legitimate rights and the repetition of systemic provocations against its sanctities."](https://substack.com/redirect/173861fa-b26a-4785-83c6-e6ad7fcc7725?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/173861fa-b26a-4785-83c6-e6ad7fcc7725?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And it wasn't just the reaction of Saudi Arabia that caught my attention. [More than 30 Harvard student groups claimed Israel was "entirely responsible" for the Hamas attacks and expressed solidarity with Palestine](https://substack.com/redirect/d80e59f9-4c3f-4a39-a774-0515d82dd21f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Russia called for ending the violence, urged a ceasefire, and encouraged a comprehensive negotiation process...but stopped short of condemning Hamas](https://substack.com/redirect/7b1ea07a-35fd-48a6-920b-a8a40a22a03d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Iran, of course, defended Hamas, noting that the attacks were a "[spontaneous movement of resistance groups and Palestine's oppressed people in defence of their inalienable rights and their natural reaction to the Zionists' warmongering and provocative policies.](https://substack.com/redirect/618e3ce7-b300-4755-a804-ec07b1e5eec4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" But perhaps most revealing to me was the statement from Beijing:
> _[We call on relevant parties to remain calm, exercise restraint and immediately end the hostilities to protect civilians and avoid further deterioration of the situation. The recurrence of the conflict shows once again that the protracted standstill of the peace process cannot go on. The fundamental way out of the conflict lies in implementing the two-state solution and establishing an independent State of Palestine.](https://substack.com/redirect/b2b262e3-39f3-4eda-b580-cbe228d4303d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
The statement was delivered shortly before US Senator Chuck Schumer (along with US senators Mike Crapo, Bill Cassidy, Maggie Hassan, John Kennedy, and Jon Ossoff) met with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing. Schumer publicly stated his disappointment with the statement: "[I urge you and the Chinese people to stand with the Israeli people and condemn these cowardly and vicious attacks...I was very disappointed, to be honest, by the foreign ministry's statement that showed no sympathy or support for Israel during these troubled times.](https://substack.com/redirect/61417206-f68a-4074-a8c3-f3df7c27637a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
[While I have long been concerned that Iran represents a grave threat to American interests abroad, as well as the overall stability of the Middle East](https://substack.com/redirect/df48d76d-d9f6-4bc9-8317-bfa09b00751f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the [rapidly deepening ties between Beijing and Tehran](https://substack.com/redirect/ad6a451b-50ad-44e4-baff-42320b93b2c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) point to a new front in the US-China War. Consider the following developments in the past few years:
* [In early 2021, China and Iran signed a 25-year cooperation agreement to strengthen their political and economic relationship. Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi noted that "Relations between the two countries have now reached the level of strategic partnership...." ](https://substack.com/redirect/57e04987-d87a-4b12-b2fd-e4d4e77caba3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)US President [Biden expressed concern](https://substack.com/redirect/52d78e9b-968b-4125-b5d2-f08ab72556e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the emerging Iran-China relationship, leading [the Secretary of Iran's National Security Council to tweet "Biden's concern is correct: the flourishing of strategic cooperation in the East is accelerating the US decline](https://substack.com/redirect/0751958d-080b-40b0-8d2d-ae6783c72d1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."

* In late 2022, [the Iranian Finance Minister announced 16 new memoranda of understanding with China as part of the 25-year comprehensive strategic partnership](https://substack.com/redirect/452ddab6-63a1-4ea8-9e58-dbb9a2c29178?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The two countries signed deals in the energy, investment, banking, and infrastructure sectors, according to the US Institute of Peace.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..58DiJY_afSyT3tobCr9GIfuiDZbhEo272av_3XPfHmg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137786574)
* In February 2023, during Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi's three-day state visit to China, [20 agreements were announced in which Beijing and Tehran would work together in the fields of "crisis management, tourism, communication and information technology, environment, international trade, intellectual property, agriculture, export, healthcare, media, sports and cultural heritage](https://substack.com/redirect/d851a636-bc2c-4196-a8af-18eabdbc21e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." [Xi and Raisi pledged cooperation on many matters, including security, and the ceremony ended with a 21 gun salute in Tiananmen Square amidst an overtly military display](https://substack.com/redirect/557396d5-7367-460c-8733-f5ddff2fcbbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* In March 2023, [Beijing brokered a deal by which Iran and Saudi Arabia restored diplomatic ties, seven years after severing them](https://substack.com/redirect/d90aaeb5-3510-4c1e-b21d-c3f1727d3d7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and agreed to open their embassies in Riyadh and Tehran.
* [In March 2023, Iran joined Chinese and Russian forces for "Security Bond-2023," a naval exercise that took place in the Gulf of Oman](https://substack.com/redirect/071a7dcd-d33a-4ca0-9268-4b92797e8f55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), following up on similar joint military activities that took place in 2019 and 2022.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9ac7609f-0176-46c1-8b95-20ac372ea38b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..58DiJY_afSyT3tobCr9GIfuiDZbhEo272av_3XPfHmg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137786574)
# So What?
This new front in the [US-China War](https://substack.com/redirect/45bbba12-1b06-4fb2-bc93-c55be8967fc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) raises lots of questions and points to several concerning dynamics that might play out in the weeks and months ahead. And while we can never perfectly predict how the future will unfold, it's worth considering some potential ramifications that can impact the world in which we live.
1. [The Yom Kippur War of 1973](https://substack.com/redirect/8a990dd9-0224-48ee-b455-682e8a00232d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which took place almost 50 years ago to the day, was a hot front in the Cold War as the United States backed Israel and the USSR supported Arab nations. Might a similar dynamic be unfolding today? [Is the war raging today a hot front of the US-China War](https://substack.com/redirect/45bbba12-1b06-4fb2-bc93-c55be8967fc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), one in which America will back Israel as China (via Iran) backs Hamas? Are we in a proxy war that lends itself to rapid escalation if Iran directly attacks Israel?
2. Will [the rapidly escalating war between the US and China](https://substack.com/redirect/45bbba12-1b06-4fb2-bc93-c55be8967fc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) force countries to pick sides as the world splits into two global systems? Many countries have sought American military guarantees while retaining the ability to conduct business with American adversaries. Will the desire for Chinese investments and the appeal of Chinese hydrocarbon markets be stronger than security concerns? Is this conflict the ultimate [nail in the coffin of global multilateralism](https://substack.com/redirect/b2aa27da-008a-4783-8dd1-0bdeb3dfb23b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..58DiJY_afSyT3tobCr9GIfuiDZbhEo272av_3XPfHmg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137786574)
3. How might recent events [impact the war in Ukraine](https://substack.com/redirect/756541cd-6726-4f16-b838-fc31d99aa0d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? [America's ammunition stockpiles are already at historic lows](https://substack.com/redirect/ccf864e7-28a9-4eeb-8e6a-8fe4f76177ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and US sentiment is increasingly "fatigued" as Ukraine calls for additional American support. At the same time, [the US-Israel alliance appears rock solid](https://substack.com/redirect/f2e20a03-a302-497e-b4e9-ed5df8141f86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Might America divert limited military resources to Israel instead of Ukraine? Is the CRINK alliance draining the US [arsenal of democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/6335706b-c293-4012-b14c-7c123730b803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? America is probably less able to support Taiwan.
4. Could Israel view Iran as an existential threat and attack their enrichment facilities? Or might America resort to blockades to prevent tankers from exporting Iranian oil to global markets to starve the Islamic regime of resources? How would China react to such developments? Or might the world [decide Israel's reaction was too severe](https://substack.com/redirect/02dcb25d-06d3-47e2-901a-217c806f4183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and accuse the country of conducting a genocide against the people of Palestine? Could this degrade America's moral standing in the world?
5. As the Chinese and American economies slow, demand for oil will likely fall...but the recent conflict implies that supply concerns will be more important. And if oil prices rise and stay higher for longer, will the resulting inflation lead to a rethink of American energy policies? How will the Federal Reserve respond to inflation bleeding into the prices of everyday goods? Might climate change efforts be halted (or reversed) if the stagflation grips the global economy?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..58DiJY_afSyT3tobCr9GIfuiDZbhEo272av_3XPfHmg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137786574)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/066afffa-2155-48c0-98aa-71eb225d6d90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One lesson that may emerge from this new front of the US China war is that internal division may distract from external threats that produce existential vulnerabilities. Let's not forget that Israel was deeply divided over a [domestic debate about its Supreme Court's powers](https://substack.com/redirect/80a9c5e2-0b68-4d6b-944b-5e5ff018d170?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [a controversy that spilled into civil unrest, military disobedience, and legal appeals](https://substack.com/redirect/fb2ca75d-0d5b-432c-9a90-1f553e02fdfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Might this internal dissent have been interpreted as potential weakness by the Hamas-Iran-China alliance? Or could the recent release of [$6bn in seized funds](https://substack.com/redirect/c9c6696c-c775-495f-bd71-a794b82bdd07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have emboldened (and enabled) Tehran to confront American allies? Is [American weakness destabilizing the world](https://substack.com/redirect/92e8cddc-6044-48d8-92c2-bee45106a9be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
In the early 1990s, I had an opportunity to study ancient Chinese military strategy and how it was influencing military modernization and strategy in the People's Republic of China. Consider the fifth of China's famous [Thirty-Six Strategms](https://substack.com/redirect/72948005-401b-46a1-b9dd-a87d79ece900?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
#### **Loot a burning house ( 趁火打劫, Chen huǒ dǎ jie)**
> _[When a country is beset by internal problems, such as disease, famine, corruption, and crime, it is poorly-equipped to deal with an outside threat. Keep gathering internal information about an enemy. If the enemy is in its weakest state, attack them without mercy and annihilate them to prevent future troubles.](https://substack.com/redirect/72948005-401b-46a1-b9dd-a87d79ece900?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
In conclusion, what might the Chinese "Loot a Burning House" strategy mean for the United States? Given US [challenges of governance](https://substack.com/redirect/1b291f86-baf0-4d51-aa2e-edf69fc14aab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a [highly polarized population](https://substack.com/redirect/9f1d1827-c8c9-4b4a-9f4a-501e7ccec20f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the upcoming presidential election, is America's ability to fend off external threats up for the challenge of an increasingly aggressive China?

Hamas soldiers entered Israel from Gaza via land, air, and sea as rockets flew overhead. On Sunday evening, . body:
| | | Hi Peter, [Can you join us at our virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Jeff Merkley on the 26th?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71256191/431638049/636880288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmYWMwZTg4LWQyNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8my3bnf5tpsO7EKjgveAXkb8N809ptOfsBTf_zu_eVw=&emci=4052cc9b-d166-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9fac0e88-d266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Here are the details: **OLCV’s Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Merkley
WHEN**: Thursday, October 26th, from 12:00 - 1:15 PM PT
**WHERE** : Zoom – [RSVP now & submit a question for the senator!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71256193/431638050/636880288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmYWMwZTg4LWQyNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8my3bnf5tpsO7EKjgveAXkb8N809ptOfsBTf_zu_eVw=&emci=4052cc9b-d166-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9fac0e88-d266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) We’ll celebrate his leadership, learn about benefits for Oregon made available by the climate investments in the Inflation Reduction Act, hear updates about his legislation to protect pollinators, and discuss conservation efforts underway here in our state. Join us! Jane Kwon
Communications Coordinator, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71256194/431638051/1945785228?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmYWMwZTg4LWQyNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8my3bnf5tpsO7EKjgveAXkb8N809ptOfsBTf_zu_eVw=&emci=4052cc9b-d166-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9fac0e88-d266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)Dear Peter, Climate chaos is hitting our planet hard, and the consequences can be seen everywhere. Places across the country reached record-breaking high temperatures–some even breaking multiple records just this summer alone–and Oregon was no exception. These extreme temperatures are threatening not just keystone species like native bees, but also our forests, farms, and fisheries, putting lives and livelihoods at risk. We’re taking bold steps to address the devastating effects of climate impacts at the state level, but it won’t be enough unless the entire country is in this together. That’s why it’s so important to support new opportunities for clean energy, jobs, justice, and nature conservation that are currently moving at the national level. [**Learn more about the ongoing fight for climate action and environmental protections in D.C. at our upcoming virtual town hall with Senator Jeff Merkley.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71256195/431638052/636880288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmYWMwZTg4LWQyNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8my3bnf5tpsO7EKjgveAXkb8N809ptOfsBTf_zu_eVw=&emci=4052cc9b-d166-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9fac0e88-d266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) **OLCV Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Jeff Merkley**
**Date:** Thursday, October 26, 2023
**Time:** 12:00 - 1:15 PM PT
**Location:** Zoom - **[Register here and submit a question for the senator!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71256196/431638053/636880288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmYWMwZTg4LWQyNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8my3bnf5tpsO7EKjgveAXkb8N809ptOfsBTf_zu_eVw=&emci=4052cc9b-d166-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9fac0e88-d266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** **Senator Merkley is a climate and environmental champion.** He strongly supported and worked to pass the 2021 Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and Inflation Reduction Act, which made historic investments to help address the climate crisis and make progress on environmental justice. This year, he introduced the Pollinator Power Act to help reverse the decline in pollinator populations. **On October 26, Senator Merkley will update us on his legislation, talk to us about how the climate investments of the IRA will benefit Oregon, and answer selected audience questions.** [**RSVP today to stay up-to-date about the town hall, and submit your own questions for Senator Merkley.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71256197/431638054/636880288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmYWMwZTg4LWQyNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8my3bnf5tpsO7EKjgveAXkb8N809ptOfsBTf_zu_eVw=&emci=4052cc9b-d166-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9fac0e88-d266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Hope to see you there,
Britney VanCitters

Organizing Manager, OLCV |

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Why I joined the picket line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
On Friday, I joined the striking United Auto Workers on the picket line in Chicago.
Labor movements like UAW helped build the middle class. Now, they’re using their power to help strengthen it for generations to come—and I’m proud to stand alongside them.
These workers are making simple demands: fair wages, job security, and a safe environment to work.
Illinois has a strong history of labor movements that I promise to protect and honor. These are demands that every American worker is entitled to and that I work tirelessly to uphold in the Senate every day.
I’ve helped Democrats pass legislation that puts workers first—like the _Inflation Reduction Act_ and the _CHIPS Act_ —but my conversations with the brave workers on Friday are a clear reminder that we still have work ahead of us.
**********[I’m going to keep standing with our workers, but I hope I can count on you to stand alongside me. Please, donate what you can to help keep the Senate blue and fighting for the middle class.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71256340/431638284/-1050507325?refcode=dd_em_231009_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjI2ZGY5NC1kMjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8RX43BDPSlDG_eDh-YACNhg1m7JiZxgQ0Hgem-HHBfw=)**********
My best,
Dick Durbin

************[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71256341/431638285/-1050507325?refcode=dd_em_231009_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjI2ZGY5NC1kMjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8RX43BDPSlDG_eDh-YACNhg1m7JiZxgQ0Hgem-HHBfw=)************

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71256342/431638286/1680752020?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjI2ZGY5NC1kMjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8RX43BDPSlDG_eDh-YACNhg1m7JiZxgQ0Hgem-HHBfw=)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I'm listening to YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Of all the skills of leadership, listening is the most valuable.

Fellow American,

**We are Americans.**

At the end of the day, that is our most unifying principle. That spirit of unity is a centerpiece of my campaign. We cannot establish a national identity without saying, "I am proud to be American."

A President can and should be the best example of that ideal. Someone who listens to every American, even if they disagree on issues or on how to make America stronger. That's exactly why I need to hear from you now, Fellow American.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: DASS
subject: This is the level of harassment our election officials are facing:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71259520/431639692/-664199346?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDBjMjRjZC1kNDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gjjwtm0ygjJqKWj4BLacb_VZ39WNX7kYw8qh4_2NY74=)
**67 death threats and over 900 threats of online abuse.**

That’s the level of harassment DASS Chair and Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold faced in just a _three week_ period.

This level of violence against our election officials didn’t just happen overnight, folks. It’s been created slowly by Donald Trump and his MAGA movement over the last several years.

Now, harassment against election workers - _many who are senior citizens_ \- is at an all time high. In fact, a recent survey found that **one in three** election officials have been harassed, abused or threatened for simply doing their jobs.

**Our democracy is more fragile than ever. That's why we need you to listen to Sec. Griswold’s urgent call to action:**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.
I’m (almost) at a loss for words sharing this announcement with you, Peter: [**President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71260941/431642409/1436957821?refcode=20231009_em_fr_b1_hogg_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYxMDQwZi1kNjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEPFN-3HRny2kAPiCJwpHptyPNpP-IAcjyQ1lhL2x_4=) This win couldn’t have happened without the non-stop work of young leaders and activists across the country, including everyone at March For Our Lives. After four long years of protests, registering thousands of young voters, meeting after meeting, and MANY Zoom calls...we did it!!! I’ll share more about the work young leaders did to get us to this point, but first: [**_Please split a donation of $14 today between Leaders We Deserve and Raja to help carry this momentum forward and elect the leaders we deserve._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71260942/431642411/1436957821?refcode=20231009_em_fr_b1_hogg_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYxMDQwZi1kNjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEPFN-3HRny2kAPiCJwpHptyPNpP-IAcjyQ1lhL2x_4=) [**Here’s why we can draw a direct line from our work to the Biden administration’s new Office of Gun Violence Prevention, Peter.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71260944/431642413/1436957821?refcode=20231009_em_fr_b1_hogg_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYxMDQwZi1kNjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEPFN-3HRny2kAPiCJwpHptyPNpP-IAcjyQ1lhL2x_4=) [**When we talk about electing the “leaders we deserve,” we’re talking about folks like Maxwell Frost, one of our Advisory Board members and the first Gen-Z Member of Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71260946/431642415/1436957821?refcode=20231009_em_fr_b1_hogg_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYxMDQwZi1kNjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEPFN-3HRny2kAPiCJwpHptyPNpP-IAcjyQ1lhL2x_4=) Maxwell served as the first National Organizing Director for March For Our Lives and really helped us level-up our organizing work, especially on behalf of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. We did everything from asking presidential candidates about opening that department if they were elected at our 2020 Gun Safety Forum to sleeping on an office floor in the Virginia House of Delegates to ensure we were able to lobby on behalf of gun violence prevention, while armed white supremacists pointed guns at them through windows. The very first bill he introduced on the House floor was to establish a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Republicans blocked it, but he didn’t give up, and neither did we. Even when it became clear that NRA-sponsored politicians weren’t going to let his bill pass, President Biden stepped in. In fact, Vice President Kamala Harris introduced Maxwell at the official announcement of the Office of GVP, and Maxwell got to introduce President Biden!! **[And when we talk about leveraging the power of the youth vote, we’re talking about years of record-breaking youth voting turnout that led us to this announcement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71260947/431642417/1436957821?refcode=20231009_em_fr_b1_hogg_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYxMDQwZi1kNjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEPFN-3HRny2kAPiCJwpHptyPNpP-IAcjyQ1lhL2x_4=)** In the last five years, we went from having the most pro-NRA president in American history to the most pro-gun safety president in American history. Young people were critical in electing Biden. Our voices and votes matter. But we need to elect more young people to make sure we build power on the inside and outside of politics. [**_Help us carry this momentum and get more life-saving sh*t done by splitting a donation of $14 between Raja and Leaders We Deserve._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71260948/431642418/1436957821?refcode=20231009_em_fr_b1_hogg_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYxMDQwZi1kNjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEPFN-3HRny2kAPiCJwpHptyPNpP-IAcjyQ1lhL2x_4=) We should celebrate this momentous victory, Peter — but it doesn’t mean we can slow down or stop anytime soon. There is still so much work to be done, from tackling the climate crisis to expanding abortion access to building a country that isn’t run by the rich and powerful few. There is a long road ahead of us, and we need your help if we’re going to score more wins, elect more young people to office, and stop the fascist takeover of our country. [**_If you’re celebrating this victory, but are ready for the important work ahead, please split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Raja to help fund our work._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71260951/431642419/1436957821?refcode=20231009_em_fr_b1_hogg_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYxMDQwZi1kNjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEPFN-3HRny2kAPiCJwpHptyPNpP-IAcjyQ1lhL2x_4=) | | ****[Chip in $14 immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71260953/431642421/1436957821?refcode=20231009_em_fr_b1_hogg_30&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjYxMDQwZi1kNjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WEPFN-3HRny2kAPiCJwpHptyPNpP-IAcjyQ1lhL2x_4=)****

body:
These are the races to keep an eye on during the 2023 local elections in Washington State... | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=077edf2f49&e=6a281f566d)
---
| | Dear Peter,

By popular demand, the WAGOP is excited to release our **second list of bellwether school board races** for the 2023 elections taking place right now.

We have received overwhelmingly positive response from our supporters and candidates after sending out the first list of bellwether races. They want to see more! So, we’ve assembled a second list of **races to watch that all qualify our parameters of bellwether races****—based on geography, political lean, messaging efforts, etc.** Volunteers, contributions, messaging support and all other factors are increasing for great school board candidates like these, all around the state.

As with the first list, the races below are **leading indicator****s** of what we can expect heading into the 2024 statewide races. **Good results in these school board races** means our common-sense conservative message and ground game strategy are working.

These bellwether races are listed below, arranged by region—so you can find the races closest to you. **Click on the buttons below to** **learn more about these important campaigns** either from their campaign website, or from the county GOP website (not all local campaigns have campaign websites). You’ll find **candidate information, campaign event schedules, volunteer opportunities, and contribution** links.
_**Please also look on your county GOP website for voting recommendations in your hometown.**_

name: Sean Feucht
subject: PRAY FOR ISRAEL 🙏🇮🇱
body:
| | |
---
Dear Friend,
---
Pray for Israel!!! On multiple fronts, the nation of Israel is under attack, and we must cover our Israeli brothers and sisters up in a shield of prayer!!! God, protect Israel, and return all of all the Israeli women and children taken hostage by Hamas. God, deliver justice against Hamas now and until Israel is safe from attack!!! I'm reminded of King David's prayer in Psalm 122:I was glad when they said to me,
“Let us go to the house of the Lord!”Our feet have been standing
within your gates, O Jerusalem! Jerusalem—built as a city
that is bound firmly together,to which the tribes go up,
the tribes of the Lord,
as was decreed for Israel,
to give thanks to the name of the Lord.
There thrones for judgment were set,
the thrones of the house of David. **Pray for the peace of Jerusalem!**** “May they be secure who love you!**
**Peace be within your walls**
** and security within your towers!”**
For my brothers and companions' sake
I will say, “Peace be within you!”
For the sake of the house of the Lord our God,
I will seek your good.
---

---
Till All Hear,
---
---
Sean
---

clean_body: | | | Dear Friend, Pray for Israel!!! On multiple fronts, the nation of Israel is under attack, and we must cover our Israeli brothers and sisters up in a shield of prayer!!! God, protect Israel, and return all of all the Israeli women and children taken hostage by Hamas. God, deliver justice against Hamas now and until Israel is safe from attack!!! I'm reminded of King David's prayer in Psalm 122:I was glad when they said to me, “Let us go to the house of the Lord!”Our feet have been standing within your gates, O Jerusalem! Jerusalem—built as a city that is bound firmly together,to which the tribes go up, the tribes of the Lord, as was decreed for Israel, to give thanks to the name of the Lord. There thrones for judgment were set, the thrones of the house of David. Pray for the peace of Jerusalem! “May they be secure who love you! Peace be within your walls and security within your towers!” For my brothers and companions' sake I will say, “Peace be within you!” For the sake of the house of the Lord our God, I will seek your good. Till All Hear, Sean | | | | International Donors— donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

Happy Indigenous Peoples' Day!

I’m proud to have worked side-by-side with tribes in California and across the country to address their needs and increase their access to representation, and I look forward to continuing that important work.

While we celebrate the vibrant cultures and heritage of these communities, let us not lose sight of the **increasingly stark disparities that tribal communities face across the nation.**

We must remain fully committed to fulfilling the federal government's trust responsibility to Tribal Nations in California’s 25th district, and throughout the country through our efforts to improve access to health care, clean drinking water, and other essential services. **In those fights and many others, I am fortunate to be their partner.**

_**But there is still much to be done!**_

We can and will continue to push for increased health care and mental health services, critical broadband and infrastructure projects, and other important issues related to environmental protection, sustainability, and so much more.

I’m honored to work alongside them to honor tribal sovereignty, promote self-determination, and fulfill our trust responsibility to native tribes.

All the best,

Dr. Raul Ruiz

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: A note on Indigenous Peoples’ Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=552%2E52803%2EBwcxEm)

| | On this Indigenous Peoples’ Day, I encourage all Marylanders to join me in reflecting on the resilience, strength, and enduring cultural legacy of Indigenous Americans, who have contributed enormously to our rich national tapestry. Part of honoring Indigenous Peoples' Day is addressing the history behind it; the deep wounds, grave injustices, and generational pain our nation inflicted on Indigenous communities. That’s not an easy task. But confronting our history with clarity and compassion is the only path forward. That’s why we must teach the next generation of leaders about the injustices and indelible contributions made by Indigenous peoples to this country. We must elect leaders who respect the sovereignty of Indigenous nations, and ensure that Indigenous people enjoy the same opportunities, services, and standard of living as all Americans. We must ensure that Indigenous communities are actually heard by policymakers, and that real action is taken to address the unique and complex problems they face. **Today and every day, I'm committed to uplifting the health, well-being, and prosperity of our Indigenous neighbors. I hope you’ll join me in this endeavor.** Happy Indigenous Peoples' Day,
Angela Alsobrooks

name: United Rural Dems
subject: Tommy Tuberville, you’re an insult to rural Americans.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
| |
---
Peter, For hundreds of years, folks in rural America have stood up and served valiantly in our nation’s armed forces. From hills and hollers, from fields and folds, America’s security has always depended upon rural Americans who stood up and sacrificed to protect their countrymen. Which is why it’s so appalling to us that some, like Senator Tommy Tuberville from Alabama, would block military nominees and hamstring our national security. He’s single-handedly holding up our military readiness – and now, more than ever, that’s proving to be a danger to American families and a slap in the face to those who have served our country. **[Let’s show the GOP what real leadership looks like. Will you help us retake the U.S. House and return the dignity and respect that our veterans clean_body: | | Peter, For hundreds of years, folks in rural America have stood up and served valiantly in our nation’s armed forces. From hills and hollers, from fields and folds, America’s security has always depended upon rural Americans who stood up and sacrificed to protect their countrymen. Which is why it’s so appalling to us that some, like Senator Tommy Tuberville from Alabama, would block military nominees and hamstring our national security. He’s single-handedly holding up our military readiness – and now, more than ever, that’s proving to be a danger to American families and a slap in the face to those who have served our country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = It’s time to stop playing politics with our military. = United Rural Dems | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Back the Blue
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/KgZSV8zbN9gmErRVJ5apxw)
---
Fellow American, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our 'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/izqmm1mcaUlqJ5JddorW6Q)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/zmsPZTglDXfIkzekWe1ZAw)
---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "_defund the police_." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/skS_RWDo9NF996VXZyAM1A)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/mcew21OeUinp2JAuVjujSg)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/5iLGPBTXp3GdRH3ZSyelPA)
---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force._
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/4QeCfSmzjuNtvlA-4dcQ1A)
---
_The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation._
---
**[If you 'Back the Blue' - and believe that we must support local heroes - please sign the national petition right away.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/1pj9391vBH75xSYTm0hsbA)** While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/BsCrXpvEKSKE_JdgGJM61g)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDM0OCJ9/LSHR2bzjBtxWPqgAEp9amQ)
---
Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjgyLWY2MDMxMTYwZjFmZDQ5ZDJiMzc4MzJlYmY0ZmZkMDgwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Jzofw-A0EacIoGzX8dn5yA) to unsubscribe.
---
clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, I am so grateful for our police officers. As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "defund the police." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force. The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation. While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

Fellow Conservative,

Breaking polling released this week shows our fight to retake West Virginia’s Senate seat is closer than the media or political experts are claiming.

Polling shows if Joe Manchin tries to hide his radical leftist voting record by deceiving voters and running as an independent, _our lead in the polls shrinks to just 6% with a 4.5% margin of error._

With 8% of voters still undecided, **this race is effectively TIED.**

Victory in 2024 and flipping the U.S. Senate to Republican control will come down to who has the campaign operation and resources to win over undecided voters. **Right now Manchin is sitting on a war chest of $10 MILLION.**

[**I need your urgent help to maintain our narrow lead in the polls and build up the resources we need to reach undecided voters who will play a deciding role in who wins this seat. Will you pitch in $10, $20.24, $50, or MORE right now?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5230500c25f64ee5803e36a8a0a1cb29&_e=19fbvZeivCpAWMAqWiIVI6fgmoB0RZ5HWZUp0_WBTiKrpqP3T2oc6v5HECamyqdQe1o6Fd23ZMbJOVuQUJlIbZCUOp6-ar-tMqcKb8iiZMMNBa9J-Yf5cUpKlADbaaYIRyHLB-PLiiTa4ITZjcbU8iwBlqFIxlcE4eBxpYnOIYqsVodS5i8E60EOTeEPwrGcUHcA6mEEBvHPZvf0VIn9TPBs3hqiuG0JRFWCYEAhnOm24F35E8-kcmhSXXme94YypBjREdH4zzyYA3IQniUfl5Le9nKGuPfnqzHUvKyBuUek3DwcaANIYyT53aEXJA-VKm4Wjzm25k-h7Acj0Omk6n5V_W66bKy8CAw7VniCYDqrjp-TWfuAg2Sbqjg4U5cciisHEyfqi4O1fupkbNTKYg%3D%3D)

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

body:

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71262995/431649913/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231009_alert_gopnews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjkxOTlkMC1lMDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWxdfbM_A7WIQBRlcKFqhtyBrHbOokY3YGqNpG9Uudg=)

That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.

It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.
Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.

clean_body: Here’s what we were up to in September, friend | | = Hi friend, Summer is over, and it’s time to switch from t-shirts to sweaters. The leaves changing color and crisp cool evening air is something we can all get behind. While the seasons are changing, the House GOP is not. The chaotic GOP caucus has tripled down on loyalty to Trump over the American people. They're shutting down our government, and even proceeding with a sham impeachment inquiry into President Biden. Their priorities continue to be in all of the wrong places, but Bill’s aren’t, friend. = = Thank you, friend. And now for our September recap: = No matter how chaotic the GOP gets, Bill will continue to fight for and deliver for northern New Jerseyans and working families across America. Thank you for your support in September, friend. – Team Pascrell | The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families. Will you have Bill's back and chip in today? = = PAID FOR BY PASCRELL FOR CONGRESS, Inc. Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Pascrell for Congress P.O. Box 100 Teaneck, NJ 07666 United States

Peter,

It's been **ONE WEEK** since I launched my campaign!

From our electric announcement event last Monday night to the days following, I can feel the energy and momentum building for our campaign. **[It's clear that we have a real opportunity to make a difference.](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=db0fbbdff1884430ad21e101440a69f4&_e=5X90Z9FYCpSdJnxlyG3f8qTbA3ANvFa62lT7mfmKVypQRCcVliEcLqR7nkfcuPqGM3byASIV7wKFEwIWCBTm9ikwmmIj6ldJnSVfq566dBGpH4Hvgi6ABEuep4CiOnNBogTC9bEVAnm4oFPGGqkHkKgDflFmiH63jFduemH9DwFwjMNTZ-tU3kq9RQVWlwVFPPqNKxmU4OB9e9j8NPYUM9ATDGebxOb0CptSCPgtbXskTaakP72mWETTBTnj3-jseDTaDpQuNMAu_GFxif7e7BLoU_lpay7o5JWGkYvUiPxakT1g4EcjsM06iau7HhmpP2tpBDcZ-eevaS0zQqej2x5cxJi5tiulSyGP3J92QGc7zWniVvSfdV3bmiGDy5RK "It’s clear that we have a real opportunity to make a difference.")**

I know we have a real fight ahead, which is why I'm hoping to have your steadfast support. The Democrat Machine will do whatever it takes to defeat me, and they have millions in the bank to spend against me. **[So, I'm counting on proud Americans just like you to help us win this critical race!](http://links.goppatriot.com/u/click?_t=42a94c663c6c423587715e465a367b7d&_m=db0fbbdff1884430ad21e101440a69f4&_e=5X90Z9FYCpSdJnxlyG3f8qTbA3ANvFa62lT7mfmKVypQRCcVliEcLqR7nkfcuPqGM3byASIV7wKFEwIWCBTm9ikwmmIj6ldJnSVfq566dBGpH4Hvgi6ABEuep4CiOnNBogTC9bEVAnm4oFPGGqkHkKgDflFmiH63jFduemH9DwFwjMNTZ-tU3kq9RQVWlwVFPPqNKxmU4OB9e9j8NPYUM9ATDGebxOb0CptSCPgtbXs4uQFUc0i0AgIk2fFfESig6V0MXC8oDcYjzNwm6Y8Vw3RoemFUBBxgRM3XwWAESaOHW8_Wo6wOWLWESlxIUg9IIxbpa6fgK_fKTwN3MhGmoko_SEdj1CnhXZOJedRHnxYoJxN6C1jdKJ0XBlWY0DtJ "So, I’m counting on proud Americans just like you to help us win this critical race!")**

Thank you so much. I can't wait to see what the future of the campaign has in store with you by our side!

With you in the fight,

George Logan

From our electric announcement event last Monday night to the days following, I can feel the energy and momentum building for our campaign. "It’s clear that we have a real opportunity to make a difference." | "George Logan Announcement Event" We can't take a single day for granted. The Democrats used their lies and dirty tricks to defeat me by just 2,000 votes last election, and facing a rematch with my far-Left Democrat opponent will be no easy feat. Our campaign needs proper funding and resources to keep the momentum going. That is why "our team has set a goal of finding 2,000 supporters to step up and become Founding Members of my campaign TODAY." "Will you chip in ASAP to secure your spot as a Team Logan Founding Member? All it takes is a gift of $5, $10, $15, or any amount to make a significant impact." | | "Become a Founding Member" | | "Become a Founding Member" I know we have a real fight ahead, which is why I'm hoping to have your steadfast support. The Democrat Machine will do whatever it takes to defeat me, and they have millions in the bank to spend against me. name: John
subject: Honoring Indigenous Peoples' Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Today, as we celebrate Indigenous Peoples' Day, we take a moment to honor the history, culture, and contributions of Native Americans and Indigenous peoples across Colorado and across America.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=3357950dc0e740a59fdf06d761d5349c&_e=xVGjI7yV0XS8dWNqCnQcGKfMySsHzGuHg3zr-fLke5KZ8SpKEsxRpeSqLfsSaMc6c-Uvf649QipBlo52Bm6L1EDjcaoKYHdkmjube6jpgFcSnd2q5TYjWWIEZ844dPP_J7iNAHduFyVnJRtFRRWs2YXxV9pbkEx4ldSsjIxT0KLe732wsXpFrzbnE_xdeA52gwiR8mHZ21wFzGJSozY73w%3D%3D) Folks, Today, as we celebrate Indigenous Peoples' Day, we take a moment to honor the history, culture, and contributions of Native Americans and Indigenous peoples across Colorado and across America. Indigenous Peoples' Day is a reminder to ensure that the rights, traditions, and sovereignty of Indigenous communities are respected and protected. Today also serves as a reminder of the work that still lies ahead. We must continue to strive for justice, equality, and opportunity for all, including addressing the challenges that many Indigenous communities face, such as access to quality healthcare, education, and economic opportunities. Thank you for joining us in recognizing Indigenous Peoples' Day. Together, we can build a more equitable and just future for everyone. Sincerely, John Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: A dark turn in the Middle East
body:
The American axis continues doing what it does best: killing people for corporate profit, while writers & editors spin the news to obscure human rights abuses enabled from Washington to Tel Aviv
| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..uJNewESkSnrB5hCiywUF72H8aED_sEZDFY1Lg2t1Aio?) for more
