# [A dark turn in the Middle East](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137818167&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3ODE4MTY3LCJpYXQiOjE2OTY4ODU0MjAsImV4cCI6MTY5OTQ3NzQyMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wKhCaC3h1DB7v0_09hBZ7KIT96rupKtVfOSU1eZb5V0)
### The American axis continues doing what it does best: killing people for corporate profit, while writers & editors spin the news to obscure human rights abuses enabled from Washington to Tel Aviv
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/e9930a4b-9026-44f1-9f3e-60d36a14bd00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Oct 9| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e9930a4b-9026-44f1-9f3e-60d36a14bd00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137818167&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3ODE4MTY3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5Njg4NTQyMCwiZXhwIjoxNjk5NDc3NDIwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XDgsbppdckYXgIa6pobL_AdReeGw0UYCRBHZCOD96g0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137818167&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3ODE4MTY3LCJpYXQiOjE2OTY4ODU0MjAsImV4cCI6MTY5OTQ3NzQyMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wKhCaC3h1DB7v0_09hBZ7KIT96rupKtVfOSU1eZb5V0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137818167&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3ODE4MTY3LCJpYXQiOjE2OTY4ODU0MjAsImV4cCI6MTY5OTQ3NzQyMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wKhCaC3h1DB7v0_09hBZ7KIT96rupKtVfOSU1eZb5V0)
---
| | [](https://substack..cEAL1uuEJ2Vc8dDndSKnd2AKBYVrANeUIbywTY9DKtw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/a-dark-turn-in-the-middle-east?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
This weekend's escalation of violence in occupied Palestine continues a disturbing pattern, yet journalists across the west continue to mischaracterize the facts. From longstanding historical background to reporting on the most recent conflagration, the one thing most western news reports have in common is that they continue to spread disinformation favorable to Wall Street, the Pentagon, and their henchmen from Washington to Tel Aviv.
While offering yet another example, that pattern is sadly nothing new. The price, ultimately, is paid by innocent people--while weapons companies, American policymakers, and the government agencies that they insulate laugh all the way to the bank.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bc21537a-166e-405a-9be7-8c850c783523?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I haven't been able to find any open source images from this weekend's conflict. This photo is [from Wikipedia](https://substack.com/redirect/06c24ae4-daed-4d8c-84f1-9814313e75cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) depicting an Israeli strike on an ambulance in the Gaza Strip on a previous occasion.
More Jews died this weekend than on any single day since the Holocaust.
Yet vastly--beyond an order of magnitude--more Palestinians have died over the course of Israel's occupation of Palestine.
Lost in reporting about this weekend's events is an accurate picture of the situation, the roots of the escalating conflict, and the U.S. interests that continue to drive unnecessary and preventable violence.
### **" Journalism" and disinformation**
[One](https://substack.com/redirect/37c60f54-a70c-49d5-8bf9-a9429dca40fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after [another](https://substack.com/redirect/8f762a89-1b1e-4d02-b6af-70019772ded0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the repeated narrative that the coordinated Hamas incursion into Israel this weekend was an "[unprovoked](https://substack.com/redirect/58ffcfa5-6e8b-45a0-becf-688abffd7077?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" example of "[terrorism](https://substack.com/redirect/af2a7cb5-8816-4808-a480-5febd32422d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" appeared in media outlets across the United States. That characterization is demonstrably false, yet it plays a key role in enabling one conflict after another.
I write to expose what many professional writers get paid to obscure. This post is public, so please share it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137818167&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3ODE4MTY3LCJpYXQiOjE2OTY4ODU0MjAsImV4cCI6MTY5OTQ3NzQyMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wKhCaC3h1DB7v0_09hBZ7KIT96rupKtVfOSU1eZb5V0)
When U.S. government sources described Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine as "unprovoked," western media parroted their claims and left them unchecked despite the [Pentagon-backed Maidan coup in 2014](https://substack.com/redirect/ecce5073-9b62-4627-afe4-0d1057b21145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that set the stage for Putin's invasion. The history from 2014 was not only crucial to place the 2022 invasion in context, but offered a very definition of provocation.
Similarly, writers & editors widely described the 9/11 attacks in 2001 as "unprovoked," despite unapologetic American human rights abuses throughout the Global South for decades. One might think that the attacks happening on the [precise anniversary of a CIA coup](https://substack.com/redirect/14bda9b7-1a82-4b1b-b114-ce41222ec3d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Chile might have forced reporters to offer some context, but that presumption underestimates the ignorance of editors.
Provocation is the Pentagon's stock & trade. Transparency could enable the public to make better decisions over how our military is used, but the two institutions responsible for ensuring it--Congress and the press--are both thoroughly co-opted.
In fact, Hamas' incursion was [far from unprovoked](https://substack.com/redirect/3a676f65-959f-4470-8a83-b4988ba9d1f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The last 70 years have been one of continual provocation enabled not only by Israeli human rights abuses, but also crucial American support.
Gaza, in particular, has long been the world's largest open-air prison. In [an open letter](https://substack.com/redirect/03958560-c13c-4f55-81f4-0edb1d16a03e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the U.N. Security Council, a coalition of Palestinian human rights groups noted this weekend that "Israel has carried out at least six massive military offensives since 2008, which have rendered the Gaza Strip uninhabitable. Between 2010 and 2019, the UN Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs (OCHA) recorded 3,624 Palestinians and 203 Israelis killed, and 103,207 Palestinians and 4,642 Israelis injured."
Beyond the mounting casualties, more than [100,000 Gazans have been displaced](https://substack.com/redirect/cf3b74bb-4e69-49f3-8212-c8236d43422c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) since the latest fighting began this weekend.
Perhaps it should not surprise anyone that the term "unprovoked" appeared across U.S. media to describe a response to three generations of armed occupation and unrelenting human rights abuses. The same voices who continually demonstrate such charity towards Israel's human rights abuses are the same ones that [defer](https://substack.com/redirect/7142d477-5efb-48b5-b694-9ba6ed1f1338?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to [those](https://substack.com/redirect/c8f51d24-9a20-4234-80e3-feb254fb9e08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by [Washington](https://substack.com/redirect/784f4897-3873-457e-94cc-fb78caaba607?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Unfortunately, ignoring Israel's seemingly limitless provocations is just one among many examples of disinformation spread by American writers and editors.
### **A "religious" conflict rooted in resources **
Growing up in the U.S., I thought for most of my life that the conflict between Israel and Palestine is, at root, a religious one. That is another example of disinformation to which the western press has long been committed.
This conflict is in no way religious. It has always been a conflict about resources--with an ecocidal dimension.
First, Jews and Muslims have no fundamental tension inherent in our belief systems. Islam relies on Jewish texts, and the Qur'an [explicitly](https://substack.com/redirect/5e81088a-6386-447b-9292-4d572b7b8fcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) adopts their teachings. Jews and Muslims stood as [allies](https://substack.com/redirect/d539d458-7a65-4383-a67a-9c4b5dc4fad2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for a millennium as various European powers compelled religious adherence from their subjects.
The tension that has emerged in the past century is rooted in geopolitics, British imperialism, and the human rights abuses that ensued after [the Nakba in 1948](https://substack.com/redirect/cbef6d7c-6f7f-4f83-8d67-ca09ee741060?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Second, Christian Palestinians have suffered from Israeli occupation and human rights abuses to the same extent as Muslims. That's much of why so many Palestinians in the U.S. are Christian--they were the ones that Israel allowed to leave.
When the Israeli "Defense" Force [murdered](https://substack.com/redirect/619e68d1-16bf-4fb7-b37f-08ebb01267de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a 24 year-old American student named Rachel Corrie in 2003, it wasn't because of her faith. It was because her defense of human rights threatened to expose international crimes, to which Israel added by killing her--not to mention untold numbers of Palestinians killed in the 20 years since Ms. Corrie died trying to defend human rights for which [our nation once fought a world war](https://substack.com/redirect/2e3077ea-9681-4bff-aad1-ad4b4be7d259?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The most obvious demonstration of the economic roots of the conflict between Israel and Palestine is the Israeli practice of [destroying](https://substack.com/redirect/1ff6e75f-7f4f-48be-99f8-13b44600fbbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) olive trees on which Palestinians have relied for up to thousands of years. There is no religious reason to destroy thousand year-old trees--only economic & political ones.
The fact that Israel's human rights abuses of Palestinians include the ecocidal destruction of priceless ancient food forests simply confirms what a close analysis of a map should reveal. Israel's occupation of Palestine is (quite literally) rooted, ultimately, in water.
In any desert, water is priceless. In Palestine, it is also routinely stolen. The West Bank's aquifers have been [effectively seized](https://substack.com/redirect/28712405-6423-4d62-9120-d8eea4b7b800?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Israel, which officially uses 73% of their water, while allowing illegal Jewish settlers to use another 10%--leaving the West Bank's Palestinians just 17%.
No religion counsels stealing your neighbors' water.
Has this post informed you in any way? If so, please subscribe--whether for free, or with a paid subscription. I hope to publish more often and in more channels, so if you are able to afford a subscription, joining me will help expand my work.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fwLTsGj9pfUmWw6nSvyh_tWSQU5kAf93x_-jEQNq7p4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=137818167)
### **" Asymmetric conflict" and disproportionality**
Among the aspects of this weekend's attack by Hamas that surprised observers around the world was its [operational sophistication](https://substack.com/redirect/f0c0b810-5059-4746-b0e5-8eb9b6c444e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) despite technological disadvantages. Yet, while Hamas claimed greater tactical success than any Palestinian response to the Israeli occupation since it began 75 years ago, it pales relative to the [intensity and scale](https://substack.com/redirect/c76297c6-8ee9-4bee-821b-f741fbb9393b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the Israeli response.
Hamas insurgents have [deliberately targeted civilians](https://substack.com/redirect/548d6cfa-0887-44de-b315-ce22a468ff2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They have launched rockets at Israeli settlements, killed victims--including [at least nine Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/53cea403-917d-4ec8-afec-9303010ac830?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--by the dozens at a music festival, and taken hundreds of hostages.
Meanwhile, the Israeli military has also deliberately targeted civilians--but, unlike Hamas, it has done so en masse. [The Israeli blockade of Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/87c249d1-da63-4982-b491-5598a99f0e64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was already suffocating before Tel Aviv announced its escalation today into [an outright siege](https://substack.com/redirect/f8815c37-bcfe-4ce8-83ac-70d6c8e8b3a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), sealing off Gaza nearly entirely. Meanwhile, Israel has [indiscriminately](https://substack.com/redirect/e368abb0-dc15-4af4-9526-1c3d723a0d72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) bombed apartment buildings, [targeted ambulances](https://substack.com/redirect/a6b678f5-4792-49b3-8da5-b260f8f6e985?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and even [refugee camps](https://substack.com/redirect/f490ec30-e07c-4031-a854-ee3a943d4b79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It's worth recalling that, for months earlier this year, Israel was rocked by [unprecedented domestic dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/55714a48-97a1-4d65-99d2-92aa2a573bc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) responding to Prime Minister Netanyahu's attempt to [erode its democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/43a2e2dd-b191-4e6d-b8eb-68eb908c6eb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and impose an [increasingly authoritarian](https://substack.com/redirect/6aadd1bf-2bf1-46c2-8b9f-064d4187baae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) form of government--one disregarding not only the rights of Palestinians, but also those of Israelis.
Lurking in the corner, unnamed by seemingly every writer covering this weekend's events, is the set of institutions from Langley to Wall Street that have handsomely profited from violence--and continue to do so to this day.
### **Filling Wall Street 's pockets**
America's disdain for democracy & human rights is neither new nor an object of history. The Pentagon and agencies including the CIA have been involved in dozens of crews to topple democracies around the world in the service of expanding Wall Street's profits.
That pattern continues today.
The [2022 military coup in Niger continued the pattern](https://substack.com/redirect/2c48aa59-c0bb-4003-924e-6071742d0f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as did another constitutional coup in the same year in my native country. The State Department continues to lie about Washington's efforts to [remove a democratically elected leader](https://substack.com/redirect/84941eab-dbed-48a4-a70c-55d3be673c1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Islamabad because he refused to support America's war for profit in Ukraine.
Pakistan is the country from which my parents fled due to religious discrimination 40 years ago. Like the instability that ensued across the region after they left, that discrimination was also fueled by the Pentagon, which backed [a military dictator with a notorious hatred](https://substack.com/redirect/bb60bd52-a05b-4ccf-aa16-7c3a62ae9742?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for people who share my faith.
The pattern of Pentagon intervention there, and around the rest of the world, [particularly Latin America](https://substack.com/redirect/ad41e218-50b0-4bfb-ad2c-70247d5fb5e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), is much of what prompted my campaigns for Congress to challenge a [key enabler](https://substack.com/redirect/8f1eedb3-1981-4eec-97a4-40720bf9a167?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of American foreign-policy abuses.
I was grateful when some reporters highlighted my [stance against militarism](https://substack.com/redirect/b3023f46-7051-4f7f-a1a6-d13fbc73ed9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during my 2020 campaign. The concerns I raised then apply no less today than they did at the time.
Unfortunately, however, America has learned nothing from the pattern [established](https://substack.com/redirect/e18b1552-8123-4fb7-9c08-86a48d9b9286?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (and repeatedly [reinforced](https://substack.com/redirect/9cf77a91-3a2b-4dc8-b094-906eb58d0bd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) over the last 75 years. Democrats appear to be especially proud of their ignorance: just last week, the Governor of California [passed over a renowned advocate for peace](https://substack.com/redirect/09cdc8d4-6202-4ad4-9bb4-fd087dbf8082?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who has represented Oakland in the House of Representatives for a generation, to instead embrace a figure with a troubling history and a disturbingly comfortable relationship with the corporate centrists who lead the Democratic Party.
On the one hand, [some](https://substack.com/redirect/3fa4981d-a4dd-4550-9dd4-fe78f85767cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Republicans appear to have taken heed of the country's longstanding stance opposing wars for profit. While that may seem like an encouraging sign, I don't frankly trust any of them since their claim to oppose the Pentagon's interests is ultimately both partisan and convenient. Most of them would start a war with China in a heartbeat, and limit their concerns to Ukraine when the entire project of what Americans call "defense" is irredeemably corrupt.
Ultimately, war is America's most lucrative business.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3b416ad-06c9-48b1-ac65-9f61f79d0a78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Meanwhile, Members of Congress have been buying stocks of [corporate weapons manufacturers](https://substack.com/redirect/a59de003-66a7-4144-80d1-344df8a457ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), yet again presenting [conflicts of interests](https://substack.com/redirect/7ff20f92-06be-440f-96bb-ee6d342c624b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that remain widely unreported [despite](https://substack.com/redirect/ac102b43-61df-4ff2-b176-8d0aed17d12b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) their thorough [documentation](https://substack.com/redirect/e3202324-1748-4355-9f0f-50e3cfb3e48e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### **Neither surveillance nor weapons can ensure security**
Many voices have described this weekend's tragic events as an "[intelligence failure](https://substack.com/redirect/e28d5448-56c9-418f-8f12-280af4fea067?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," while ultimately remaining charitable to Israel, its intelligence establishment, and the methods on which it relies.
Paid subscribers can access a preview of my next post. It will explore some implications of this weekend's events for regarding civil liberties within the United States, and a debate in Washington that remains 25 years overdue...

The American axis continues doing what it does best: killing people for corporate profit, while writers & editors spin the news to obscure human rights abuses enabled from Washington to Tel Aviv | | | Oct 9| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | This weekend's escalation of violence in occupied Palestine continues a disturbing pattern, yet journalists across the west continue to mischaracterize the facts. From longstanding historical background to reporting on the most recent conflagration, the one thing most western news reports have in common is that they continue to spread disinformation favorable to Wall Street, the Pentagon, and their henchmen from Washington to Tel Aviv. While offering yet another example, that pattern is sadly nothing new. The price, ultimately, is paid by innocent people--while weapons companies, American policymakers, and the government agencies that they insulate laugh all the way to the bank. | | ---|---|--- I haven't been able to find any open source images from this weekend's conflict. This photo is depicting an Israeli strike on an ambulance in the Gaza Strip on a previous occasion. More Jews died this weekend than on any single day since the Holocaust. Yet vastly--beyond an order of magnitude--more Palestinians have died over the course of Israel's occupation of Palestine. Lost in reporting about this weekend's events is an accurate picture of the situation, the roots of the escalating conflict, and the U.S. interests that continue to drive unnecessary and preventable violence. " Journalism" and disinformation after , the repeated narrative that the coordinated Hamas incursion into Israel this weekend was an "" example of "" appeared in media outlets across the United States. That characterization is demonstrably false, yet it plays a key role in enabling one conflict after another. I write to expose what many professional writers get paid to obscure. This post is public, so please share it. When U.S. government sources described Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine as "unprovoked," western media parroted their claims and left them unchecked despite the that set the stage for Putin's invasion. The history from 2014 was not only crucial to place the 2022 invasion in context, but offered a very definition of provocation. Similarly, writers & editors widely described the 9/11 attacks in 2001 as "unprovoked," despite unapologetic American human rights abuses throughout the Global South for decades. One might think that the attacks happening on the in Chile might have forced reporters to offer some context, but that presumption underestimates the ignorance of editors. Provocation is the Pentagon's stock & trade. Transparency could enable the public to make better decisions over how our military is used, but the two institutions responsible for ensuring it--Congress and the press--are both thoroughly co-opted. In fact, Hamas' incursion was . The last 70 years have been one of continual provocation enabled not only by Israeli human rights abuses, but also crucial American support. Gaza, in particular, has long been the world's largest open-air prison. In to the U.N. Security Council, a coalition of Palestinian human rights groups noted this weekend that "Israel has carried out at least six massive military offensives since 2008, which have rendered the Gaza Strip uninhabitable. Unfortunately, ignoring Israel's seemingly limitless provocations is just one among many examples of disinformation spread by American writers and editors. A "religious" conflict rooted in resources Growing up in the U.S., I thought for most of my life that the conflict between Israel and Palestine is, at root, a religious one. That is another example of disinformation to which the western press has long been committed. This conflict is in no way religious. It has always been a conflict about resources--with an ecocidal dimension. First, Jews and Muslims have no fundamental tension inherent in our belief systems. Islam relies on Jewish texts, and the Qur'an adopts their teachings. Jews and Muslims stood as for a millennium as various European powers compelled religious adherence from their subjects. The tension that has emerged in the past century is rooted in geopolitics, British imperialism, and the human rights abuses that ensued after . Israel's occupation of Palestine is (quite literally) rooted, ultimately, in water. In any desert, water is priceless. In Palestine, it is also routinely stolen. The West Bank's aquifers have been by Israel, which officially uses 73% of their water, while allowing illegal Jewish settlers to use another 10%--leaving the West Bank's Palestinians just 17%. subject: The consequences of Republican chaos

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_100623_Chaos_Act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_100623_Chaos_Act]
Friend,
Saying that Congress was in chaos last week would be an understatement.
Republican extremists recently drove our country to the brink of a government shutdown. We narrowly avoided it, thanks to the hard work of Democrats, but only until November. Then, on Tuesday, Matt Gaetz and his far-right cronies ousted Kevin McCarthy as Speaker — the first time a Speaker of the House has ever been removed from office by House members.
This chaos has nothing to do with the Democratic party. Instead, it’s Congressional Republicans who are too busy fighting each other to govern.
This is a disservice to the American people, plain and simple.
Michael is working hard to pass legislation that supports the people back home — from permanently expanding the Child Tax Credit to taking on the Big Tech companies invading our privacy and corrupting our democracy.
But getting this done requires leaders in Congress who will choose progress over partisan fights. And when Republicans are in chaos — and preventing Congress from actually governing — we all suffer the consequences.
We’re calling on Republicans in Congress to get back to work for the American people. Will you join us by signing on now? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_100423_obstruction]

Together, we can make a more just, equitable country for everyone.

Did you see this headline? | _**“The Republican Party’s plan to rule the state of Wisconsin forever, explained”**_

It’s no secret that Wisconsin Republicans have rigged the rules in their favor for decades. But now, Republicans have a plan that will keep Democrats out of power... _forever._
But we have our own plan to stop them, so we’re calling on our most dedicated supporters for help. Can you own a piece of this fight as we go head-to-head with far-right Republicans?

**FIRST,** Republicans have held a tight grip on Wisconsin’s state legislature for years. When Judge Janet Protasiewicz was elected to the state Supreme Court, liberals flipped the court’s ideological balance, and Democrats regained a much-needed check on the GOP’s power. **It was a huge victory thanks to grassroots donors who supported Democrats’ efforts.**
**THEN,** a lawsuit was filed to deal a blow to Republican gerrymandering. If it’s successful, this lawsuit could put _all_**132 sitting legislators up for election next year – giving Democrats an opportunity to strip Republicans of their supermajority. **
**NOW:** Republicans are threatening to impeach duly-elected Judge Protasiewicz less than two months after taking office – **it’s an undemocratic power grab.**
**The future of abortion, voting rights, our democracy, and so much more is on the line. We must mobilize ASAP to end the GOP’s reign of terror in Wisconsin once and for all.**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Stop Arctic drilling from harming Indigenous communities
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039829?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | On __**Indigenous Peoples’ Day**__ , we honor the history and culture of Native American people including the preservation of their lands and natural resources. For far too long, greedy fossil fuel companies have exploited Indigenous communities for profit, like in the Arctic where increased oil drilling is adversely hurting local native tribes, wildlife, and the planet. The Biden Administration has announced new oil and gas drilling rules for two major regions of the Arctic —**Alaska’s National Petroleum Reserve** and the **Arctic National Wildlife Refuge.** However, the proposed rules have some serious gaps that would allow for loopholes that Big Oil and Gas can use for new developments in these locations. The Administration has also failed to acknowledge the impact on the livelihood of the local Indigenous Gwich’in people, whose way of life is under threat by new fossil fuel developments. If we’re going to protect the Arctic from further fossil fuel destruction we urgently need **5,614 activists** like you to speak up today and urge President Biden to **STRENGTHEN protections against Arctic drilling** — _**without any loopholes!**_ [_**Friend, can we count on you to add your name by our petition deadline at 11:59 P.M. tonight?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039830?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039831?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Arctic is on the frontlines of the climate crisis. The region is warming _**TWICE AS FAST**_ as the rest of the world, and animals like polar bears and caribou are in serious danger. Alaska’s National Petroleum Reserve is the single largest unit of public lands in the country, _spanning nearly 23 million acres!_ It serves as a critical habitat for migratory birds, brown bears, threatened polar bears, walruses, and more.
The survival of vulnerable Arctic species isn’t just critical for biodiversity and the environment but also for local **Indigenous tribes who rely on a healthy Arctic ecosystem for their way of life.** Arctic drilling goes against protections listed under _**National Environmental Policy Act**_ (NEPA) — a law that requires federal agencies to assess the environmental effects of any proposed actions. This includes an evaluation of any related social and economic impacts on nearby residents, like the Indigenous communities in the Arctic.
The greedy fossil fuel industry won’t stop destroying the Arctic and threatening all those who live there unless the government takes bold action. **We’re running out of time to turn the pressure up, Friend, so please don’t hesitate.** [_**SIGN NOW to tell President Biden to oppose oil and gas development in the Arctic immediately! >>**_ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039832?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2039833?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking action,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: I've met Fidel Castro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American,

When Democrats try to sell socialism to us, I can’t help but become FURIOUS. I know the price of socialism - because I’ve gone toe to toe with dictators like Fidel Castro. _And I’d be lying if I didn’t say that I could see the alarming parallels between his tyranny and the agenda of far-left Democrats today._ **For years, America has been a beacon of hope for those trying to escape socialism. If we fall to the same evil, we will have nowhere else to turn.** **[Please, join me today to DEFEAT socialism in America once and for all.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=8464e5418a394ab4a64f04e904af5db9&_e=l9jkf8YkQ608GcE5OoE-tkShsjA-2A2vxf2-h2M1DTGMCZZLsecN-FHB6KP7wN9zTzmvyTHolwS_-ZWhIB-xY44HZ0rOtk_pXuq6ZM-8URGcvzKnGU1lxDQrjdndh0YNI63g6_JQYicXYBnnD7SizNMo_CcPfwQ5AcdVlD2NAicfl1M6CvNYZP2VDmGpoA0oge1DwwwKtvqlInTOaArNHjq4bDzGmdxZpS0VDyCCGzOJtRNqFoAXRWHzRsqZQXTqtdlmDun5IN_bVJHHQofa5jvcw0cMagiHLcdKNJd35W_5bLubjnwt2tgfHNqqaQlXuTUlj7kMCTiMcAnHiFAphU0gypnj9hFGqE6jVUYD0vU%3D)**
---
[**DONATE TO STOP SOCIALISM**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=8464e5418a394ab4a64f04e904af5db9&_e=l9jkf8YkQ608GcE5OoE-tkShsjA-2A2vxf2-h2M1DTGMCZZLsecN-FHB6KP7wN9zTzmvyTHolwS_-ZWhIB-xY44HZ0rOtk_pXuq6ZM-8URGcvzKnGU1lxDQrjdndh0YNI63g6_JQYicXYBnnD7SizNMo_CcPfwQ5AcdVlD2NAicfl1M6CvNYZP2VDmGpoA0oge1DwwwKtvqlInTOaArNHlYVMUBKJs9069ma6hreGMc0hxoOKS6VD2mbq0VyMtAB8EKKGpSmsnq-EPf64K2v2dLwvEL-jqaqMHE5VLshKad9j4fuVsb3hOArzZFgjGSgVTj9YQhWJNvvFWb7VZNf4UuAtbnLtTcJNVrlfr3-P0M%3D)
---
Right now, our government is in shambles. Our border is in crisis, inflation is out of control, our liberties are under assault, and the Left wants to turn us against each other because of where we come from or the color of our skin. _In times of crisis, it can be tempting to try and consolidate power to bring back order - but I can tell you from experience that it is NEVER the answer._ **There’s only one way to stop the insanity: strong, conservative leadership that gives power back to the people and our community leaders instead of fat cats in Washington.** I’m on a mission to be that kind of leader, but it’s put a target on my back, and the Left is eager to kick me out of my seat and replace me with a socialist. **I’m not about to let that happen, and I know you won’t either.** **[I can’t take on socialism alone. body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter, we were just ranked as one of the most competitive races in the whole country.
The National Journal just released the Hotline’s initial 2024 House Power Rankings, which lists the House seats that are most likely to flip next year. AZ-06 was #11, making Juan Ciscomani the eighth most vulnerable Republican currently in the House.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_100923_NJRanking_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_100923_NJRanking_act]
Not only is this the most flippable seat in Arizona, but Ciscomani is also ranked ahead of other vulnerable Republicans like Lauren Boebert, who only won by 546 votes in 2022.
It’s not hard to see why Ciscomani is in jeopardy of losing his seat. Rather than focusing on the issues that matter to AZ-06 voters, he caters to the fringe to ban abortion nationwide, cut Social Security, and slash funding for education.
This ranking is great for our momentum — but it will only bring more Republican attention and money into this race.
We’re running a grassroots campaign, which means we’re relying on donations from folks like you.
Kirsten will fight for our working families, seniors, and veterans in Congress. Will you help her flip Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District blue by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_100923_NJRanking_act]

This ranking is great for our momentum — but it will only bring more Republican attention and money into this race. We’re running a grassroots campaign, which means we’re relying on donations from folks like you. Kirsten will fight for our working families, seniors, and veterans in Congress. Will you help her flip Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District blue by chipping in now? Team Engel [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? subject: What do you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

From climate change to health care, public safety to the rising cost of living, our country faces many pressing challenges. As a grassroots-driven campaign, hearing from you helps us not only understand what everyday voters are dealing with but also what you most want to see prioritized in Congress.

There is no shortage of issues that we need to tackle, but the ones most important to us, are the ones that matter most to you.

Take a few minutes to take our Congressional Priorities Survey today >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dQSK5NRTpEuCk46fS2M7KA2]

Before being elected to the Arizona Legislature, Raquel worked for over a decade as a community organizer. She spent her time knocking on doors, meeting with people, hearing so many stories and concerns. And that’s what this campaign is all about – centering our community’s stories.

Hearing about the most pressing issues in your life helps us run a better campaign. Take our priorities survey today! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dQSK5NRTpEuCk46fS2M7KA2]

Muchas gracias,
Team Terán

TAKE OUR SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dQSK5NRTpEuCk46fS2M7KA2]

Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.

She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.

Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_100923_az03survey]

Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States

name: Working Families Party
subject: Out-raising and out-organizing Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Across the board, WFP's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O'Rourke are outperforming expectations — out-raising their Republican opponents, drawing endorsements from high-profile elected officials and labor unions, including Sen. John Fetterman and Gov. Josh Shap | | | We’re smashing records, Peter. In Philadelphia’s closely-watched City Council race, WFP's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke have briskly _outraised_ their Republican opponents. Together, they’ve set a new fundraising record for third-party candidates in the city, with over $715,000 raised for their campaign — **the vast majority from grassroots small-dollar donors.** We’re proud of these numbers because they show two things:
1. We’re powered and funded by real people and communities inspired to give what they can, when they can.
2. We have the momentum to win.

**We need to make sure that Kendra and Nic have all the resources they need to crank their on-the-ground organizing into gear and reach as many voters as possible before Election Day.** [**That's why we're asking: Can you help us get out the vote for Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke and make the Working Families Party the dominant minority party in one of the largest cities in the country? Split a contribution of $10 or any amount between their campaigns today — what we're able to accomplish depends on your grassroots support.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wwKjt_DxSMu7LtKJf8wB_zXZd_pSb_ceqaunxTDqSYbKgLBpctKBRA89DwR8ntAFaX0lpzbttOyUxGWEvKljJoIBNG7tQEGdic41o_EV6QyqtGZIhLvIq3qOXUiPrk91q6forVA50L2_ZYZNKr2tXz3j9oWlDnnE5Hzm2FAa3L-NR8H2lGRH2DlrnUHnr4Umful3XimI-XQofjqUs2Vb9QPGk6SJLvjynsuZ92Uk7UxkXlqIbg7JidRs9yA4iF2ImM_hs_nWxFeLvD6urD4bN2R7O3ZC7-LgMj3pFbn9nKhQ2MDElzfC2VRgmra5dcSL0eO7mCctg32o1UCe7KkCSoqZcUa7OW17EALqjLULPu5kaaHBn5wJIvQbaP6mIp1EV79meSMPE1OwzZD3nRFT6C/40a/oB_o3dJeQTCYLD0bC-Bq2A/h0/8arKkVjEs01FBSHL0hhCdEZ37RbggsXcsZcZI8UWTAI) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wwKjt_DxSMu7LtKJf8wB_zXZd_pSb_ceqaunxTDqSYbKgLBpctKBRA89DwR8ntAFboLcBdm7isjX-PA5kaGsg8Jzn10SzL8Hng8ElJWLsj37D22yK8i0b4TdPxNEJMcAPKimv8vbt5Lt8FfQ5Fp-MYZ2p1HYR4RpbMjIutDAHDj6WHBj0PU8rO3jtQ3I6O2Iea57aXFefCPyLL5bepgr5QfIuGq33-4PUZU-0LFyjHpEau1HnIr9msngDy2g1xWpYhMrhTMXWC2J2FX6xj5ovU4i-oGlooJD4EY4LtrNzcAslhXa2CMOdwcChPfTkdQ-YPH6aArmgi9e-1_sxQvQp5rRTJj8-HkqD4kRV8PR5x0UjPMyXx9Ic5CGQuLsl1BvVRLvYgU_tskniuwsttOBPK/40a/oB_o3dJeQTCYLD0bC-Bq2A/h1/Hnq_ubQH5nhPTAvYrHoghrcUmejnnhSHe8YTlou6J_k)** Across the board, Kendra and Nic are outperforming expectations, drawing endorsements from high-profile elected officials and labor unions, including Sen. John Fetterman and Gov. Josh Shapiro, and the full backing of Philadelphia’s progressive movement. But we know their Republican opponents aren’t about to give up. We can only win in November by fueling the work to out-organize the forces that are aligning to stop our agenda through more small-dollar, grassroots donations from people like you, Peter. From training volunteers, to phone banking and texting, or even covering the printing costs for literature to pass out to voters — **every dollar we raise goes towards our organizing efforts to power Kendra and Nic's campaigns to victory, and build a Philadelphia where everyone, regardless of zip code, race, or immigration status, has access to affordable healthcare, a livable wage, quality education, and safe communities.** [**Can you split contribution of $10 or any amount between Kendra Brooks' and Nicolas O'Rourke's campaigns to power their get-out-the-vote program in Philadelphia?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/em-wfppac-20231009?refcode=NatEmail-20231009&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-wfp-is-outraising-republicans-firstname-default-friend-2&email_referrer=email_2073154&email_subject=out-raising-and-out-organizing-republicans&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_2073154) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0z7LbPfEzyUQoTxoFfOCLCVbR0YoP-dpRE5F5UEI-u5c5k0psSj-0WPJf06Q-CsJVNnQQQWrhgo9w-k2a-uSizDQY0cVFpN8yaupIDjn4LyS9SqW3VNH31Iu6brSiZ2dRZQfSAM__JqtagPnaaPJLzLfB8gB3XNGK3cTrt5JbBCch48RXbktU9o2pbNGD3iChaLcctDQ2XdQXhsFubEIZoIemgjMdV-hzIIPhTO0TTP8BCGUDw-HPG18oHyOZ4kRPBzSYuWvoryR3X70khRrfajt4Dlhq9iQJVEaZmxwS_Bv6zNUsL9jLV4LZxdkdzxN5w/40a/oB_o3dJeQTCYLD0bC-Bq2A/h2/UMoF7N1naQzQVUY8-lzfpxFwT2HT2Bjp_lKXue6wX70)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpI1kLPEGRW4KnFarPJtxfN9U9y0YeH5CaLF3DG4soQcoy1KrGcqFZreu7Y1Ve-ZUj3NkAZMKwn6lcgqoXcwZpyNoPkyDr5Zbn5EogL9clM25yR-A0DMWSYehC5esTEwwzNteYogxOgMYxP0tVwbxwblziCTFLeZXeeaFPQnlxsqZHk0bM4PehVDpbnUtKp7m_T0CXtfxlLc-uhDS63EvvLgBnwIkvw1fuaBZacD4is15tHIBI5ZCFrf0UyMH09SFMLdaPl9FyhPCHV9g2dTD0gNX7inaHx5A8CdVh1m1V5dPYWF6_q4bVHH3hne-_T3ag/40a/oB_o3dJeQTCYLD0bC-Bq2A/h3/1okLc57HWJymwUF8Zpu9qiIEvm60mlYwgW2Q0c2aF5o)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7Q-xOI-kLyL5jO9OnnCBTuK9twyuw2tokk8Ka5w96mgljoXVx1TfN2JBq2hAbFKAY9Z7rk0q7LxSax9I8fvwDnRkTlEyLrHwXYKmPtcUP8tULkASz9c_V3OcKC63C7zMhJOcnAXmlCXK5vuwFpFj8z1Ij3V0G8JdSdo-LgMidp8Wqlg0Rf5CajxXl8fdQLpVFPcU1IOY2SSF-j_1gYbrSXbMrnDb5rnfEHndPmdKnkQkl_Lr70U-FOM12fIi6o-WuN48G18RMnWm-aYewha2xJGa9zmCjWddC_gT099zzMJyg/40a/oB_o3dJeQTCYLD0bC-Bq2A/h4/5WPu0yPVUH_DrDTzPfWSgTBiMtz6vhnx_0jxmd_ptSg) clean_body: Across the board, WFP's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O'Rourke are outperforming expectations — out-raising their Republican opponents, drawing endorsements from high-profile elected officials and labor unions, including Sen. John Fetterman and Gov. Josh Shap | | | We’re smashing records, Peter. In Philadelphia’s closely-watched City Council race, WFP's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke have briskly outraised their Republican opponents. Together, they’ve set a new fundraising record for third-party candidates in the city, with over $715,000 raised for their campaign — the vast majority from grassroots small-dollar donors. We’re proud of these numbers because they show two things: 1. We’re powered and funded by real people and communities inspired to give what they can, when they can. 2. We have the momentum to win. We need to make sure that Kendra and Nic have all the resources they need to crank their on-the-ground organizing into gear and reach as many voters as possible before Election Day. Across the board, Kendra and Nic are outperforming expectations, drawing endorsements from high-profile elected officials and labor unions, including Sen. John Fetterman and Gov. Josh Shapiro, and the full backing of Philadelphia’s progressive movement. But we know their Republican opponents aren’t about to give up. We can only win in November by fueling the work to out-organize the forces that are aligning to stop our agenda through more small-dollar, grassroots donations from people like you, Peter. From training volunteers, to phone banking and texting, or even covering the printing costs for literature to pass out to voters — every dollar we raise goes towards our organizing efforts to power Kendra and Nic's campaigns to victory, and build a Philadelphia where everyone, regardless of zip code, race, or immigration status, has access to affordable healthcare, a livable wage, quality education, and safe communities. secure.actblue.com/donate/em-wfppac-20231009?refcode=NatEmail-20231009&linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-wfp-is-outraising-republicans-firstname-default-friend-2&emailreferrer=email2073154&emailsubject=out-raising-and-out-organizing-republicans&refcodeEmailReferrer=email2073154 Thank you for investing in the movement we're building together, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: Clay Superintendent and School Board Members Support Sapp
body:
Clay County Superintendent Dave Broskie along with School Board Members Beth Clark and Erin Skipper endorse Judson Sapp | | | [ ](https://judsonsapp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=786f9905f43902655e694a1cd&id=4a25fda4e2&e=dc147d445f)
---
| _**Husband. Father. ****Conservative Businessman.
Proud Floridian.**_
---
|
---
“**Judson Sapp is a man of character who has dedicated himself to making our community a better place**. He will be a consistent conservative voice in the legislature and one who will fight for us. I’m proud to endorse Judson Sapp to be our next State Representative.”
**_-Superintendent David Broskie_**
|
---
|
---
“I’m proud to endorse Judson Sapp for State Representative. **He understands the needs of our community and will work for the people, not the special interests.** There is no one better to represent us in Tallahassee than Judson Sapp.”
_**-Beth Clark, Clay County School Board Member**_
|
---
|
---
“**Judson Sapp is the leader we need in Tallahassee to stand up for parents and taxpayers.** He’ll put Florida first and never back down to special interests. We can count on Judson to fight for what’s right.”
_**-Erin Skipper, Clay County School Board Member**_
| |

Change is in the air, and it’s coming to Mississippi. **_A new poll has this race VIRTUALLY TIED — 48% to 47%._** That’s right. We’ve got a real shot at winning this race, but we can’t afford to take any breaks over the next 29 days. We’re already falling behind on our goal to raise $130,000 online before the end of October. [That’s where you come in, Peter. Can I count on you to chip in just $25 or more to help us push this campaign to victory? Your investment will go directly toward persuading and mobilizing voters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71264583/431655629/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.1a0ef4aa-ed66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1a0ef4aa-ed66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwZWY0YWEtZWQ2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SLcXJ1e6D3idSZFDA0C72iXfbKqQA9EPX_DCtD1ZDaw=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71264584/431655630/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.1a0ef4aa-ed66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1a0ef4aa-ed66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwZWY0YWEtZWQ2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SLcXJ1e6D3idSZFDA0C72iXfbKqQA9EPX_DCtD1ZDaw=)**

Look, right now every dollar is another investment into a text message to an undecided voter, a mail piece, a new TV ad, another knocked door, or any other tool you can imagine to contact voters.
And we need all the resources we can get. Tate Reeves is pulling out all the stops to spread lies about my record and scare folks into voting for him.
That’s why our $130,000 goal is so important. If we have the funds to fully power our voter outreach efforts over the next 29 days — **_we will win and expand Medicaid to 220,000 hardworking Mississippians._**
[I’m asking because it’s important, Peter. Will you chip in $25, or whatever you can swing, to help us fire Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward? Any amount makes a major difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71264585/431655631/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.1a0ef4aa-ed66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1a0ef4aa-ed66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwZWY0YWEtZWQ2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SLcXJ1e6D3idSZFDA0C72iXfbKqQA9EPX_DCtD1ZDaw=)

Brandon Presley

clean_body: Change is in the air in Mississippi. | = = Do you feel it, Peter? Change is in the air, and it’s coming to Mississippi. A new poll has this race VIRTUALLY TIED — 48% to 47%. That’s right. We’ve got a real shot at winning this race, but we can’t afford to take any breaks over the next 29 days. We’re already falling behind on our goal to raise $130,000 online before the end of October. = | = Look, right now every dollar is another investment into a text message to an undecided voter, a mail piece, a new TV ad, another knocked door, or any other tool you can imagine to contact voters. And we need all the resources we can get. Tate Reeves is pulling out all the stops to spread lies about my record and scare folks into voting for him. That’s why our $130,000 goal is so important. If we have the funds to fully power our voter outreach efforts over the next 29 days — we will win and expand Medicaid to 220,000 hardworking Mississippians. = God bless, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to _

Hi there, I grew up right here in our corner of Northwest Ohio, and the people in our community work harder than just about anyone else. I think you deserve a Congresswoman who works just as hard as you do, which is why I've made it my mission to never stop fighting for the people who call our district home. Last month was no exception, friend. We accomplished some big things in September, and I want to share these victories with you! name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Indigenous Peoples’ Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Will you become a citizen co-sponsor of my legislation to make Indigenous Peoples’ Day a federal holiday? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71264642/431655920/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231009_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjNjYmIyYi1lZjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bddDdU0p4jyQramxTYiX5_kOJo9IEomwpexYudun1ag=&emci=e13cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=eb3cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Today, we recognize Indigenous Peoples' Day in New Mexico. It’s past time that we also honor our nation’s Tribes and Pueblos on the federal level. That’s why I’ve brought forward legislation to make Indigenous Peoples' Day a federal holiday. **[Will you join me in calling for Indigenous Peoples' Day to be recognized as a federal holiday by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of my bill?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71264643/431655921/1594065262?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231009_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjNjYmIyYi1lZjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bddDdU0p4jyQramxTYiX5_kOJo9IEomwpexYudun1ag=&emci=e13cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=eb3cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71264644/431655922/1594065262?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231009_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjNjYmIyYi1lZjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bddDdU0p4jyQramxTYiX5_kOJo9IEomwpexYudun1ag=&emci=e13cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=eb3cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
**We need to stop commemorating Columbus Day and the violence it represents. Instead, we should establish a federal holiday that lifts up the incredible strength and resilience of America's Tribal Nations.**
Making Indigenous Peoples' Day an official federal holiday is an important step in addressing the inequity and harm the United States has caused Tribes and Pueblos, honoring their rich cultures and traditions, and supporting Tribal sovereignty.
**[I hope you’ll become a citizen co-sponsor of my legislation supporting Tribal Nations by adding your name next to mine:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71264645/431655923/1594065262?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231009_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjNjYmIyYi1lZjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bddDdU0p4jyQramxTYiX5_kOJo9IEomwpexYudun1ag=&emci=e13cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=eb3cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71264646/431655924/1594065262?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231009_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjNjYmIyYi1lZjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bddDdU0p4jyQramxTYiX5_kOJo9IEomwpexYudun1ag=&emci=e13cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=eb3cbb2b-ef66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

— Martin

Friend, News of our record fundraising haul from the last quarter has hit the press and we've got **_big_** things coming because of the support we've brought in. The doubters had their heyday, and yet again, we've proved them wrong. Now, we're bringing the fight right to the Hawkeye State, making progress on visiting the good people of Iowa in all 99 counties, and EARNING this nomination. But after two debates and another incredible fundraising showing, we have truly showed our hand as the threat in this race, and we are about to face attacks from every angle to keep us from winning in Iowa. We cannot let this take us down.
---
| | [Help me keep it up: Chip in $15](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=626f7348948d480ea2d5a2e9ae222e37&_e=Z1wwFEj91pxKeQcxrjqFgOGtLFmybuC2rneLcTCqU2isNibIzgbyjS_idHAnCwY3Ny6FcxXwGEqsyg8VitwOfskz85EBSUrEpx8NrsL2ElLAD0hOInnWmovQ--pDwAUaR-zjIfwMsslD4IQMGVy5ZaFj56FUeC0Rbobcv-zCZSbInh3mHuKubBLZiOReP75vACueYng8dC7lCrwafGwyQQ2QSkoEbfu0X9AizzBJDA4Y3Qk4IC_rb6lP28FJYXiS_hlZd2C572N7Oxe_AGlN9YZhKt0zU1KB33f-55ZEx7pQhMw1XEWBWsJ9b0W59LQsNxVfYdnlnkcZVsmrdB64HXDsmGIenNgOqTswzJwlDGTt3HTyvtbhxL4eFFp1i8dPyMPCQ-tws7zzh6YnML5MC35hSZfwUqCc32mjBieGO9H_yfI98CkkADE2_bDAuDy_H6HSKDBakoK0bm7uTYv1_CbMjKXUbl9lL6bXygZJiyY%3D)

Other candidates are taking the American people for granted and feeling entitled to votes. _That couldn 't be further from my game plan._ I am on the ground, building relationships, and earning the grassroots support that'll be necessary to win this election, and this will only be made harder as other candidates attempt to take us down in the coming months. I KNOW what it takes to win elections, but this is my first nationwide race, and I am counting on your support more than ever to cover this new ground. **_We 've just entered our critical sprint leading up to the Iowa Caucus on January 15th, and coming together now will make the difference when that night comes. If we step back and lose in this first nominating contest, we drop the ball for the future generations of this country and risk losing next November. Losing to Joe Biden... and losing freedom that soldiers have shed blood and tears for_**. All across Iowa so far, I've gained incredible support and endorsements from political, evangelical, agricultural, and local business leaders, **[but I'll need YOUR support to get me through the rest of this stretch.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=626f7348948d480ea2d5a2e9ae222e37&_e=Z1wwFEj91pxKeQcxrjqFgOGtLFmybuC2rneLcTCqU2isNibIzgbyjS_idHAnCwY3Ny6FcxXwGEqsyg8VitwOfskz85EBSUrEpx8NrsL2ElLAD0hOInnWmovQ--pDwAUaR-zjIfwMsslD4IQMGVy5ZaFj56FUeC0Rbobcv-zCZSbInh3mHuKubBLZiOReP75vACueYng8dC7lCrwafGwyQQ2QSkoEbfu0X9AizzBJDA4Y3Qk4IC_rb6lP28FJYXiS_hlZd2C572N7Oxe_AGlN9YZhKt0zU1KB33f-55ZEx7pQhMw1XEWBWsJ9b0W59LQsXpVoqlCCXadrPc8CvyCjidZkuTtf2js1eN4m2AIlUD5KxUwksC9DzikO6B37h-8EUSbwjUrXWwJlKbWDxcvJdYaPC-7NN_qmjguXyvKVdCmKTrjmKxdvtVri-iAaLyj2N28my9c9kV650IPvYTmwuFGqDY2Xf3ezJTG2u09PTu4%3D "but I’ll need YOUR support to get me through the rest of this stretch.")**

---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=626f7348948d480ea2d5a2e9ae222e37&_e=Z1wwFEj91pxKeQcxrjqFgOGtLFmybuC2rneLcTCqU2isNibIzgbyjS_idHAnCwY3Ny6FcxXwGEqsyg8VitwOfskz85EBSUrEpx8NrsL2ElLAD0hOInnWmovQ--pDwAUaR-zjIfwMsslD4IQMGVy5ZaFj56FUeC0Rbobcv-zCZSbInh3mHuKubBLZiOReP75vACueYng8dC7lCrwafGwyQQ2QSkoEbfu0X9AizzBJDA4Y3Qk4IC_rb6lP28FJYXiS_hlZd2C572N7Oxe_AGlN9YZhKt0zU1KB33f-55ZEx7r6C3DfVF2QNUlTykJdHOvu0gYc-aur-SAQ8crinx9bgE6OarAE4uoWWz_CDOrv6g7cobh61ytR99OJBNhI5K_Hrd3fizAlG79edNKGs0Tf68zO5p8DZL1v9IpCBxN6spdtjylAw8w0N1zLNfMpYYEfL133ZIY52EiyWCdDBcQUbCM7jLH2vsiSmqmYHU3aRGk%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: TOMORROW is the last day to register to vote in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
ahead of the November 7th election
|
Team, **First:** Republicans in Ohio passed what is known as one of the most restrictive voter registration laws in the entire country, inhibiting any voter from registering in the 30 days before an election. **Then:** The GOP didn’t stop there. Our Republican Secretary of State began working to remove millions of voters from the active voter rolls in an attempt to silence voters – especially young voters, students, rural voters, and voters of color – who, you guessed it, are more likely to vote Democratic. **Now:** **The deadline to register to vote is tomorrow,** so we’re doing one final push to make sure you know how and where to register and what you can do to defend yourself from Republicans’ voter suppression attempts. ****[But we need your help. Can you chip in right now to help us make sure anyone who still needs to register to vote in these final 48 hours can get it done?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71265139/431657656/1152457543?refcode=odp_em_231009_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTY3NjBlYy1lZjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aPHHQsFdQeaGYuCSQ_XwBjElwvYyqIBpr--VOL-SJh8=)**** It’s going to take all of us to ensure that every single Ohioan can cast their vote next month to protect reproductive rights. name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Today I announced I'm running as an Independent for President
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Today, in front of thousands of people, I declared myself an Independent candidate for President of the United States.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=independence_declaration_3&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Today, in front of thousands of people on Independence Mall in Philadelphia, **I declared myself an Independent candidate for President of the United States.** [****](https://www.kennedy24.com/i_declare_my_independence_today?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=independence_declaration_3&n=2) I declared independence from the mercenary media that forever urges us to hate our neighbors and fear our friends. I declared independence from the cynical elites who betray our hope and amplify our divisions. And finally, I declared independence from the two political parties and the corrupt interests that dominate them, and the entire rigged system of rancor and rage, corruption and lies, that has turned government officials into indentured servants of their corporate bosses. If left unchecked, they will commoditize our air, water, food, labor, and children, and turn the American Dream into desperation and dust. I declared my independence from these corrupting powers because they are incompatible with the inalienable rights that our original Declaration of Independence invoked in 1776: life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. **[Read my entire speech.](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=48J9ZWVzB8kFv6CGwVQKzld8kDqkEKFj2di5iNI4gE_Nc8NyiVEPDN0u6ZxNNHWm&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=independence_declaration_3&n=3) ** Today, I called on all Americans to participate in a renewal of our Declaration of Independence. _Will our movement to restore democracy, health, prosperity, freedom, and peace win?_ **I’m not asking you to make a prediction. I am asking you to make a choice. It will happen if, and when we the people choose it.** Sincerely, Robert F. I declared independence from the mercenary media that forever urges us to hate our neighbors and fear our friends. I declared independence from the cynical elites who betray our hope and amplify our divisions. And finally, I declared independence from the two political parties and the corrupt interests that dominate them, and the entire rigged system of rancor and rage, corruption and lies, that has turned government officials into indentured servants of their corporate bosses. If left unchecked, they will commoditize our air, water, food, labor, and children, and turn the American Dream into desperation and dust. I declared my independence from these corrupting powers because they are incompatible with the inalienable rights that our original Declaration of Independence invoked in 1776: life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: Our Ally Israel Is Under Attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Stand with me in solidarity with our valued ally and friend. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b987fd84f618/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12655839?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=d79ec5328e&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| **_Israel is under attack. And Biden is nowhere to be found._**
---
|
---
| In a brutal attack that began last week on **the sacred Jewish Holiday of Simchat Torah** , Hamas terrorists from Palestine and Gaza carried out rampant campaign of bloodshed against her people. These heartless terrorists continue their onslaught of shameless _**slayings, torture, rape, and capture**_ of thousands of Jewish men, women and children in the __**country of our close ally, Israel.**__ As these attacks continue to escalate, with threats of televised hostage slayings and coordination with Iran backed Hezbollah, _**Biden is nowhere to be found**_ _**as he avoids accountability and shuts down his office for comment**_ , even after news of **9 Americans killed in the attacks** , just one month after his administration gave Iran a _**6 BILLION dollar payment on the anniversary of 9/11! **_ We cannot let this treachery stand,_**Israel should not face this fight alone.**_ Biden’s failure is unacceptable. If Trump was at his rightful place as Commander-In-Chief, an attack like this on a treasured ally would be unthinkable. For too long Joe Biden has been hiding from conflict, and only signals weakness to our enemies everywhere with the message that the office of the American Presidency is nowhere to be found. As Israel faces its darkest hour, I call on our people to join me in standing with Israel against this unimaginable terror wrought by a heartless enemy. You are not alone dear friends, America stands with you, _**until this battle is won**_ , _**until Israel is safe**_ , _**until her people are free at last.**_
---
|
_For Israel,_

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23
[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=b35d1e4f11&e=c982eb7ad4)

name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: Indigenous People’s Day
body:
Nothing can ever ameliorate the great harms against our Indigenous brothers and sisters.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=psQUkJGc26u6Wi0imicX-00jZnUVaZYVu06OFU-xtOc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231009all_indigenouspeoplesd&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Let me start with the undeniable and irrefutable truth that we live on lands that were stolen from the people Indigenous to Turtle Island. The impacts of Anglo-Settler colonialism are still felt to this day here and, as we are currently witnessing with great heartbreak, around the world. We also need to be clear that tawdry “investments” in Indigenous communities via milquetoast policies of the duopoly are a drop in the bucket. **The truth is, while real investments in these communities are warranted, no amount of money can ever ameliorate the great harms of brutal land theft, genocide, and occupation still experienced by Indigenous people.**
---
As we reflect and celebrate this sacred day, I know I have much more to learn from the many Indigenous communities to the north, east, south, and west that I will visit throughout my campaign for the presidency. I look forward to honest and hard discussions, and above all, I look forward to establishing lasting partnerships and cooperation with my Indigenous siblings as their president, but first and foremost as their brother.
---
Happy Indigenous People’s Day today and every day, **Dr. Cornel West** P.S. Please [read my complete statement](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/indigenouspeoplesday?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231009all_indigenouspeoplesd&n=2) on Indigenous People’s Day.
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231009all_indigenouspeoplesd&n=3 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231009all_indigenouspeoplesd&n=3)
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231009all_indigenouspeoplesd&n=4)
---

subject: Regarding President Trump…

|

**FRIEND** , I have always been a supporter of President Trump because he puts Americans first. 2024 is our last chance to get it right before the 2024 election -- it's clear that President Trump is the ONLY candidate who can successfully Make America GREAT Again!

Trump needs our help now more than ever. He is our best shot to beat Joe Biden and take back the White House. Unfortunately, every day, the radical left and 'progressive' actors seeking to destroy the America First movement ramp up their attacks in desperate attempts to destroy our grassroots movement. **[It's up to Americans from all walks of life to stand with Trump and prove that the silent majority will no longer be silent.](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=c2c8aa1627d14fffaad0f7950f3cb84b&_e=CQjfwAdZEE_54zBgXmKTr8pl_Ed20Txd1-xUyHp8REMVpnKQ_eu5CJxT50rmumnIoiqifsg9SPWj13pdExndZsmaHiaHfTsZjgkKQRwn7vAiz6WEeRssvgFVQAF8hjXnYVCU6xy21O5v9qER9YQbZqJzOC1b73XkK6g6ZMN-F5INoEMb0ckDGJ7cHmrOpQRwh9eFMPYv9X1tk4tnhbsoX3pOSgRFWxZfFI2cu6O5dttTxLYqR4izfXPj5Eu0ar0jG7zZwgetxTXKwtEYBV_SLTLLNp9wWdAu0NyIngUc9HfmBVcNipqT8ugoRIKH1AM6LFxxSeLkZq6daUsWhmgIuw%3D%3D)**

body:
you’ve been handpicked to sign >>
| **Leader Hakeem Jeffries Stands Strong with Unified Caucus as GOP Civil War Intensifies** Listen, Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats while the MAGA mob has spent the entire year ripping itself to pieces.

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!**[**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM tomorrow – so we need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54650?t=6&akid=11072%2E878179%2Eh5DWam) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54650?t=7&akid=11072%2E878179%2Eh5DWam) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54650?t=8&akid=11072%2E878179%2Eh5DWam)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

MAGA Republicans have done nothing but tear themselves apart since they seized control of Congress. **Even ousting their own Speaker!**

While they’re busy waging a civil war, you’ve stood strong for the American people, our democracy, and President Biden’s groundbreaking agenda.

**Your continued strength gives me hope that Democrats can take back the House in 2024 and end the MAGA circus for good.**

**We’re so grateful to have you leading the way!** [**That’s why today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help Democrats flip the 5 seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54650?t=9&akid=11072%2E878179%2Eh5DWam) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54650?t=10&akid=11072%2E878179%2Eh5DWam) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54650?t=11&akid=11072%2E878179%2Eh5DWam)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11072%2E878179%2Eh5DWam). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11072%2E878179%2Eh5DWam).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11072%2E878179%2Eh5DWam) to request fewer emails. Our message here is short and sweet: we're working hard to fight back against the Extreme House Democrats, Schumer's Senate, and the White House who want their far-Left priorities included in the people's budget.

We need to fight back hard against the Left to ensure we GAIN seats next November and WIN the White House.

With only 36 days left to fund the government, we have a LOT of work to do. Our message here is short and sweet: we're working hard to fight back against the Extreme House Democrats, Schumer's Senate, and the White House who want their far-Left priorities included in the people's budget. We need to fight back hard against the Left to ensure we GAIN seats next November and WIN the White House. it's time to get to work. Thank you, House GOP Alerts | | Paid for by Nicole for New York Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 View our privacy policy

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: I won't back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, in Washington DC, there’s a whole lot of talk but no action.

Democrats use their control of the White House and the Senate to push Republicans into a corner.

**They’re demanding HIGHER spending levels, MORE debt, and INCREASED taxes. And what are Republicans doing about it?**

Well, some are giving in.

**But I won’t.**

It’s Senator Rick Scott from Florida, one of the LOUDEST conservative voices in the Senate.

I even challenged Republican leadership for giving into the Democrats’ demands, and now, the Washington Establishment is attacking me for it.

You see, insiders in Washington want members who call them out or expose their games GONE. And it looks like I may be next on their list of targets.

**[I’m up for reelection in 2024 and my race will be tough. Can I count on your support?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=4b40a13b6ea246b0bc466bb75c15d40d&_e=s5b8zxIacfb1x9n0dNPfZywVjff1yPMRt8LVNv4mvfqNfWbC47KbUOEwpzfGVKH4hFBAMituiuWw5yZBXDA2c8sZfKTZezSWR94m1GXv7cCBgCogDtL29L0o4_tCUeDAV_fBxuqTbi4vRzeUhYyhd4cdAM8h9fCYtkS2AlKcppVOcI0M5mVm0enaaPM3im9HZP9GyjHbQpbYHlYNg9XN7Mtp84I-1fk5qtq-2N8GGnU_XdFae0RFp5kAFnwWwv5eb3AQkSf6KKOwgcUtDhufqitXitsUA-N9wt2krup5CjFPitGL66zqe2ghpPTjRTBNee0sPfoxXS1vb4NEqN5BLraEjH_-pr_xON5FNk29xrk%3D)**

News Highlights | “I’m running for governor because New Hampshire is one election away from becoming Massachusetts,” Ayott
