| | Friend, Team Kelly was once again all over New Hampshire last week! Kelly stopped by the Grass Drags in Fremont as the New Hampshire Snowmobile Association held their premier event as they get ready to kick off the winter snowmobile season. Kelly then joined the Bedford Fire Department for their Community Ball. On Saturday, Kelly started off the Day at the Milford Pumpkin Festival before heading over to a packed house party at the home of David Tille, then finished the evening at the Building Dreams for Marines Foundation Dinner honoring the memory of Gunnery Sgt. Bernie Ruchin. On Sunday, Kelly attended the Sandwich Fair, the Granite State’s last fair of the year. Keep up with all of our campaign updates on our [Facebook](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/2aOh-vvzb/c?w=q5Rzwe_sFkKkIlxL1J1RwOQr1IRzxCMsZIzdZZS12Ko.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0tlbGx5QXlvdHRlRm9yTkgiLCJyIjoiZmM3MGMxYzktMWNjNy00ODNhLTlmMDYtYmI2NDg3ZmYxMjNiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0) page. Best, Team Kelly
---
| | |
---
| | News Highlights
---
| |
---
| | “I’m running for governor because New Hampshire is one election away from [becoming Massachusetts](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/2aOh-vvzb/c?w=cV4Q69Y9F8vloCujOFX8wapYWc-wKz5Q9fktzZMGSaA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYm9zdG9uZ2xvYmUuY29tLzIwMjMvMDcvMTkvbWV0cm8vbWF1cmEtaGVhbGV5LWtlbGx5LWF5b3R0ZS1qb3ljZS1jcmFpZy1uZXctaGFtcHNoaXJlLWNocmlzLXN1bnVudS8_cDE9QXJ0aWNsZV9JbmxpbmVfVGV4dF9MaW5rJnAxPUFydGljbGVfSW5saW5lX1RleHRfTGluayZwMT1BcnRpY2xlX0lubGluZV9UZXh0X0xpbmsiLCJyIjoiOTA4Mzc2NTQtNTk5Mi00ZWU3LWJlNjctM2JjNjBhMjVhNTcyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0),” Ayotte, former New Hampshire attorney general and senator, has repeatedly said since she announced her candidacy. Shortly after her announcement in July, [she appeared on “Fox & Friends”](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/2aOh-vvzb/c?w=FMeVLK2u70cIc3RWE9F7vmYHqUF6j9EkV6CS8MnDpnE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvZm9ybWVyLW5ldy1oYW1wc2hpcmUtc2VuLWtlbGx5LWF5b3R0ZS1sYXVuY2hlcy1yZXB1YmxpY2FuLWJpZC1nb3Zlcm5vciIsInIiOiI5MDgzNzY1NC01OTkyLTRlZTctYmU2Ny0zYmM2MGEyNWE1NzIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyYjA4ZTcwMy1hNjI3LTQ2ZjMtYmU4YS01ZDU2NTQ0MjYyMDIifQ) to underscore her point: that Massachusetts has income tax, a sales tax, and less freedom than the “Live Free or Die” state. [Read the full article from the Boston Globe here.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/2aOh-vvzb/c?w=ochpQtlADGYbS_t39_jHQeUHC006G39oRecmgAMtXCc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYm9zdG9uZ2xvYmUuY29tLzIwMjMvMTAvMDUvbWV0cm8vbWFzc2FjaHVzZXR0cy1uZXctaGFtcHNoaXJlLXZvdGVyLWdvcC1wb2xsLWtlbGx5LWF5b3R0ZS8iLCJyIjoiOTA4Mzc2NTQtNTk5Mi00ZWU3LWJlNjctM2JjNjBhMjVhNTcyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: ▶️ my thoughts on Israel
body:
In the last 48 hours it became my most-watched video of the campaign. |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter, the stories and images coming out of Israel after the terrorist attack continue to horrify me.

_**Hamas terrorists indiscriminately massacred innocent men, women, and children.**_ They paraded their bodies in the streets.

More than 700 people are already confirmed dead, including at least 11 American citizens. Many more have been taken hostage by these vile murderers.

_I posted the below video this weekend reacting to the attack and explaining why we must stand with Israel and her right to defend herself. _

In the last 48 hours it became my most-watched video of the campaign. It received a LOT of comments. Most people agreed with me. Sadly, not everyone did.

**[I want to share it with you here so you can decide for yourself.](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=9b6f8c65c7&e=86e91e802d)**
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=a5e34f2cbe&e=86e91e802d)
---
| **We need to stand with Israel.** They have a right to exist and an absolute right to defend themselves.

We have to condemn evil and the actions of our enemies to commit genocide of the Jewish people.

And we need to acknowledge that **_the Biden Administration's policy of coddling Iran, the biggest supporter of Hamas' terrorism, has been a dangerous policy failure._**

We're going to learn more in the coming days and weeks as this conflict unfolds.

In the meantime, I'll be praying for Israel. I hope you'll join me.

\- Max Ukropina

---

Hey Friend,
Did you see this Wall Street Journal Opinion piece?
Why is Donald Trump Afraid to Debate? He’s ducking exchanges with his competitors who could challenge his record and platform. -By The Editorial Board

The Wall Street Journal hit the nail on the head: Trump doesn’t want to answer tough questions, and who better to deliver that prosecution than Chris Christie?

We will have **EXCLUSIVE** insights into the situation in **Israel** that you need to be made aware of.
Speakers include:
-**General Michael Flynn**
-**Roger Stone**
-and others
This event is FREE but you must RSVP at [www.pastors4trump.com/doral](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2344963.830.1.dfa4c3c2a5368422fec06373d7220c55)
If you are attending **in-person** : the event will take place at the Trump Doral Clubhouse in the Ivanka Trump Room. Doors open at 5pm est.

subject: I truly can't thank you enough

body:
This grassroots team once again exceeded my expectations. Thank you, Peter.

Over the last few days, my team and I have reached out to ask for your support ahead of our 30-day pre-general reporting deadline. This was the biggest deadline our campaign has faced yet and marks the beginning of the last phase of this race.

This grassroots team once again exceeded my expectations. Supporters from across the Commonwealth stepped up to help ensure we have the resources needed in these last weeks to win.

I'm so honored to have your continued support, but our work is far from over. My opponent and his super PAC allies will say and spend whatever it takes to try to win. This is still anyone's race, so we need to give it everything we've got these next few weeks if we're going to protect Kentucky's progress.
